README / docs

sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자 입력
    participant CLI as CLI App (Ink)
    participant Client as GeminiClient
    participant Turn as Turn
    participant Chat as GeminiChat
    participant API as Gemini API
    participant Sched as Scheduler
    participant Policy as PolicyEngine
    participant Exec as ToolExecutor
    participant Sandbox as SandboxManager

    User->>CLI: 메시지 입력
    CLI->>Client: sendMessageStream(parts, signal)
    Client->>Client: processTurn() — 압축 검사, 컨텍스트 검증, 루프 탐지
    Client->>Turn: run(modelConfigKey, request, signal)
    Turn->>Chat: sendMessageStream(request)
    Chat->>API: generateContentStream()
    API-->>Chat: 스트리밍 청크
    Chat-->>Turn: StreamEvent (CHUNK | RETRY)
    Turn-->>Client: Content / Thought / ToolCallRequest 이벤트
    Client-->>CLI: 스트리밍 텍스트 표시

    Note over CLI,Sched: 도구 호출이 있으면
    CLI->>Sched: schedule(toolCallRequests, signal)
    Sched->>Policy: checkPolicy(functionCall, args)
    Policy-->>Sched: ALLOW / ASK_USER / DENY
    Sched->>Exec: execute(toolCall, signal)
    Exec->>Sandbox: prepareCommand() (shell 도구인 경우)
    Sandbox-->>Exec: SandboxedCommand
    Exec-->>Sched: CompletedToolCall (functionResponse)
    Sched-->>CLI: CompletedToolCall[]

    CLI->>Client: sendMessageStream(toolResponseParts)
    Note over CLI,API: 도구 호출 없을 때까지 반복

README / docs

// packages/cli/src/ui/App.tsx
export const App = () => {
  const uiState = useUIState();
  const isAlternateBuffer = useAlternateBuffer();
  const isScreenReaderEnabled = useIsScreenReaderEnabled();

  if (uiState.quittingMessages) {
    if (isAlternateBuffer) {
      return <AlternateBufferQuittingDisplay />;
    } else {
      return <QuittingDisplay />;
    }
  }

  return (
    <StreamingContext.Provider value={uiState.streamingState}>
      {isScreenReaderEnabled ? <ScreenReaderAppLayout /> : <DefaultAppLayout />}
    </StreamingContext.Provider>
  );
};

000/03_overview_canonical_map.md

Overview Canonical Map

This map resolves the apparent duplication between /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/ and /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/ without deleting or moving files.

Canonical Rule

  • /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/ is the root overview index and short-entry reading spine.
  • /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/ is the deep overview source set.
  • If the same filename exists in both folders and content differs, keep both:
    • read /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/<name> first for orientation,
    • read /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/<name> for detailed analysis.
  • If content is identical, treat /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/<name> as the navigation copy and /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/<name> as the deep-overview location until a later link audit decides whether deduplication is safe.

000/00_ge_overview.md

Gemini CLI Agent Engine Review Overview

This document analyzes the code structure of the google-gemini/gemini-cli repository. The purpose is to create a comparative analysis asset by understanding the internals of Gemini CLI along the same axes as Codex analysis (prompt assembly, tool runtime, skill, subagent, sandbox, policy).

One sentence conclusion: Gemini CLI is a large monorepo engine with PromptProvider + ToolRegistry + Scheduler + PolicyEngine + HookSystem + SandboxManager + SkillManager + ModelRouter already separated, and 7 packages (cli, core, sdk, a2a-server, devtools, vscode-ide-companion, It consists of test-utils). There are 379 non-test source files in the core package, 510 files in the cli package, and 371 files in the TUI component.

The key is twelve branches.

  1. Prompt Assembly: PromptProvider assembles 25 render functions from snippets.ts to create a system prompt.
  2. turn loop: client.ts (line 1267) orchestrates multiple turns and turn.ts (line 447) handles a single turn.
  3. Tool Runtime: ToolRegistry → Scheduler → ToolExecutor → BaseDeclarativeTool.build() → ToolInvocation.execute() pipeline
  4. Skill System: SkillManager loads the YAML frontmatter-based SKILL.md file in the order of Built-in → Extension → User → Workspace.
  5. MCP: Register the external tool in the same registry as the built-in tool with McpClientManager → McpClient → DiscoveredMCPTool.
  6. Policy/Guardian: PolicyEngine + SandboxPolicyManager makes ALLOW/DENY/ASK_USER tripartite decision with TOML-based rules
  7. Sandbox: Implementations for three platforms: macOS Seatbelt, Linux Seccomp, and Windows AppContainer
  8. Model routing: Dynamic model selection with 8 strategies (default, classifier, composite, fallback, override, approvalMode, etc.)
  9. Hook system: Life cycle hooks for 11 events, including BeforeTool, AfterTool, BeforeAgent, and AfterAgent.
  10. Extension system: Bundling MCP server, policy, skill, hook, theme, and command based on gemini-extension.json
  11. Safety Check: Conseca based policy generator + external checker protocol (SafetyCheckInput)
  12. A2A Server: Agent-to-Agent protocol server based on @a2a-js/sdk to execute tasks through HTTP API
graph TD

    D --> E["GeminiChat (geminiChat.ts)"]
    E --> F["@google/genai API"]

    G --> H["PolicyEngine"]
    H -->|ALLOW| I["ToolExecutor"]
    H -->|ASK_USER| J["ConfirmationBus → UI"]
    H -->|DENY| K["거부 응답"]

sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자 입력
    participant CLI as CLI App (Ink)
    participant Client as GeminiClient
    participant Turn as Turn
    participant Chat as GeminiChat
    participant API as Gemini API
    participant Sched as Scheduler
    participant Policy as PolicyEngine
    participant Exec as ToolExecutor
    participant Sandbox as SandboxManager

    User->>CLI: 메시지 입력
    CLI->>Client: sendMessageStream(parts, signal)
    Client->>Client: processTurn() — 압축 검사, 컨텍스트 검증, 루프 탐지
    Client->>Turn: run(modelConfigKey, request, signal)
    Turn->>Chat: sendMessageStream(request)
    Chat->>API: generateContentStream()
    API-->>Chat: 스트리밍 청크
    Chat-->>Turn: StreamEvent (CHUNK | RETRY)
    Turn-->>Client: Content / Thought / ToolCallRequest 이벤트
    Client-->>CLI: 스트리밍 텍스트 표시

    Note over CLI,Sched: 도구 호출이 있으면
    CLI->>Sched: schedule(toolCallRequests, signal)
    Sched->>Policy: checkPolicy(functionCall, args)
    Policy-->>Sched: ALLOW / ASK_USER / DENY
    Sched->>Exec: execute(toolCall, signal)
    Exec->>Sandbox: prepareCommand() (shell 도구인 경우)
    Sandbox-->>Exec: SandboxedCommand
    Exec-->>Sched: CompletedToolCall (functionResponse)
    Sched-->>CLI: CompletedToolCall[]

    CLI->>Client: sendMessageStream(toolResponseParts)
    Note over CLI,API: 도구 호출 없을 때까지 반복

1. Package structure

package npm name Role
packages/cli @google/gemini-cli TUI (React/Ink), command processing, authentication, extended CLI
packages/core @google/gemini-cli-core agent loop, tool, prompt, policy, sandbox, MCP, hook
packages/sdk @google/gemini-cli-sdk Programming API (export agent, session, tool, skills)
packages/a2a-server @google/gemini-cli-a2a-server Agent-to-Agent HTTP Server
packages/devtools @google/gemini-cli-devtools Network/Console Inspector
packages/vscode-ide-companion gemini-cli-vscode-ide-companion VS Code Extension — IDE Context Injection
packages/test-utils @google/gemini-cli-test-utils test utility

File size:

area Number of non-test source files
All core packages 379
All cli packages 510
TUI component (cli/src/ui/) 371
tools (core/src/tools/) ~40 (80 including tests)
settings (core/src/config/) ~12 (25 including tests)

2. TUI design — React/Ink based terminal UI

Gemini CLI's TUI is built on top of React + Ink. This is a large React component tree consisting of 371 non-test files.

Entry points and app structure

// packages/cli/src/ui/App.tsx
export const App = () => {
  const uiState = useUIState();
  const isAlternateBuffer = useAlternateBuffer();
  const isScreenReaderEnabled = useIsScreenReaderEnabled();

  if (uiState.quittingMessages) {
    if (isAlternateBuffer) {
      return <AlternateBufferQuittingDisplay />;
    } else {
      return <QuittingDisplay />;
    }
  }

  return (
    <StreamingContext.Provider value={uiState.streamingState}>
      {isScreenReaderEnabled ? <ScreenReaderAppLayout /> : <DefaultAppLayout />}
    </StreamingContext.Provider>
  );
};

Major Context Providers (14)

Context Role
SessionContext Session State Management
ConfigContext Settings Access
StreamingContext Streaming Status
UIStateContext UI global state
UIActionsContext UI action dispatch
ToolActionsContext Tool Confirm/Reject Action
AskUserActionsContext User Questions Answered
TerminalContext Terminal Size/Features
MouseContext mouse event
ShellFocusContext shell focus state
VimModeContext Switch Vim modes
`Keypr

They intentionally avoid the canonical 00_<prefix>_overview.md basename so wiki/backlink indexers do not see two files with the same 00_*_overview identity.

000/03_overview_canonical_map.md

Overview Canonical Map

This map resolves the apparent duplication between /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/ and /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/ without deleting or moving files.

Canonical Rule

  • /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/ is the root overview index and short-entry reading spine.
  • /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/ is the deep overview source set.
  • If the same filename exists in both folders and content differs, keep both:
    • read /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/<name> first for orientation,
    • read /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/<name> for detailed analysis.
  • If content is identical, treat /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/<name> as the navigation copy and /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/<name> as the deep-overview location until a later link audit decides whether deduplication is safe.

000/00_ge_overview.md

Gemini CLI 에이전트 엔진 검토 개요

이 문서는 google-gemini/gemini-cli 저장소의 코드 구조를 분석한다. 목적은 Codex 분석과 동일한 축(프롬프트 조립, 툴 런타임, 스킬, 서브에이전트, 샌드박스, 정책)으로 Gemini CLI의 내부를 파악하여 비교 분석 자산을 만드는 것이다.

한 문장 결론: Gemini CLI는 PromptProvider + ToolRegistry + Scheduler + PolicyEngine + HookSystem + SandboxManager + SkillManager + ModelRouter가 이미 분리된 대규모 모노레포 엔진이며, 7개 패키지(cli, core, sdk, a2a-server, devtools, vscode-ide-companion, test-utils)로 구성된다. core 패키지만 379개 비테스트 소스 파일, cli 패키지 510개 파일, TUI 컴포넌트만 371개 파일이다.

핵심은 열두 갈래다.

  1. 프롬프트 조립: PromptProvider가 snippets.ts의 렌더 함수 25개를 조합하여 시스템 프롬프트를 생성한다
  2. 턴 루프: client.ts(1267줄)가 다중 턴을 오케스트레이션하고 turn.ts(447줄)가 단일 턴을 처리한다
  3. 툴 런타임: ToolRegistry → Scheduler → ToolExecutor → BaseDeclarativeTool.build() → ToolInvocation.execute() 파이프라인
  4. 스킬 시스템: SkillManager가 Built-in → Extension → User → Workspace 순서로 YAML frontmatter 기반 SKILL.md 파일을 로딩한다
  5. MCP: McpClientManager → McpClient → DiscoveredMCPTool로 외부 도구를 내장 도구와 동일 레지스트리에 등록한다
  6. 정책/가디언: PolicyEngine + SandboxPolicyManager가 TOML 기반 규칙으로 ALLOW/DENY/ASK_USER 삼분 결정을 내린다
  7. 샌드박스: macOS Seatbelt, Linux Seccomp, Windows AppContainer 세 플랫폼별 구현체
  8. 모델 라우팅: 8개 전략(default, classifier, composite, fallback, override, approvalMode 등)으로 동적 모델 선택
  9. 훅 시스템: BeforeTool, AfterTool, BeforeAgent, AfterAgent 등 11개 이벤트의 수명주기 훅
  10. 확장 시스템: gemini-extension.json 기반으로 MCP 서버, 정책, 스킬, 훅, 테마, 커맨드를 번들링
  11. 안전 검사: Conseca 기반 정책 생성기 + 외부 체커 프로토콜(SafetyCheckInput)
  12. A2A 서버: @a2a-js/sdk 기반 Agent-to-Agent 프로토콜 서버로 HTTP API를 통한 태스크 실행
graph TD
    A["사용자 입력 / IDE / A2A"] --> B["CLI App (React/Ink)"]
    B --> C["GeminiClient (client.ts)"]
    C --> D["Turn (turn.ts)"]
    D --> E["GeminiChat (geminiChat.ts)"]
    E --> F["@google/genai API"]
    
    D -->|ToolCallRequest| G["Scheduler"]
    G --> H["PolicyEngine"]
    H -->|ALLOW| I["ToolExecutor"]
    H -->|ASK_USER| J["ConfirmationBus → UI"]
    H -->|DENY| K["거부 응답"]
    
    I --> L["ToolRegistry"]
    L --> M["내장 도구 (shell, read-file, grep...)"]
    L --> N["MCP 도구 (McpClientManager)"]
    L --> O["Discovered 도구"]
    L --> P["Extension 도구"]
    
    I -->|shell 실행| Q["SandboxManager"]
    Q --> R["macOS Seatbelt"]
    Q --> S["Linux Seccomp"]
    Q --> T["Windows AppContainer"]
    
    C --> U["PromptProvider"]
    U --> V["snippets.ts (25개 렌더 함수)"]
    U --> W["SkillManager"]
    U --> X["HierarchicalMemory"]
    
    C --> Y["ModelRouter"]
    Y --> Z["8개 라우팅 전략"]
    
    C --> AA["HookSystem"]
    AA --> AB["BeforeTool / AfterTool / BeforeAgent / AfterAgent"]

sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자 입력
    participant CLI as CLI App (Ink)
    participant Client as GeminiClient
    participant Turn as Turn
    participant Chat as GeminiChat
    participant API as Gemini API
    participant Sched as Scheduler
    participant Policy as PolicyEngine
    participant Exec as ToolExecutor
    participant Sandbox as SandboxManager

    User->>CLI: 메시지 입력
    CLI->>Client: sendMessageStream(parts, signal)
    Client->>Client: processTurn() — 압축 검사, 컨텍스트 검증, 루프 탐지
    Client->>Turn: run(modelConfigKey, request, signal)
    Turn->>Chat: sendMessageStream(request)
    Chat->>API: generateContentStream()
    API-->>Chat: 스트리밍 청크
    Chat-->>Turn: StreamEvent (CHUNK | RETRY)
    Turn-->>Client: Content / Thought / ToolCallRequest 이벤트
    Client-->>CLI: 스트리밍 텍스트 표시

    Note over CLI,Sched: 도구 호출이 있으면
    CLI->>Sched: schedule(toolCallRequests, signal)
    Sched->>Policy: checkPolicy(functionCall, args)
    Policy-->>Sched: ALLOW / ASK_USER / DENY
    Sched->>Exec: execute(toolCall, signal)
    Exec->>Sandbox: prepareCommand() (shell 도구인 경우)
    Sandbox-->>Exec: SandboxedCommand
    Exec-->>Sched: CompletedToolCall (functionResponse)
    Sched-->>CLI: CompletedToolCall[]

    CLI->>Client: sendMessageStream(toolResponseParts)
    Note over CLI,API: 도구 호출 없을 때까지 반복

1. 패키지 구조

패키지 npm 이름 역할
packages/cli @google/gemini-cli TUI (React/Ink), 커맨드 처리, 인증, 확장 CLI
packages/core @google/gemini-cli-core 에이전트 루프, 도구, 프롬프트, 정책, 샌드박스, MCP, 훅
packages/sdk @google/gemini-cli-sdk 프로그래밍 API (agent, session, tool, skills 내보내기)
packages/a2a-server @google/gemini-cli-a2a-server Agent-to-Agent HTTP 서버
packages/devtools @google/gemini-cli-devtools 네트워크/콘솔 인스펙터
packages/vscode-ide-companion gemini-cli-vscode-ide-companion VS Code 확장 — IDE 컨텍스트 주입
packages/test-utils @google/gemini-cli-test-utils 테스트 유틸리티

파일 규모:

영역 비테스트 소스 파일 수
core 패키지 전체 379
cli 패키지 전체 510
TUI 컴포넌트 (cli/src/ui/) 371
도구 (core/src/tools/) ~40 (테스트 포함 80)
설정 (core/src/config/) ~12 (테스트 포함 25)

2. TUI 설계 — React/Ink 기반 터미널 UI

Gemini CLI의 TUI는 React + Ink 위에 구축되었다. 371개 비테스트 파일로 구성된 대규모 React 컴포넌트 트리다.

진입점과 앱 구조

// packages/cli/src/ui/App.tsx
export const App = () => {
  const uiState = useUIState();
  const isAlternateBuffer = useAlternateBuffer();
  const isScreenReaderEnabled = useIsScreenReaderEnabled();

  if (uiState.quittingMessages) {
    if (isAlternateBuffer) {
      return <AlternateBufferQuittingDisplay />;
    } else {
      return <QuittingDisplay />;
    }
  }

  return (
    <StreamingContext.Provider value={uiState.streamingState}>
      {isScreenReaderEnabled ? <ScreenReaderAppLayout /> : <DefaultAppLayout />}
    </StreamingContext.Provider>
  );
};

주요 Context Provider (14개)

Context 역할
SessionContext 세션 상태 관리
ConfigContext 설정 접근
StreamingContext 스트리밍 상태
UIStateContext UI 전역 상태
UIActionsContext UI 액션 디스패치
ToolActionsContext 도구 확인/거부 액션
AskUserActionsContext 사용자 질문 응답
TerminalContext 터미널 크기/기능
MouseContext 마우스 이벤트
ShellFocusContext 셸 포커스 상태
VimModeContext Vim 모드 전환
`Keypr

## Corpus note

# Gemini CLI 에이전트 엔진 검토 개요

이 문서는 `google-gemini/gemini-cli` 저장소의 코드 구조를 분석한다. 목적은 Codex 분석과 동일한 축(프롬프트 조립, 툴 런타임, 스킬, 서브에이전트, 샌드박스, 정책)으로 Gemini CLI의 내부를 파악하여 비교 분석 자산을 만드는 것이다.

한 문장 결론: Gemini CLI는 `PromptProvider + ToolRegistry + Scheduler + PolicyEngine + HookSystem + SandboxManager + SkillManager + ModelRouter`가 이미 분리된 대규모 모노레포 엔진이며, 7개 패키지(`cli`, `core`, `sdk`, `a2a-server`, `devtools`, `vscode-ide-companion`, `test-utils`)로 구성된다. core 패키지만 379개 비테스트 소스 파일, cli 패키지 510개 파일, TUI 컴포넌트만 371개 파일이다.

핵심은 열두 갈래다.

1. **프롬프트 조립**: `PromptProvider`가 `snippets.ts`의 렌더 함수 25개를 조합하여 시스템 프롬프트를 생성한다
2. **턴 루프**: `client.ts`(1267줄)가 다중 턴을 오케스트레이션하고 `turn.ts`(447줄)가 단일 턴을 처리한다
3. **툴 런타임**: `ToolRegistry` → `Scheduler` → `ToolExecutor` → `BaseDeclarativeTool.build()` → `ToolInvocation.execute()` 파이프라인
4. **스킬 시스템**: `SkillManager`가 Built-in → Extension → User → Workspace 순서로 YAML frontmatter 기반 `SKILL.md` 파일을 로딩한다
5. **MCP**: `McpClientManager` → `McpClient` → `DiscoveredMCPTool`로 외부 도구를 내장 도구와 동일 레지스트리에 등록한다
6. **정책/가디언**: `PolicyEngine` + `SandboxPolicyManager`가 TOML 기반 규칙으로 ALLOW/DENY/ASK_USER 삼분 결정을 내린다
7. **샌드박스**: macOS Seatbelt, Linux Seccomp, Windows AppContainer 세 플랫폼별 구현체
8. **모델 라우팅**: 8개 전략(`default`, `classifier`, `composite`, `fallback`, `override`, `approvalMode` 등)으로 동적 모델 선택
9. **훅 시스템**: `BeforeTool`, `AfterTool`, `BeforeAgent`, `AfterAgent` 등 11개 이벤트의 수명주기 훅
10. **확장 시스템**: `gemini-extension.json` 기반으로 MCP 서버, 정책, 스킬, 훅, 테마, 커맨드를 번들링
11. **안전 검사**: `Conseca` 기반 정책 생성기 + 외부 체커 프로토콜(`SafetyCheckInput`)
12. **A2A 서버**: `@a2a-js/sdk` 기반 Agent-to-Agent 프로토콜 서버로 HTTP API를 통한 태스크 실행

```mermaid
graph TD
    A["사용자 입력 / IDE / A2A"] --> B["CLI App (React/Ink)"]
    B --> C["GeminiClient (client.ts)"]
    C --> D["Turn (turn.ts)"]
    D --> E["GeminiChat (geminiChat.ts)"]
    E --> F["@google/genai API"]
    
    D -->|ToolCallRequest| G["Scheduler"]
    G --> H["PolicyEngine"]
    H -->|ALLOW| I["ToolExecutor"]
    H -->|ASK_USER| J["ConfirmationBus → UI"]
    H -

First session

First session

Overview

First session — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • Minimal path: repo root → launch CLI → first prompt.

  • 130_gemini-cli/README.md

  • gemini
  • gemini --include-directories ../lib,../docs
  • gemini -m gemini-2.5-flash
  • Get a simple text response:
  • gemini -p "Explain the architecture of this codebase"
  • For more advanced scripting, including how to parse JSON and handle errors, use
  • the --output-format json flag to get structured output:
  • gemini -p "Explain the architecture of this codebase" --output-format json
  • For real-time event streaming (useful for monitoring long-running operations),
  • use --output-format stream-json to get newline-delimited JSON events:

Main analysis

The minimum path to launch the CLI from the repo root and reach the first prompt.

130_gemini-cli/README.md

🚀 Getting Started

Basic Usage

Start in current directory

gemini

Include multiple directories

gemini --include-directories ../lib,../docs

Use specific model

gemini -m gemini-2.5-flash

Non-interactive mode for scripts

Get a simple text response:

gemini -p "Explain the architecture of this codebase"

For more advanced scripting, including how to parse JSON and handle errors, use the --output-format json flag to get structured output:

gemini -p "Explain the architecture of this codebase" --output-format json

For real-time event streaming (useful for monitoring long-running operations), use --output-format stream-json to get newline-delimited JSON events:

gemini -p "Run tests and deploy" --output-format stream-json

Quick Examples

Start a new project

cd new-project/
gemini
> Write me a Discord bot that answers questions using a FAQ.md file I will provide

Analyze existing code

git clone https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli
cd gemini-cli
gemini
> Give me a summary of all of the changes that went in yesterday

📦 Installation

Quick Install

## Main analysis

The daily edit/tool/commit loop for this harness.

> `130_gemini-cli/README.md`

## 📋 Key Features

### Code Understanding & Generation

- Query and edit large codebases
- Generate new apps from PDFs, images, or sketches using multimodal capabilities
- Debug issues and troubleshoot with natural language

### Automation & Integration

- Automate operational tasks like querying pull requests or handling complex
  rebases
- Use MCP servers to connect new capabilities, including
  [media generation with Imagen, Veo or Lyria](https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/vertex-ai-creative-studio/tree/main/experiments/mcp-genmedia)
- Run non-interactively in scripts for workflow automation

### Advanced Capabilities

- Ground your queries with built-in
  [Google Search](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/grounding) for real-time
  information
- Conversation checkpointing to save and resume complex sessions
- Custom context files (GEMINI.md) to tailor behavior for your projects

### GitHub Integration

Integrate Gemini CLI directly into your GitHub workflows with
[**Gemini CLI GitHub Action**](https://github.com/google-github-actions/run-gemini-cli):

- **Pull Request Reviews**: Automated code review with contextual feedback and
  suggestions
- **Issue Triage**: Automated labeling and prioritization of GitHub issues based
  on content analysis
- **On-demand Assistance**: Mention `@gemini-cli` in issues and pull requests
  for help with debugging, explanations, or task delegation
- **Custom Workflows**: Build automated, scheduled and on-demand workflows
  tailored to your team's needs

## Gemini CLI loop

`gemini` → turn scheduler → tool/MCP call → sandbox policy.

> `000_overview/00_ge_overview.md` §5

## 📋 Key Features

### Code Understanding & Generation

- Query and edit large codebases
- Generate new apps from PDFs, images, or sketches using multimodal capabilities
- Debug issues and troubleshoot with natural language

### Automation & Integration

- Automate operational tasks like querying pull requests or handling complex
  rebases
- Use MCP servers to connect new capabilities, including
  [media generation with Imagen, Veo or Lyria](https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/vertex-ai-creative-studio/tree/main/experiments/mcp-genmedia)
- Run non-interactively in scripts for workflow automation

### Advanced Capabilities

- Ground your queries with built-in
  [Google Search](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/grounding) for real-time
  information
- Conversation checkpointing to save and resume complex sessions
- Custom context files (GEMINI.md) to tailor behavior for your projects

### GitHub Integration

Integrate Gemini CLI directly into your GitHub workflows with
[**Gemini CLI GitHub Action**](https://github.com/google-github-actions/run-gemini-cli):

- **Pull Request Reviews**: Automated code review with contextual feedback and
  suggestions
- **Issue Triage**: Automated labeling and prioritization of GitHub issues based
  on content analysis
- **On-demand Assistance**: Mention `@gemini-cli` in issues and pull requests
  for help with debugging, explanations, or task delegation
- **Custom Workflows**: Build automated, scheduled and on-demand workflows
  tailored to your team's needs

`gemini` → turn scheduler → tool/MCP 호출 → 샌드박스 정책.

Overview §1 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • | 패키지 | npm 이름 | 역할 |
  • | packages/cli | @google/gemini-cli | TUI (React/Ink), 커맨드 처리, 인증, 확장 CLI |
  • | packages/core | @google/gemini-cli-core | 에이전트 루프, 도구, 프롬프트, 정책, 샌드박스, MCP, 훅 |
  • | packages/sdk | @google/gemini-cli-sdk | 프로그래밍 API (agent, session, tool, skills 내보내기) |
  • | packages/a2a-server | @google/gemini-cli-a2a-server | Agent-to-Agent HTTP 서버 |
  • | packages/devtools | @google/gemini-cli-devtools | 네트워크/콘솔 인스펙터 |
  • | packages/vscode-ide-companion | gemini-cli-vscode-ide-companion | VS Code 확장 — IDE 컨텍스트 주입 |
  • | packages/test-utils | @google/gemini-cli-test-utils | 테스트 유틸리티 |
  • | core 패키지 전체 | 379 |
  • | cli 패키지 전체 | 510 |
  • | TUI 컴포넌트 (cli/src/ui/) | 371 |
  • | 도구 (core/src/tools/) | ~40 (테스트 포함 80) |

## Main analysis

## 1. Package structure

## 1. Package structure

| package | npm name | Role |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `packages/cli` | `@google/gemini-cli` | TUI (React/Ink), command processing, authentication, extended CLI |
| `packages/core` | `@google/gemini-cli-core` | agent loop, tool, prompt, policy, sandbox, MCP, hook |
| `packages/sdk` | `@google/gemini-cli-sdk` | Programming API (export agent, session, tool, skills) |
| `packages/a2a-server` | `@google/gemini-cli-a2a-server` | Agent-to-Agent HTTP Server |
| `packages/devtools` | `@google/gemini-cli-devtools` | Network/Console Inspector |
| `packages/vscode-ide-companion` | `gemini-cli-vscode-ide-companion` | VS Code Extension — IDE Context Injection |
| `packages/test-utils` | `@google/gemini-cli-test-utils` | test utility |

File size:

| area | Number of non-test source files |
| --- | ---: |
| All core packages | 379 |
| All cli packages | 510 |
| TUI component (`cli/src/ui/`) | 371 |
| tools (`core/src/tools/`) | ~40 (80 including tests) |
| settings (`core/src/config/`) | ~12 (25 including tests) |

Overview §2

DEV

000_overview/00_ge_overview.md

Overview

Overview §2 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • Gemini CLI의 TUI는 React + Ink 위에 구축되었다. 371개 비테스트 파일로 구성된 대규모 React 컴포넌트 트리다.
  • // packages/cli/src/ui/App.tsx
  • export const App = () => {
  • const uiState = useUIState();
  • const isAlternateBuffer = useAlternateBuffer();
  • const isScreenReaderEnabled = useIsScreenReaderEnabled();
  • if (uiState.quittingMessages) {
  • if (isAlternateBuffer) {
  • return ;
  • } else {
  • return ;
  • }

Topics covered

    1. TUI 설계 — React/Ink 기반 터미널 UI
    1. TUI 설계 — React/Ink 기반 터미널 UI
  • 진입점과 앱 구조
  • 주요 Context Provider (14개)
  • 레이아웃 및 접근성
  • 주요 UI 영역

Source code snippets

README / docs

// packages/cli/src/ui/App.tsx
export const App = () => {
  const uiState = useUIState();
  const isAlternateBuffer = useAlternateBuffer();
  const isScreenReaderEnabled = useIsScreenReaderEnabled();

  if (uiState.quittingMessages) {
    if (isAlternateBuffer) {
      return <AlternateBufferQuittingDisplay />;
    } else {
      return <QuittingDisplay />;
    }
  }

  return (
    <StreamingContext.Provider value={uiState.streamingState}>
      {isScreenReaderEnabled ? <ScreenReaderAppLayout /> : <DefaultAppLayout />}
    </StreamingContext.Provider>
  );
};

README / docs

ui/
├── components/       # 재사용 가능 UI 컴포넌트
├── contexts/         # 14개 React Context
├── hooks/            # 커스텀 훅 (useAlternateBuffer 등)
├── layouts/          # 앱 레이아웃 2종
├── state/            # 상태 관리
├── themes/           # 테마 시스템
├── auth/             # 인증 대화상자
├── privacy/          # 개인정보 고지
├── editors/          # 에디터 설정
├── commands/         # 슬래시 커맨드 UI
├── key/              # 키 바인딩
├── utils/            # 유틸리티 (마크다운 렌더링, 하이라이팅 등)
├── noninteractive/   # 비대화형 모드 UI
└── constants/        # 팁, 문구

Main analysis

2. TUI design — React/Ink based terminal UI

2. TUI design — React/Ink based terminal UI

Gemini CLI's TUI is built on top of React + Ink. This is a large React component tree consisting of 371 non-test files.

Entry points and app structure

// packages/cli/src/ui/App.tsx
export const App = () => {
  const uiState = useUIState();
  const isAlternateBuffer = useAlternateBuffer();
  const isScreenReaderEnabled = useIsScreenReaderEnabled();

  if (uiState.quittingMessages) {
    if (isAlternateBuffer) {
      return <AlternateBufferQuittingDisplay />;
    } else {
      return <QuittingDisplay />;
    }
  }

  return (
    <StreamingContext.Provider value={uiState.streamingState}>
      {isScreenReaderEnabled ? <ScreenReaderAppLayout /> : <DefaultAppLayout />}
    </StreamingContext.Provider>
  );
};

Major Context Providers (14)

Context Role
SessionContext Session State Management
ConfigContext Settings Access
StreamingContext Streaming Status
UIStateContext UI global state
UIActionsContext UI action dispatch
ToolActionsContext Tool Confirm/Reject Action
AskUserActionsContext User Questions Answered
TerminalContext Terminal Size/Features
MouseContext mouse event
ShellFocusContext shell focus state
VimModeContext Switch Vim modes
KeypressContext Keystroke processing
OverflowContext overflow scroll
SettingsContext Runtime Settings

Layout and Accessibility

  • DefaultAppLayout: standard terminal layout
  • ScreenReaderAppLayout: Screen reader compatible layout
  • AlternateBufferQuittingDisplay: Alternate buffer quitting screen

Main UI areas

ui/
├── components/       # 재사용 가능 UI 컴포넌트
├── contexts/         # 14개 React Context
├── hooks/            # 커스텀 훅 (useAlternateBuffer 등)
├── layouts/          # 앱 레이아웃 2종
├── state/            # 상태 관리
├── themes/           # 테마 시스템
├── auth/             # 인증 대화상자
├── privacy/          # 개인정보 고지
├── editors/          # 에디터 설정
├── commands/         # 슬래시 커맨드 UI
├── key/              # 키 바인딩
├── utils/            # 유틸리티 (마크다운 렌더링, 하이라이팅 등)
├── noninteractive/   # 비대화형 모드 UI
└── constants/        # 팁, 문구

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_ge_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

2. TUI 설계 — React/Ink 기반 터미널 UI

2. TUI 설계 — React/Ink 기반 터미널 UI

Gemini CLI의 TUI는 React + Ink 위에 구축되었다. 371개 비테스트 파일로 구성된 대규모 React 컴포넌트 트리다.

진입점과 앱 구조

// packages/cli/src/ui/App.tsx
export const App = () => {
  const uiState = useUIState();
  const isAlternateBuffer = useAlternateBuffer();
  const isScreenReaderEnabled = useIsScreenReaderEnabled();

  if (uiState.quittingMessages) {
    if (isAlternateBuffer) {
      return <AlternateBufferQuittingDisplay />;
    } else {
      return <QuittingDisplay />;
    }
  }

  return (
    <StreamingContext.Provider value={uiState.streamingState}>
      {isScreenReaderEnabled ? <ScreenReaderAppLayout /> : <DefaultAppLayout />}
    </StreamingContext.Provider>
  );
};

주요 Context Provider (14개)

Context 역할
SessionContext 세션 상태 관리
ConfigContext 설정 접근
StreamingContext 스트리밍 상태
UIStateContext UI 전역 상태
UIActionsContext UI 액션 디스패치
ToolActionsContext 도구 확인/거부 액션
AskUserActionsContext 사용자 질문 응답
TerminalContext 터미널 크기/기능
MouseContext 마우스 이벤트
ShellFocusContext 셸 포커스 상태
VimModeContext Vim 모드 전환
KeypressContext 키 입력 처리
OverflowContext 오버플로 스크롤
SettingsContext 런타임 설정

레이아웃 및 접근성

  • DefaultAppLayout: 표준 터미널 레이아웃
  • ScreenReaderAppLayout: 스크린 리더 호환 레이아웃
  • AlternateBufferQuittingDisplay: 대체 버퍼 종료 화면

주요 UI 영역

ui/
├── components/       # 재사용 가능 UI 컴포넌트
├── contexts/         # 14개 React Context
├── hooks/            # 커스텀 훅 (useAlternateBuffer 등)
├── layouts/          # 앱 레이아웃 2종
├── state/            # 상태 관리
├── themes/           # 테마 시스템
├── auth/             # 인증 대화상자
├── privacy/          # 개인정보 고지
├── editors/          # 에디터 설정
├── commands/         # 슬래시 커맨드 UI
├── key/              # 키 바인딩
├── utils/            # 유틸리티 (마크다운 렌더링, 하이라이팅 등)
├── noninteractive/   # 비대화형 모드 UI
└── constants/        # 팁, 문구

    1. Agent Loop — client.ts + turn.ts

Source code snippets

README / docs

// packages/core/src/core/client.ts
async *sendMessageStream(
  request: PartListUnion,
  signal: AbortSignal,
  prompt_id: string,
  turns: number = MAX_TURNS,    // MAX_TURNS = 100
  isInvalidStreamRetry: boolean = false,
  displayContent?: PartListUnion,
  stopHookActive: boolean = false,
): AsyncGenerator<ServerGeminiStreamEvent, Turn>

README / docs

// packages/core/src/core/turn.ts
export class Turn {
  private callCounter = 0;
  readonly pendingToolCalls: ToolCallRequestInfo[] = [];

  async *run(
    modelConfigKey: ModelConfigKey,
    req: PartListUnion,
    signal: AbortSignal,
    displayContent?: PartListUnion,
  ): AsyncGenerator<ServerGeminiStreamEvent> {
    // GeminiChat.sendMessageStream() 호출
    // 스트리밍 응답 파싱
    // Content, Thought, ToolCallRequest, Finished 이벤트 생성
  }

  private handlePendingFunctionCall(fnCall: FunctionCall): ServerGeminiStreamEvent | null {
    const toolCallRequest: ToolCallRequestInfo = {
      callId: fnCall.id ?? `${name}_${Date.now()}_${this.callCounter++}`,
      name: fnCall.name || 'undefined_tool_name',
      args: fnCall.args || {},
      isClientInitiated: false,
      prompt_id: this.prompt_id,
    };
    this.pendingToolCalls.push(toolCallRequest);
    return { type: GeminiEventType.ToolCallRequest, value: toolCallRequest };
  }
}

README / docs

// packages/core/src/core/turn.ts
export enum GeminiEventType {
  Content = 'content',
  ToolCallRequest = 'tool_call_request',
  ToolCallResponse = 'tool_call_response',
  ToolCallConfirmation = 'tool_call_confirmation',
  Thought = 'thought',
  Finished = 'finished',
  LoopDetected = 'loop_detected',
  Error = 'error',
  // ... 10개 이상의 이벤트 타입
}

README / docs

// packages/core/src/core/geminiChat.ts
const MID_STREAM_RETRY_OPTIONS = {
  maxAttempts: 4,             // 초기 1회 + 재시도 3회
  initialDelayMs: 1000,
  useExponentialBackoff: true,
};

Main analysis

3. Agent loop — client.ts + turn.ts

3. Agent loop — client.ts + turn.ts

GeminiClient (client.ts, line 1267)

Multi-turn orchestrator. Core methods:

// packages/core/src/core/client.ts
async *sendMessageStream(
  request: PartListUnion,
  signal: AbortSignal,
  prompt_id: string,
  turns: number = MAX_TURNS,    // MAX_TURNS = 100
  isInvalidStreamRetry: boolean = false,
  displayContent?: PartListUnion,
  stopHookActive: boolean = false,
): AsyncGenerator<ServerGeminiStreamEvent, Turn>

The processTurn() method (lines 584-865) processes one turn:

  1. Compression Check — Compress history with ChatCompressionService when context window limit is approached.
  2. Context Window Validation — Verify that the request meets token limits
  3. IDE Context Injection — Editor state injection in the VS Code companion
  4. Loop Detection — Prevent infinite loops with LoopDetectionService
  5. Model Routing — Select appropriate model with ModelRouter
  6. Turn Run — API call and event creation with Turn.run()
  7. AfterAgent Hook — Policy can block/stop execution

Turn (turn.ts, line 447)

Single model response processing:

// packages/core/src/core/turn.ts
export class Turn {
  private callCounter = 0;
  readonly pendingToolCalls: ToolCallRequestInfo[] = [];

  async *run(
    modelConfigKey: ModelConfigKey,
    req: PartListUnion,
    signal: AbortSignal,
    displayContent?: PartListUnion,
  ): AsyncGenerator<ServerGeminiStreamEvent> {
    // GeminiChat.sendMessageStream() 호출
    // 스트리밍 응답 파싱
    // Content, Thought, ToolCallRequest, Finished 이벤트 생성
  }

  private handlePendingFunctionCall(fnCall: FunctionCall): ServerGeminiStreamEvent | null {
    const toolCallRequest: ToolCallRequestInfo = {
      callId: fnCall.id ?? `${name}_${Date.now()}_${this.callCounter++}`,
      name: fnCall.name || 'undefined_tool_name',
      args: fnCall.args || {},
      isClientInitiated: false,
      prompt_id: this.prompt_id,
    };
    this.pendingToolCalls.push(toolCallRequest);
    return { type: GeminiEventType.ToolCallRequest, value: toolCallRequest };
  }
}

Event type

  Content = 'content',
  ToolCallRequest = 'tool_call_request',
  ToolCallResponse = 'tool_call_response',
  ToolCallConfirmation = 'tool_call_confirmation',
  Thought = 'thought',
  Finished = 'finished',
  LoopDetected = 'loop_detected',

  // ... 10개 이상의 이벤트 타입
}

GeminiChat (geminiChat.ts, 456 lines)

Streaming API client wrapping the @google/genai library:

// packages/core/src/core/geminiChat.ts
const MID_STREAM_RETRY_OPTIONS = {
  maxAttempts: 4,             // 초기 1회 + 재시도 3회
  initialDelayMs: 1000,
  useExponentialBackoff: true,
};

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_ge_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

3. 에이전트 루프 — client.ts + turn.ts

3. 에이전트 루프 — client.ts + turn.ts

GeminiClient (client.ts, 1267줄)

다중 턴 오케스트레이터. 핵심 메서드:

// packages/core/src/core/client.ts
async *sendMessageStream(
  request: PartListUnion,
  signal: AbortSignal,
  prompt_id: string,
  turns: number = MAX_TURNS,    // MAX_TURNS = 100
  isInvalidStreamRetry: boolean = false,
  displayContent?: PartListUnion,
  stopHookActive: boolean = false,
): AsyncGenerator<ServerGeminiStreamEvent, Turn>

processTurn() 메서드(584~865줄)가 한 턴을 처리한다:

  1. 압축 검사 — 컨텍스트 윈도우 한계 근접 시 ChatCompressionService로 히스토리 압축
  2. 컨텍스트 윈도우 검증 — 요청이 토큰 한도에 맞는지 확인
  3. IDE 컨텍스트 주입 — VS Code companion에서 에디터 상태 주입
  4. 루프 탐지 — LoopDetectionService로 무한 루프 방지
  5. 모델 라우팅 — ModelRouter로 적절한 모델 선택
  6. 턴 실행 — Turn.run()으로 API 호출과 이벤트 생성
  7. AfterAgent 훅 — 정책이 실행을 차단/중지할 수 있음

Turn (turn.ts, 447줄)

단일 모델 응답 처리:

// packages/core/src/core/turn.ts
export class Turn {
  private callCounter = 0;
  readonly pendingToolCalls: ToolCallRequestInfo[] = [];

  async *run(
    modelConfigKey: ModelConfigKey,
    req: PartListUnion,
    signal: AbortSignal,
    displayContent?: PartListUnion,
  ): AsyncGenerator<ServerGeminiStreamEvent> {
    // GeminiChat.sendMessageStream() 호출
    // 스트리밍 응답 파싱
    // Content, Thought, ToolCallRequest, Finished 이벤트 생성
  }

  private handlePendingFunctionCall(fnCall: FunctionCall): ServerGeminiStreamEvent | null {
    const toolCallRequest: ToolCallRequestInfo = {
      callId: fnCall.id ?? `${name}_${Date.now()}_${this.callCounter++}`,
      name: fnCall.name || 'undefined_tool_name',
      args: fnCall.args || {},
      isClientInitiated: false,
      prompt_id: this.prompt_id,
    };
    this.pendingToolCalls.push(toolCallRequest);
    return { type: GeminiEventType.ToolCallRequest, value: toolCallRequest };
  }
}

이벤트 타입

  Content = 'content',
  ToolCallRequest = 'tool_call_request',
  ToolCallResponse = 'tool_call_response',
  ToolCallConfirmation = 'tool_call_confirmation',
  Thought = 'thought',
  Finished = 'finished',
  LoopDetected = 'loop_detected',
  Error = 'error',
  // ... 10개 이상의 이벤트 타입
}

GeminiChat (geminiChat.ts, 456줄)

// packages/core/src/core/geminiChat.ts
const MID_STREAM_RETRY_OPTIONS = {
  maxAttempts: 4,             // 초기 1회 + 재시도 3회
  initialDelayMs: 1000,
  useExponentialBackoff: true,
};

Overview

Overview §4 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • // packages/core/src/tools/tools.ts (1131줄)

  • enum Kind { Read, Edit, Execute, Search, Fetch, Plan, Other }
  • interface ToolInvocation<TParams, TResult> {
  • params: TParams;
  • getDescription(): string;
  • shouldConfirmExecute(signal, forcedDecision?): Promise<ToolCallConfirmationDetails | false>;
  • execute(signal, updateOutput?, options?): Promise;
  • getPolicyUpdateOptions?(outcome): PolicyUpdateOptions | undefined;
  • }

  • name: string;

Topics covered

    1. Tool Runtime — ToolRegistry + Scheduler + ToolExecutor
    1. Tool Runtime — ToolRegistry + Scheduler + ToolExecutor
  • Tool 타입 계층
  • 내장 Tool 목록
  • ToolRegistry (tool-registry.ts)
  • Scheduler (scheduler.ts, 929줄)

Source code snippets

README / docs

// packages/core/src/tools/tools.ts (1131줄)

// Kind 열거형 — 도구 범주
enum Kind { Read, Edit, Execute, Search, Fetch, Plan, Other }

// 도구 호출 인터페이스
interface ToolInvocation<TParams, TResult> {
  params: TParams;
  getDescription(): string;
  shouldConfirmExecute(signal, forcedDecision?): Promise<ToolCallConfirmationDetails | false>;
  execute(signal, updateOutput?, options?): Promise<TResult>;
  getPolicyUpdateOptions?(outcome): PolicyUpdateOptions | undefined;
}

// 도구 빌더 인터페이스
interface ToolBuilder<TParams, TResult> {
  name: string;
  displayName: string;
  description: string;
  kind: Kind;
  getSchema(modelId?): FunctionDeclaration;
  build(params: TParams): ToolInvocation<TParams, TResult>;
}

// 추상 기반 클래스
abstract class BaseDeclarativeTool<TParams, TResult> {
  abstract createInvocation(params, messageBus, toolName?, displayName?): ToolInvocation;
  build(params): ToolInvocation { /* 검증 + createInvocation */ }
}

README / docs

// packages/core/src/tools/tool-registry.ts
export class ToolRegistry {
  private allKnownTools: Map<string, AnyDeclarativeTool> = new Map();

  registerTool(tool: AnyDeclarativeTool): void;
  unregisterTool(name: string): void;
  getTool(name: string): AnyDeclarativeTool | undefined;
  getActiveTools(): AnyDeclarativeTool[];   // 설정으로 제외된 도구 필터링
  buildToolInvocation(toolName: string, params: unknown): AnyToolInvocation;

  async discoverAllTools(): Promise<void>;  // 외부 도구 탐색
  removeMcpToolsByServer(serverName: string): void;
  sortTools(): void;  // 우선순위: Built-in(0) → Discovered(1) → MCP(2)
}

README / docs

// packages/core/src/scheduler/scheduler.ts
export class Scheduler {
  async schedule(
    request: ToolCallRequestInfo | ToolCallRequestInfo[],
    signal: AbortSignal,
  ): Promise<CompletedToolCall[]> {
    // 큐가 비어있으면 즉시 실행, 아니면 큐잉
    if (this.isProcessing || this.state.isActive) {
      return this._enqueueRequest(requests, signal);
    } else {
      return this._startBatch(requests, signal);
    }
  }
}

README / docs

모델 응답 → ToolCallRequest 수집
  → Scheduler.schedule()
    → PolicyEngine.check() — ALLOW/DENY/ASK_USER
    → BeforeTool 훅 실행
    → ToolExecutor.execute()
      → tool.build(params) → invocation.execute(signal)
    → AfterTool 훅 실행
    → CompletedToolCall (functionResponse 파트로 변환)
  → 도구 결과를 다음 사용자 메시지로 전달
  → 루프 계속

Main analysis

4. Tool runtime — ToolRegistry + Scheduler + ToolExecutor

4. Tool runtime — ToolRegistry + Scheduler + ToolExecutor

Tool type hierarchy

// packages/core/src/tools/tools.ts (1131줄)

// Kind 열거형 — 도구 범주
enum Kind { Read, Edit, Execute, Search, Fetch, Plan, Other }

// 도구 호출 인터페이스
interface ToolInvocation<TParams, TResult> {
  params: TParams;
  getDescription(): string;
  shouldConfirmExecute(signal, forcedDecision?): Promise<ToolCallConfirmationDetails | false>;
  execute(signal, updateOutput?, options?): Promise<TResult>;
  getPolicyUpdateOptions?(outcome): PolicyUpdateOptions | undefined;
}

// 도구 빌더 인터페이스
interface ToolBuilder<TParams, TResult> {
  name: string;
  displayName: string;
  description: string;
  kind: Kind;
  getSchema(modelId?): FunctionDeclaration;
  build(params: TParams): ToolInvocation<TParams, TResult>;
}

// 추상 기반 클래스
abstract class BaseDeclarativeTool<TParams, TResult> {
  abstract createInvocation(params, messageBus, toolName?, displayName?): ToolInvocation;
  build(params): ToolInvocation { /* 검증 + createInvocation */ }
}

List of built-in tools

tools file Kind Description
shell shell.ts Execute Execute shell command (enforce sandbox)
read_file read-file.ts Read Read file (JIT context navigation)
write_file write-file.ts Edit write file
edit edit.ts Edit Edit file (diff based)
grep grep.ts Search Pattern search (git-grep/system grep)
ripGrep ripGrep.ts Search ripgrep based search
glob glob.ts Search File pattern matching
ls ls.ts Search Directory Listing
web_search web-search.ts Fetch Web Search (Google Search)
web_fetch web-fetch.ts Fetch HTTP request
ask_user ask-user.ts Other Request user input
activate_skill activate-skill.ts Other Skill activation
memory memoryTool.ts Other Memory Management
enter_plan_mode enter-plan-mode.ts Plan Enter planning mode
exit_plan_mode exit-plan-mode.ts Plan Exit planning mode
tracker_* (6 types) trackerTools.ts Other Task Tracking

ToolRegistry (tool-registry.ts)

// packages/core/src/tools/tool-registry.ts
export class ToolRegistry {
  private allKnownTools: Map<string, AnyDeclarativeTool> = new Map();

  registerTool(tool: AnyDeclarativeTool): void;
  unregisterTool(name: string): void;
  getTool(name: string): AnyDeclarativeTool | undefined;
  getActiveTools(): AnyDeclarativeTool[];   // 설정으로 제외된 도구 필터링
  buildToolInvocation(toolName: string, params: unknown): AnyToolInvocation;

  async discoverAllTools(): Promise<void>;  // 외부 도구 탐색
  removeMcpToolsByServer(serverName: string): void;
  sortTools(): void;  // 우선순위: Built-in(0) → Discovered(1) → MCP(2)
}

Scheduler (scheduler.ts, line 929)

Batch tool execution orchestrator:

// packages/core/src/scheduler/scheduler.ts
export class Scheduler {
  async schedule(
    request: ToolCallRequestInfo | ToolCallRequestInfo[],
    signal: AbortSignal,
  ): Promise<CompletedToolCall[]> {
    // 큐가 비어있으면 즉시 실행, 아니면 큐잉
    if (this.isProcessing || this.state.isActive) {
      return this._enqueueRequest(requests, signal);
    } else {
      return this._startBatch(requests, signal);
    }
  }
}

Execution pipeline:

모델 응답 → ToolCallRequest 수집
  → Scheduler.schedule()
    → PolicyEngine.check() — ALLOW/DENY/ASK_USER
    → BeforeTool 훅 실행
    → ToolExecutor.execute()
      → tool.build(params) → invocation.execute(signal)
    → AfterTool 훅 실행
    → CompletedToolCall (functionResponse 파트로 변환)
  → 도구 결과를 다음 사용자 메시지로 전달
  → 루프 계속

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_ge_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

4. 도구 런타임 — ToolRegistry + Scheduler + ToolExecutor

4. 도구 런타임 — ToolRegistry + Scheduler + ToolExecutor

도구 타입 계층

// packages/core/src/tools/tools.ts (1131줄)

// Kind 열거형 — 도구 범주
enum Kind { Read, Edit, Execute, Search, Fetch, Plan, Other }

// 도구 호출 인터페이스
interface ToolInvocation<TParams, TResult> {
  params: TParams;
  getDescription(): string;
  shouldConfirmExecute(signal, forcedDecision?): Promise<ToolCallConfirmationDetails | false>;
  execute(signal, updateOutput?, options?): Promise<TResult>;
  getPolicyUpdateOptions?(outcome): PolicyUpdateOptions | undefined;
}

// 도구 빌더 인터페이스
interface ToolBuilder<TParams, TResult> {
  name: string;
  displayName: string;
  description: string;
  kind: Kind;
  getSchema(modelId?): FunctionDeclaration;
  build(params: TParams): ToolInvocation<TParams, TResult>;
}

// 추상 기반 클래스
abstract class BaseDeclarativeTool<TParams, TResult> {
  abstract createInvocation(params, messageBus, toolName?, displayName?): ToolInvocation;
  build(params): ToolInvocation { /* 검증 + createInvocation */ }
}

내장 도구 목록

도구 파일 Kind 설명
shell shell.ts Execute 셸 명령 실행 (샌드박스 적용)
read_file read-file.ts Read 파일 읽기 (JIT 컨텍스트 탐색)
write_file write-file.ts Edit 파일 쓰기
edit edit.ts Edit 파일 편집 (diff 기반)
grep grep.ts Search 패턴 검색 (git-grep/system grep)
ripGrep ripGrep.ts Search ripgrep 기반 검색
glob glob.ts Search 파일 패턴 매칭
ls ls.ts Search 디렉토리 목록
web_search web-search.ts Fetch 웹 검색 (Google Search)
web_fetch web-fetch.ts Fetch HTTP 요청
ask_user ask-user.ts Other 사용자 입력 요청
activate_skill activate-skill.ts Other 스킬 활성화
memory memoryTool.ts Other 메모리 관리
enter_plan_mode enter-plan-mode.ts Plan 계획 모드 진입
exit_plan_mode exit-plan-mode.ts Plan 계획 모드 종료
tracker_* (6종) trackerTools.ts Other 태스크 추적

ToolRegistry (tool-registry.ts)

// packages/core/src/tools/tool-registry.ts
export class ToolRegistry {
  private allKnownTools: Map<string, AnyDeclarativeTool> = new Map();

  registerTool(tool: AnyDeclarativeTool): void;
  unregisterTool(name: string): void;
  getTool(name: string): AnyDeclarativeTool | undefined;
  getActiveTools(): AnyDeclarativeTool[];   // 설정으로 제외된 도구 필터링
  buildToolInvocation(toolName: string, params: unknown): AnyToolInvocation;

  async discoverAllTools(): Promise<void>;  // 외부 도구 탐색
  removeMcpToolsByServer(serverName: string): void;
  sortTools(): void;  // 우선순위: Built-in(0) → Discovered(1) → MCP(2)
}

Scheduler (scheduler.ts, 929줄)

배치 도구 실행 오케스트레이터:

// packages/core/src/scheduler/scheduler.ts
export class Scheduler {
  async schedule(
    request: ToolCallRequestInfo | ToolCallRequestInfo[],
    signal: AbortSignal,
  ): Promise<CompletedToolCall[]> {
    // 큐가 비어있으면 즉시 실행, 아니면 큐잉
    if (this.isProcessing || this.state.isActive) {
      return this._enqueueRequest(requests, signal);
    } else {
      return this._startBatch(requests, signal);
    }
  }
}

실행 파이프라인:

모델 응답 → ToolCallRequest 수집
  → Scheduler.schedule()
    → PolicyEngine.check() — ALLOW/DENY/ASK_USER
    → BeforeTool 훅 실행
    → ToolExecutor.execute()
      → tool.build(params) → invocation.execute(signal)
    → AfterTool 훅 실행
    → CompletedToolCall (functionResponse 파트로 변환)
  → 도구 결과를 다음 사용자 메시지로 전달
  → 루프 계속
11

// packages/core/src/prompts/snippets.ts
export interface SystemPromptOptions {
  preamble?: PreambleOptions;
  coreMandates?: CoreMandatesOptions;
  subAgents?: SubAgentOptions[];
  agentSkills?: AgentSkillOptions[];
  hookContext?: boolean;

  interactiveYoloMode?: boolean;
  gitRepo?: GitRepoOptions;
}

Legacy prompt support

snippets.legacy.ts maintains separate prompts for older models (prior to gemini-2.0). PromptProvider selects snippets vs legacySnippets depending on the model version.

레거시 프롬프트 지원

snippets.legacy.ts가 구형 모델(gemini-2.0 이전)용 프롬프트를 별도 유지한다. PromptProvider는 모델 버전에 따라 snippets vs legacySnippets를 선택한다.

Built-in skills

packages/core/src/skills/builtin/skill-creator/ — Skill creation helper:

  • SKILL.md: Skill definition
  • scripts/init_skill.cjs: Skill initialization
  • scripts/validate_skill.cjs: Skill validation
  • scripts/package_skill.cjs: Skill packaging

Skill Activation Tool

Activate a skill at runtime with the activate-skill tool. The body of the activated skill is injected into the system prompt.

// packages/core/src/skills/skillManager.ts
export class SkillManager {
  private skills: SkillDefinition[] = [];
  private activeSkillNames: Set<string> = new Set();

  async discoverSkills(storage, extensions, isTrusted): Promise<void> {
    // 우선순위 (낮은 것부터):

내장 스킬

packages/core/src/skills/builtin/skill-creator/ — 스킬 생성 도우미:

  • SKILL.md: 스킬 정의
  • scripts/init_skill.cjs: 스킬 초기화
  • scripts/validate_skill.cjs: 스킬 검증
  • scripts/package_skill.cjs: 스킬 패키징

스킬 활성화 도구

activate-skill 도구로 런타임에 스킬을 활성화한다. 활성화된 스킬의 body가 시스템 프롬프트에 주입된다.

Overview

Overview §7 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • McpClientManager (mcp-client-manager.ts)
  • ├── McpClient (mcp-client.ts) × N
  • │ ├── stdio 또는 SSE 전송
  • │ └── discover() → tools, prompts, resources
  • └── DiscoveredMCPTool (mcp-tool.ts) × M
  • ├── mcp_ 접두사로 ToolRegistry에 등록
  • └── execute() → McpClient.callTool()
  • // packages/core/src/tools/mcp-tool.ts
  • export const MCP_TOOL_PREFIX = 'mcp_';
  • // 예: "mcp_google_workspace_list_emails"
  • // → serverName="google_workspace", toolName="list_emails"
  • // packages/core/src/config/config.ts

Topics covered

    1. MCP Integration — McpClientManager + McpClient + DiscoveredMCPTool
    1. MCP Integration — McpClientManager + McpClient + DiscoveredMCPTool

  • MCP Tool 이름 규칙
  • MCP 서버 Configuration
  • MCP Tool 호출 흐름

// 예: "mcp_google_workspace_list_emails"

README / docs

// packages/core/src/config/config.ts
export interface MCPServerConfig {
  command?: string;
  args?: string[];
  env?: Record<string, string>;
  stdio?: 'pipe' | 'inherit';
  includeTools?: string[];    // 허용 목록
  excludeTools?: string[];    // 차단 목록
  trust?: boolean;            // 자동 승인 여부
  extension?: GeminiCLIExtension;
}

Main analysis

7. MCP Integration — McpClientManager + McpClient + DiscoveredMCPTool

7. MCP Integration — McpClientManager + McpClient + DiscoveredMCPTool

Architecture

McpClientManager (mcp-client-manager.ts)
  ├── McpClient (mcp-client.ts) × N
  │   ├── stdio 또는 SSE 전송
  │   └── discover() → tools, prompts, resources
  └── DiscoveredMCPTool (mcp-tool.ts) × M
      ├── mcp_ 접두사로 ToolRegistry에 등록
      └── execute() → McpClient.callTool()

MCP Tool Name Convention

// packages/core/src/tools/mcp-tool.ts
export const MCP_TOOL_PREFIX = 'mcp_';
// 예: "mcp_google_workspace_list_emails"
// → serverName="google_workspace", toolName="list_emails"

MCP server settings

// packages/core/src/config/config.ts
export interface MCPServerConfig {
  command?: string;
  args?: string[];
  env?: Record<string, string>;
  stdio?: 'pipe' | 'inherit';
  includeTools?: string[];    // 허용 목록
  excludeTools?: string[];    // 차단 목록
  trust?: boolean;            // 자동 승인 여부
  extension?: GeminiCLIExtension;
}

MCP tool call flow

  1. ToolRegistry.buildToolInvocation("mcp_server_tool", args)
  2. DiscoveredMCPTool.build(args) → DiscoveredMCPToolInvocation
  3. shouldConfirmExecute() → Check trust/allowlist → Confirm UI if necessary
  4. execute(signal) → mcpTool.callTool() → MCP response → GenAI Parts conversion

Prompt and Resource Registry

In addition to tools, the MCP server can also provide prompts (PromptRegistry) and resources (ResourceRegistry).

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_ge_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

7. MCP 통합 — McpClientManager + McpClient + DiscoveredMCPTool

7. MCP 통합 — McpClientManager + McpClient + DiscoveredMCPTool

아키텍처

McpClientManager (mcp-client-manager.ts)
  ├── McpClient (mcp-client.ts) × N
  │   ├── stdio 또는 SSE 전송
  │   └── discover() → tools, prompts, resources
  └── DiscoveredMCPTool (mcp-tool.ts) × M
      ├── mcp_ 접두사로 ToolRegistry에 등록
      └── execute() → McpClient.callTool()

MCP 도구 이름 규칙

// packages/core/src/tools/mcp-tool.ts
export const MCP_TOOL_PREFIX = 'mcp_';
// 예: "mcp_google_workspace_list_emails"
// → serverName="google_workspace", toolName="list_emails"

MCP 서버 설정

// packages/core/src/config/config.ts
export interface MCPServerConfig {
  command?: string;
  args?: string[];
  env?: Record<string, string>;
  stdio?: 'pipe' | 'inherit';
  includeTools?: string[];    // 허용 목록
  excludeTools?: string[];    // 차단 목록
  trust?: boolean;            // 자동 승인 여부
  extension?: GeminiCLIExtension;
}

MCP 도구 호출 흐름

  1. ToolRegistry.buildToolInvocation("mcp_server_tool", args)
  2. DiscoveredMCPTool.build(args) → DiscoveredMCPToolInvocation
  3. shouldConfirmExecute() → trust/allowlist 확인 → 필요시 확인 UI
  4. execute(signal) → mcpTool.callTool() → MCP 응답 → GenAI Parts 변환

프롬프트 및 리소스 레지스트리

MCP 서버는 도구 외에 프롬프트(PromptRegistry)와 리소스(ResourceRegistry)도 제공할 수 있다.

14

Source code snippets

README / docs

// packages/core/src/policy/types.ts
export enum PolicyDecision {
  ALLOW = 'allow',
  DENY = 'deny',
  ASK_USER = 'ask_user',
}

export enum ApprovalMode {
  DEFAULT = 'default',     // 기본 — 위험 도구는 확인 필요
  AUTO_EDIT = 'autoEdit',  // 편집 자동 승인
  YOLO = 'yolo',           // 모든 도구 자동 승인
  PLAN = 'plan',           // 읽기 전용 + 계획 미리보기
}

README / docs

// packages/core/src/safety/protocol.ts
export interface SafetyCheckInput {
  protocolVersion: '1.0.0';
  toolCall: FunctionCall;
  context: {
    // 대화 기록, 모델 텍스트, 이전 도구 호출 등
  };
}

README / docs

// Scheduler에서 호출
const checkResult = await policyEngine.check(
  functionCall,       // { name: 'grep', args: {...} }
  serverName,         // MCP 서버 이름 (내장은 undefined)
  stringifiedArgs,
  toolAnnotations,    // { readOnlyHint: true }
  subagent,
);
// → PolicyDecision.ALLOW | DENY | ASK_USER

Main analysis

8. Policy/Guardian — PolicyEngine + Safety Check

8. Policy/Guardian — PolicyEngine + Safety Check

PolicyEngine

TOML-based policy rule system:

// packages/core/src/policy/types.ts
export enum PolicyDecision {
  ALLOW = 'allow',
  DENY = 'deny',
  ASK_USER = 'ask_user',
}

export enum ApprovalMode {
  DEFAULT = 'default',     // 기본 — 위험 도구는 확인 필요
  AUTO_EDIT = 'autoEdit',  // 편집 자동 승인
  YOLO = 'yolo',           // 모든 도구 자동 승인
  PLAN = 'plan',           // 읽기 전용 + 계획 미리보기
}

Policy file (TOML)

file Role
read-only.toml READING TOOLS ALLOW
write.toml Writing Tools — Differences by Mode
plan.toml Plan mode restrictions
yolo.toml YOLO mode — ALL TOOLS ALLOW (priority=998)
sandbox-default.toml Sandbox Defaults
discovered.toml External Discovery Tools
tracker.toml Task Tracking Tool

Safety Inspection Protocol

// packages/core/src/safety/protocol.ts
export interface SafetyCheckInput {
  protocolVersion: '1.0.0';
  toolCall: FunctionCall;
  context: {
    // 대화 기록, 모델 텍스트, 이전 도구 호출 등
  };
}

Conseca system (core/src/safety/conseca/):

  • policy-generator.ts: Automatically generate policies
  • policy-enforcer.ts: Policy enforcement
  • External checker protocol support (ExternalCheckerConfig)

Policy inspection flow

// Scheduler에서 호출
const checkResult = await policyEngine.check(
  functionCall,       // { name: 'grep', args: {...} }
  serverName,         // MCP 서버 이름 (내장은 undefined)
  stringifiedArgs,
  toolAnnotations,    // { readOnlyHint: true }
  subagent,
);
// → PolicyDecision.ALLOW | DENY | ASK_USER

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_ge_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

8. 정책/가디언 — PolicyEngine + 안전 검사

8. 정책/가디언 — PolicyEngine + 안전 검사

PolicyEngine

TOML 기반 정책 규칙 시스템:

// packages/core/src/policy/types.ts
export enum PolicyDecision {
  ALLOW = 'allow',
  DENY = 'deny',
  ASK_USER = 'ask_user',
}

export enum ApprovalMode {
  DEFAULT = 'default',     // 기본 — 위험 도구는 확인 필요
  AUTO_EDIT = 'autoEdit',  // 편집 자동 승인
  YOLO = 'yolo',           // 모든 도구 자동 승인
  PLAN = 'plan',           // 읽기 전용 + 계획 미리보기
}

정책 파일 (TOML)

파일 역할
read-only.toml 읽기 도구 ALLOW
write.toml 쓰기 도구 — 모드별 차등
plan.toml Plan 모드 제한
yolo.toml YOLO 모드 — 모든 도구 ALLOW (priority=998)
sandbox-default.toml 샌드박스 기본값
discovered.toml 외부 발견 도구
tracker.toml 태스크 추적 도구

안전 검사 프로토콜

// packages/core/src/safety/protocol.ts
export interface SafetyCheckInput {
  protocolVersion: '1.0.0';
  toolCall: FunctionCall;
  context: {
    // 대화 기록, 모델 텍스트, 이전 도구 호출 등
  };
}

Conseca 시스템 (core/src/safety/conseca/):

  • policy-generator.ts: 정책 자동 생성
  • policy-enforcer.ts: 정책 적용
  • 외부 체커 프로토콜 지원 (ExternalCheckerConfig)

정책 검사 흐름

// Scheduler에서 호출
const checkResult = await policyEngine.check(
  functionCall,       // { name: 'grep', args: {...} }
  serverName,         // MCP 서버 이름 (내장은 undefined)
  stringifiedArgs,
  toolAnnotations,    // { readOnlyHint: true }
  subagent,
);
// → PolicyDecision.ALLOW | DENY | ASK_USER

README / docs

README / docs

// packages/core/src/sandbox/macos/MacOsSandboxManager.ts
export class MacOsSandboxManager implements SandboxManager {
  async prepareCommand(req: SandboxRequest): Promise<SandboxedCommand> {
    // 1. 명령 파싱 (shell-quote)
    // 2. 승인된 명령인지 확인 (approvedTools 목록)
    // 3. 미승인 시 Seatbelt 프로필 생성
    //    - 파일 접근, 네트워크, 프로세스 생성 제한
    // 4. 환경 변수 정화 (sanitizeEnvironment)
  }
}

Main analysis

9. Sandbox — Isolate commands by platform

9. Sandbox — Isolate commands by platform

Structure

sandbox/
├── macos/MacOsSandboxManager.ts    — Seatbelt (sandbox-exec)
├── linux/LinuxSandboxManager.ts    — Seccomp
└── windows/WindowsSandboxManager.ts — AppContainer

macOS Seatbelt Implementation

// packages/core/src/sandbox/macos/MacOsSandboxManager.ts
export class MacOsSandboxManager implements SandboxManager {
  async prepareCommand(req: SandboxRequest): Promise<SandboxedCommand> {
    // 1. 명령 파싱 (shell-quote)
    // 2. 승인된 명령인지 확인 (approvedTools 목록)
    // 3. 미승인 시 Seatbelt 프로필 생성
    //    - 파일 접근, 네트워크, 프로세스 생성 제한
    // 4. 환경 변수 정화 (sanitizeEnvironment)
  }
}

seatbeltArgsBuilder.ts dynamically creates the Seatbelt profile, and commandSafety.ts determines known safety commands.

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_ge_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

9. 샌드박스 — 플랫폼별 명령 격리

9. 샌드박스 — 플랫폼별 명령 격리

구조

sandbox/
├── macos/MacOsSandboxManager.ts    — Seatbelt (sandbox-exec)
├── linux/LinuxSandboxManager.ts    — Seccomp
└── windows/WindowsSandboxManager.ts — AppContainer

macOS Seatbelt 구현

// packages/core/src/sandbox/macos/MacOsSandboxManager.ts
export class MacOsSandboxManager implements SandboxManager {
  async prepareCommand(req: SandboxRequest): Promise<SandboxedCommand> {
    // 1. 명령 파싱 (shell-quote)
    // 2. 승인된 명령인지 확인 (approvedTools 목록)
    // 3. 미승인 시 Seatbelt 프로필 생성
    //    - 파일 접근, 네트워크, 프로세스 생성 제한
    // 4. 환경 변수 정화 (sanitizeEnvironment)
  }
}

seatbeltArgsBuilder.ts가 Seatbelt 프로필을 동적으로 생성하고, commandSafety.ts가 알려진 안전 명령을 판별한다.

16

Main analysis

10. Model Routing — ModelRouter + 8 strategies

10. Model Routing — ModelRouter + 8 strategies

// packages/core/src/routing/routingStrategy.ts
export interface RoutingStrategy {
  readonly name: string;
  route(context: RoutingContext): Promise<RoutingDecision | null>;
}

export interface RoutingDecision {
  model: string;
  metadata: { source: string; latencyMs: number; reasoning: string; };
}

List of routing strategies

strategy file Description
defaultStrategy strategies/defaultStrategy.ts Select basic model
classifierStrategy strategies/classifierStrategy.ts Classifier based
numericalClassifierStrategy strategies/numericalClassifierStrategy.ts Numeric classifier
gemmaClassifierStrategy strategies/gemmaClassifierStrategy.ts Gemma Local Model Classification
compositeStrategy strategies/compositeStrategy.ts Multi-strategy synthesis
fallbackStrategy strategies/fallbackStrategy.ts Fallback
overrideStrategy strategies/overrideStrategy.ts Force override
approvalModeStrategy strategies/approvalModeStrategy.ts based on approval mode

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_ge_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

// packages/core/src/routing/routingStrategy.ts
export interface RoutingStrategy {
  readonly name: string;
  route(context: RoutingContext): Promise<RoutingDecision | null>;
}

export interface RoutingDecision {
  model: string;
  metadata: { source: string; latencyMs: number; reasoning: string; };
}

라우팅 전략 목록

전략 파일 설명
defaultStrategy strategies/defaultStrategy.ts 기본 모델 선택
classifierStrategy strategies/classifierStrategy.ts 분류기 기반
numericalClassifierStrategy strategies/numericalClassifierStrategy.ts 수치 분류기
gemmaClassifierStrategy strategies/gemmaClassifierStrategy.ts Gemma 로컬 모델 분류
compositeStrategy strategies/compositeStrategy.ts 다중 전략 합성
fallbackStrategy strategies/fallbackStrategy.ts 폴백
overrideStrategy strategies/overrideStrategy.ts 강제 오버라이드
approvalModeStrategy strategies/approvalModeStrategy.ts 승인 모드 기반

훅 시스템 파일:

파일 역할
hookRegistry.ts 훅 등록/조회
hookRunner.ts 훅 실행
hookPlanner.ts 훅 실행 계획
hookAggregator.ts 훅 결과 집계
hookEventHandler.ts 이벤트별 핸들러
hookTranslator.ts LLM 요청/응답 변환
hookSystem.ts 시스템 훅
trustedHooks.ts 신뢰된 훅 검증

Source code snippets

README / docs

// packages/core/src/config/config.ts
export interface GeminiCLIExtension {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  version: string;
  description?: string;
  mcpServers?: Record<string, MCPServerConfig>;
  tools?: Record<string, ToolDefinition>;
  hooks?: Record<HookEventName, HookDefinition>;
  policies?: PolicyRule[];
  requiresApproval?: boolean;
  trustedFolder?: boolean;
}

README / docs

packages/cli/src/commands/extensions/
├── install.ts      # 확장 설치
├── uninstall.ts    # 확장 제거
├── enable.ts       # 확장 활성화
├── disable.ts      # 확장 비활성화
├── list.ts         # 확장 목록
├── new.ts          # 새 확장 생성
├── update.ts       # 확장 업데이트
├── link.ts         # 로컬 확장 링크
├── configure.ts    # 확장 설정
├── validate.ts     # 확장 검증
└── examples/       # 예제 확장 (MCP, 훅, 스킬, 정책, 테마, 커맨드)

README / docs

// packages/core/src/config/extensions/integrity.ts
export class ExtensionIntegrityManager {
  async verifyExtensionSignature(extensionId, signature): Promise<boolean>;
  async setExtensionTrust(extensionId, trusted): Promise<void>;
  // HMAC 기반 서명 검증, OS Keychain 연동
}

README / docs

Config.loadExtensions()
  → 모듈 로드 (ESM/CJS)
  → 서명 검증 (integrity check)
  → 관리자 허용/차단 목록 확인
  → MCP 서버 등록 (McpClientManager.startExtension)
  → 도구 등록 (ToolRegistry.registerTool)
  → 훅 등록 (HookRegistry.registerHook)
  → 정책 적용 (PolicyEngine.addRules)

Main analysis

12. Extension system — gemini-extension.json

12. Extension system — gemini-extension.json

extended definitions

// packages/core/src/config/config.ts
export interface GeminiCLIExtension {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  version: string;
  description?: string;
  mcpServers?: Record<string, MCPServerConfig>;
  tools?: Record<string, ToolDefinition>;
  hooks?: Record<HookEventName, HookDefinition>;
  policies?: PolicyRule[];
  requiresApproval?: boolean;
  trustedFolder?: boolean;
}

Extended CLI commands

packages/cli/src/commands/extensions/
├── install.ts      # 확장 설치
├── uninstall.ts    # 확장 제거
├── enable.ts       # 확장 활성화
├── disable.ts      # 확장 비활성화
├── list.ts         # 확장 목록
├── new.ts          # 새 확장 생성
├── update.ts       # 확장 업데이트
├── link.ts         # 로컬 확장 링크
├── configure.ts    # 확장 설정
├── validate.ts     # 확장 검증
└── examples/       # 예제 확장 (MCP, 훅, 스킬, 정책, 테마, 커맨드)

Extended Integrity Verification

// packages/core/src/config/extensions/integrity.ts
export class ExtensionIntegrityManager {
  async verifyExtensionSignature(extensionId, signature): Promise<boolean>;
  async setExtensionTrust(extensionId, trusted): Promise<void>;
  // HMAC 기반 서명 검증, OS Keychain 연동
}

Extension loading flow

Config.loadExtensions()
  → 모듈 로드 (ESM/CJS)
  → 서명 검증 (integrity check)
  → 관리자 허용/차단 목록 확인
  → MCP 서버 등록 (McpClientManager.startExtension)
  → 도구 등록 (ToolRegistry.registerTool)
  → 훅 등록 (HookRegistry.registerHook)
  → 정책 적용 (PolicyEngine.addRules)

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_ge_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

12. 확장 시스템 — gemini-extension.json

12. 확장 시스템 — gemini-extension.json

확장 정의

// packages/core/src/config/config.ts
export interface GeminiCLIExtension {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  version: string;
  description?: string;
  mcpServers?: Record<string, MCPServerConfig>;
  tools?: Record<string, ToolDefinition>;
  hooks?: Record<HookEventName, HookDefinition>;
  policies?: PolicyRule[];
  requiresApproval?: boolean;
  trustedFolder?: boolean;
}

확장 CLI 명령

packages/cli/src/commands/extensions/
├── install.ts      # 확장 설치
├── uninstall.ts    # 확장 제거
├── enable.ts       # 확장 활성화
├── disable.ts      # 확장 비활성화
├── list.ts         # 확장 목록
├── new.ts          # 새 확장 생성
├── update.ts       # 확장 업데이트
├── link.ts         # 로컬 확장 링크
├── configure.ts    # 확장 설정
├── validate.ts     # 확장 검증
└── examples/       # 예제 확장 (MCP, 훅, 스킬, 정책, 테마, 커맨드)

확장 무결성 검증

// packages/core/src/config/extensions/integrity.ts
export class ExtensionIntegrityManager {
  async verifyExtensionSignature(extensionId, signature): Promise<boolean>;
  async setExtensionTrust(extensionId, trusted): Promise<void>;
  // HMAC 기반 서명 검증, OS Keychain 연동
}

확장 로딩 흐름

Config.loadExtensions()
  → 모듈 로드 (ESM/CJS)
  → 서명 검증 (integrity check)
  → 관리자 허용/차단 목록 확인
  → MCP 서버 등록 (McpClientManager.startExtension)
  → 도구 등록 (ToolRegistry.registerTool)
  → 훅 등록 (HookRegistry.registerHook)
  → 정책 적용 (PolicyEngine.addRules)

Main analysis

13. A2A Server — Agent-to-Agent Protocol

13. A2A Server — Agent-to-Agent Protocol

packages/a2a-server/ is an HTTP server based on @a2a-js/sdk, which allows external agents to call the Gemini CLI.

// packages/a2a-server/src/agent/executor.ts
class TaskWrapper {
  task: Task;
  agentSettings: AgentSettings;
  toSDKTask(): SDKTask { /* ... */ }
}

structure:

a2a-server/
├── agent/executor.ts       # CoderAgentExecutor — 태스크 실행
├── agent/task.ts            # Task 래퍼
├── http/app.ts              # Express 앱
├── http/server.ts           # HTTP 서버
├── http/requestStorage.ts   # 요청 스토리지
├── config/config.ts         # A2A 설정 로더
├── config/settings.ts       # 설정
├── config/extension.ts      # 확장 로딩
├── persistence/gcs.ts       # GCS 퍼시스턴스
├── commands/                # CLI 커맨드 (restore, init, extensions, memory)
└── types.ts                 # 타입 정의

Source code snippets

README / docs

// packages/core/src/config/config.ts
export class Config {
  private contentGenerator: ContentGenerator;
  private toolRegistry: ToolRegistry;
  private promptRegistry: PromptRegistry;
  private resourceRegistry: ResourceRegistry;
  private sandboxManager: SandboxManager;
  private policyEngine: PolicyEngine;
  private sandboxPolicyManager: SandboxPolicyManager;
  private fileSystemService: FileSystemService;
  private gitService: GitService;

  // 모델 관리
  getModel(): string;
  resolveModel(preferredModel?): string;
  getContentGenerator(): ContentGenerator;

  // MCP
  getMcpServers(): MCPServerConfig[];
  getAllowedMcpServers(): string[] | undefined;
  getBlockedMcpServers(): string[] | undefined;

  // 승인 모드
  getApprovalMode(): ApprovalMode;
  setApprovalMode(mode): void;

  // 도구 탐색
  getToolDiscoveryCommand(): string | undefined;
  getToolCallCommand(): string | undefined;
}

README / docs

~/.gemini/
├── storage.json       # 사용자 설정
├── policies/          # 사용자 정책 파일
├── skills/            # 사용자 스킬
├── integrity.json     # 확장 무결성 데이터
└── ...

.gemini/               # 워크스페이스 설정
├── policies/
├── skills/
├── settings.json
└── GEMINI.md          # 프로젝트 컨텍스트

README / docs

// packages/core/src/config/models.ts

export const DEFAULT_GEMINI_MODEL_AUTO = 'gemini-2.0-auto';
export const PREVIEW_GEMINI_MODEL = 'gemini-2.0-flash-preview';
// 모델 해석 순서: 선호 모델 → 환경변수 → 설정 파일 → 기본값

Main analysis

14. Configuration system — Config + Storage

14. Configuration system — Config + Storage

Config class (config.ts)

// packages/core/src/config/config.ts
export class Config {
  private contentGenerator: ContentGenerator;
  private toolRegistry: ToolRegistry;
  private promptRegistry: PromptRegistry;
  private resourceRegistry: ResourceRegistry;
  private sandboxManager: SandboxManager;
  private policyEngine: PolicyEngine;
  private sandboxPolicyManager: SandboxPolicyManager;
  private fileSystemService: FileSystemService;
  private gitService: GitService;

  // 모델 관리
  getModel(): string;
  resolveModel(preferredModel?): string;
  getContentGenerator(): ContentGenerator;

  // MCP
  getMcpServers(): MCPServerConfig[];
  getAllowedMcpServers(): string[] | undefined;
  getBlockedMcpServers(): string[] | undefined;

  // 승인 모드
  getApprovalMode(): ApprovalMode;
  setApprovalMode(mode): void;

  // 도구 탐색
  getToolDiscoveryCommand(): string | undefined;
  getToolCallCommand(): string | undefined;
}

Storage (storage.ts)

~/.gemini/
├── storage.json       # 사용자 설정
├── policies/          # 사용자 정책 파일
├── skills/            # 사용자 스킬
├── integrity.json     # 확장 무결성 데이터
└── ...

.gemini/               # 워크스페이스 설정
├── policies/
├── skills/
├── settings.json
└── GEMINI.md          # 프로젝트 컨텍스트

Model settings

// packages/core/src/config/models.ts

14. 설정 시스템 — Config + Storage

14. 설정 시스템 — Config + Storage

Config 클래스 (config.ts)

// packages/core/src/config/config.ts
export class Config {
  private contentGenerator: ContentGenerator;
  private toolRegistry: ToolRegistry;
  private promptRegistry: PromptRegistry;
  private resourceRegistry: ResourceRegistry;
  private sandboxManager: SandboxManager;
  private policyEngine: PolicyEngine;
  private sandboxPolicyManager: SandboxPolicyManager;
  private fileSystemService: FileSystemService;
  private gitService: GitService;

  // 모델 관리
  getModel(): string;
  resolveModel(preferredModel?): string;
  getContentGenerator(): ContentGenerator;

  // MCP
  getMcpServers(): MCPServerConfig[];
  getAllowedMcpServers(): string[] | undefined;
  getBlockedMcpServers(): string[] | undefined;

  // 승인 모드
  getApprovalMode(): ApprovalMode;
  setApprovalMode(mode): void;

  // 도구 탐색
  getToolDiscoveryCommand(): string | undefined;
  getToolCallCommand(): string | undefined;
}

Storage (storage.ts)

~/.gemini/
├── storage.json       # 사용자 설정
├── policies/          # 사용자 정책 파일
├── skills/            # 사용자 스킬
├── integrity.json     # 확장 무결성 데이터
└── ...

.gemini/               # 워크스페이스 설정
├── policies/
├── skills/
├── settings.json
└── GEMINI.md          # 프로젝트 컨텍스트

모델 설정

// packages/core/src/config/models.ts
export const DEFAULT_GEMINI_MODEL = 'gemini-2.0-flash';
export const DEFAULT_GEMINI_MODEL_AUTO = 'gemini-2.0-auto';
export const PREVIEW_GEMINI_MODEL = 'gemini-2.0-flash-preview';
// 모델 해석 순서: 선호 모델 → 환경변수 → 설정 파일 → 기본값
21

Axis 01: TUI design

AXIS

001_tui-design/01_ge_tui.md

Overview

Axis 01: TUI design — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • 분석 스냅샷: /Users/jun/Developer/codex/130_gemini-cli/ (readable source). 본 문서 본문의 path:line 인용은 이 트리 기준.

  • Gemini CLI의 TUI 계층은 React + Ink 기반의 풀 터미널 애플리케이션이다. TypeScript로 작성되었으며, packages/cli/src/ui/ 아래에 100개 이상의 컴포넌트, 80개 이상의 커스텀 훅, 15개의 React Context가 밀집한 대규모 프런트엔드 런타임이다. 단순한 CLI wrapper가 아니라, 마크다운 렌더링, 가상화 스크롤, vim 모드, 마우스 이벤트,
  • 중요한 관찰은 AppContainer.tsx가 2,000줄 이상의 거대 컴포넌트라는 점이다. UI 상태 관리, 스트리밍 핸들링, 인증, 세션 복원, 이벤트 바인딩이 모두 여기에 모여 있다. useGeminiStream 훅도 마찬가지로 Gemini API 스트림 수신, 도구 호출 추적, 히스토리 관리를 한 곳에서 처리한다. 이 두 파일이 사실상 전체 UI의 심장이자 가장 큰 강결합 리스크다.
  • graph TD
  • A["gemini.tsx — 엔트리"] --> B["interactiveCli.tsx — Ink render()"]
  • B --> C["AppWrapper — Context Provider 트리"]
  • C --> D["AppContainer — 상태 + 이벤트 오케스트레이션"]
  • D --> E["App.tsx — 레이아웃 분기"]
  • E --> F["DefaultAppLayout"]
  • E --> G["ScreenReaderAppLayout"]
  • F --> H["MainContent — 히스토리 뷰포트"]
  • F --> I["Composer — 입력 + 상태"]

Topics covered

    1. 엔트리와 Ink 렌더 Loop
    1. Context Provider 트리
    1. AppContainer — 상태 머신 허브
    1. 레이아웃 구조
  • 4.1 App.tsx — 레이아웃 분기
  • 4.2 DefaultAppLayout — 주 화면
    1. MainContent — 히스토리 뷰포트
  • VirtualizedList 내부
  • HistoryItemDisplay — 메시지 라우터
    1. 스트리밍 출력과 useGeminiStream
  • Tool 호출 스케줄링
    1. 마크다운 렌더링
  • MarkdownDisplay 파싱 규칙
    1. 입력 시스템

Source code snippets

README / docs

graph TD
    A["gemini.tsx — 엔트리"] --> B["interactiveCli.tsx — Ink render()"]
    B --> C["AppWrapper — Context Provider 트리"]
    C --> D["AppContainer — 상태 + 이벤트 오케스트레이션"]

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/cli/src/interactiveCli.tsx
const instance = render(
  <AppWrapper />,
  {
    stdout: inkStdout,
    stderr: inkStderr,
    stdin: process.stdin,
    exitOnCtrlC: false,
    alternateBuffer: useAlternateBuffer,
    incrementalRendering: settings.merged.ui.incrementalRendering !== false
      && useAlternateBuffer && !isShpool,
    onRender: ({ renderTime }) => {
      if (renderTime > SLOW_RENDER_MS) {
        recordSlowRender(config, renderTime);
      }
      profiler.reportFrameRendered();
    },
  },
);

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/cli/src/interactiveCli.tsx
const AppWrapper = () => {
  useKittyKeyboardProtocol();
  return (
    <SettingsContext.Provider value={settings}>
      <KeyMatchersProvider value={matchers}>
        <KeypressProvider config={config}>
          <MouseProvider mouseEventsEnabled={mouseEventsEnabled}>
            <TerminalProvider>
              <ScrollProvider>
                <OverflowProvider>
                  <SessionStatsProvider>
                    <VimModeProvider>
                      <AppContainer ... />
                    </VimModeProvider>
                  </SessionStatsProvider>
                </OverflowProvider>
              </ScrollProvider>
            </TerminalProvider>
          </MouseProvider>
        </KeypressProvider>
      </KeyMatchersProvider>
    </SettingsContext.Provider>
  );
};

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/cli/src/ui/App.tsx
return (
  <StreamingContext.Provider value={uiState.streamingState}>
    {isScreenReaderEnabled ? <ScreenReaderAppLayout /> : <DefaultAppLayout />}
  </StreamingContext.Provider>
);

README / docs

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ MainContent (ScrollableList)                │
│   ├─ AppHeader (로고, 버전, 사용자 정보)      │
│   ├─ HistoryItemDisplay × N                 │
│   │   ├─ UserMessage                        │
│   │   ├─ GeminiMessage (MarkdownDisplay)    │
│   │   ├─ ToolGroupMessage                   │
│   │   ├─ ThinkingMessage                    │
│   │   └─ ...                                │
│   └─ ToolConfirmationQueue                  │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ BackgroundShellDisplay (조건부)              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Notifications / CopyModeWarning             │
│ DialogManager 또는 Composer                 │
│ ExitWarning                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/cli/src/ui/layouts/DefaultAppLayout.tsx
<Box flexDirection="column" width={uiState.terminalWidth}
     height={isAlternateBuffer ? terminalHeight : undefined}>
  <MainContent />
  {/* BackgroundShellDisplay — 조건부 */}
  <Box flexDirection="column" ref={uiState.mainControlsRef}>
    <Notifications />
    <CopyModeWarning />
    {uiState.dialogsVisible ? <DialogManager /> : <Composer isFocused={true} />}
    <ExitWarning />
  </Box>
</Box>

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/cli/src/ui/components/MainContent.tsx
<ScrollableList
  data={augmentedHistory}
  renderItem={renderItem}
  estimatedItemHeight={estimateHeight}
  keyExtractor={keyExtractor}
  initialScrollIndex={SCROLL_TO_ITEM_END}
  hasFocus={!showConfirmationQueue}
/>
{showConfirmationQueue && <ToolConfirmationQueue confirmingTool={confirmingTool} />}

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/cli/src/ui/types.ts
export enum StreamingState {
  Idle = 'idle',
  Responding = 'responding',
  WaitingForConfirmation = 'waiting_for_confirmation',
}

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/cli/src/ui/hooks/useGeminiStream.ts
function calculateStreamingState(
  isResponding: boolean,
  toolCalls: TrackedToolCall[],
): StreamingState {
  if (toolCalls.some(tc => tc.status === CoreToolCallStatus.AwaitingApproval)) {
    return StreamingState.WaitingForConfirmation;
  }
  const isAnyToolActive = toolCalls.some(tc => {
    if (tc.status === CoreToolCallStatus.Executing
        || tc.status === CoreToolCallStatus.Scheduled
        || tc.status === CoreToolCallStatus.Validating) {
      return true;
    }
    // 완료됐지만 Gemini에 응답 미제출 상태도 활성으로 간주
    if ((tc.status === CoreToolCallStatus.Success
         || tc.status === CoreToolCallStatus.Error
         || tc.status === CoreToolCallStatus.Cancelled)
        && !tc.responseSubmittedToGemini) {
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  });
  if (isResponding || isAnyToolActive) return StreamingState.Responding;
  return StreamingState.Idle;
}

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/cli/src/ui/components/messages/GeminiMessage.tsx
<MarkdownDisplay
  text={text}
  isPending={isPending}
  availableTerminalHeight={...}
  terminalWidth={Math.max(terminalWidth - prefixWidth, 0)}
  renderMarkdown={renderMarkdown}
/>

README / docs

export enum KeypressPriority {
  Low = -100,
  Normal = 0,
  High = 100,
  Critical = 200,
}

  RETURN = 'basic.confirm',
  ESCAPE = 'basic.cancel',
  QUIT = 'basic.quit',
  SCROLL_UP = 'scroll.up',
  SCROLL_DOWN = 'scroll.down',

전체 히스토리 (N 아이템):
┌─── Item 0 ←─ 렌더링 안 됨
│    Item 1
│    ...
│    Item K-1
├─── Item K ←─ 렌더 윈도우 시작 (overscan 포함)
│    Item K+1
│    ...     ←─ 화면에 보이는 영역
│    Item K+W
│    ...
│    Item K+W+overscan
├─── Item K+W+overscan+1 ←─ 렌더 윈도우 종료
│    ...
└─── Item N-1 ←─ 렌더링 안 됨

README / docs

// 스크롤 이벤트를 requestAnimationFrame으로 배치하여
// 한 프레임에 여러 스크롤 이벤트가 도착해도 한 번만 렌더링한다.
// keyboardScrollLines: △ 기반 스크롤 양 (기본 3줄)
// mouseScrollLines: 마우스 휠 1틱 = 3줄
