sequenceDiagram
    participant Client as client.ts
    participant PP as PromptProvider
    participant Snip as snippets.ts
    participant CM as ContextManager
    participant MD as memoryDiscovery.ts

    Client->>PP: getCoreSystemPrompt(context, memory)
    PP->>PP: resolvePathFromEnv(GEMINI_SYSTEM_MD)
    alt 커스텀 system.md 파일 존재
        PP->>PP: fs.readFileSync(system.md)
        PP->>PP: applySubstitutions(template)
    else 표준 조립
        PP->>Snip: getCoreSystemPrompt(options)
        Snip->>Snip: renderPreamble → renderCoreMandates → ...
        Snip-->>PP: 조립된 basePrompt
    end
    PP->>Snip: renderFinalShell(basePrompt, userMemory)
    Snip->>Snip: renderUserMemory(memory, filenames)
    Snip-->>PP: finalPrompt

    Note over Client,MD: --- GEMINI.md 로딩 (별도 초기화 단계) ---
    Client->>CM: refresh()
    CM->>MD: getGlobalMemoryPaths()
    CM->>MD: getExtensionMemoryPaths()
    CM->>MD: getEnvironmentMemoryPaths()
    MD-->>CM: 계층별 파일 경로
    CM->>MD: readGeminiMdFiles(allPaths)
    CM->>CM: categorizeMemoryContents()
    CM-->>Client: HierarchicalMemory {global, extension, project}

Technical Reference

Prompt input channel

Gemini CLI does not separate developer/user channels like Codex. Instead, everything is broken down into one system instruction string and the first user message.

Channel Source Entry location Meaning
system instruction PromptProvider.getCoreSystemPrompt() Gemini API systemInstruction parameter Full behavioral rules and workflow
environment context environmentContext.ts First user message <session_context> Date, OS, directory structure, project memory
GEMINI.md (system) renderUserMemory() → end of system instruction <loaded_context> block Global memory (total memory when JIT is disabled)
GEMINI.md (session) getEnvironmentContext() → user message <session_context> inside Extension + Project memory (when JIT is enabled)
JIT context jit-context.ts → append to tool output After the tool response --- Newly Discovered Project Context --- Subdirectory GEMINI.md
MCP instructions ContextManager.categorizeMemoryContents() Added to project memory Directives provided by MCP server

system instruction assembly sequence

The order in which each renderer is called in the getCoreSystemPrompt() function in snippets.ts:

order renderer Conditions Role
1 renderPreamble() Always "You are Gemini CLI..." role declaration
2 renderCoreMandates() Always Security, context efficiency, engineering standards
3 renderSubAgents() When sub-agent exists Strategic Orchestration Delegation Rules
4 renderAgentSkills() When skill exists Instructions for activating skills through the activate_skill tool
5 renderHookContext() When environmental variables are activated External hook context processing rules
6 renderPrimaryWorkflows() or renderPlanningWorkflow() Select according to approval mode Research → Strategy → Execution life cycle
7 renderTaskTracker() When tracker is activated .tracker/tasks/ based task management protocol
8 renderOperationalGuidelines() Always Tone, Security, Tool Usage, Interaction Rules
9 renderInteractiveYoloMode() When in YOLO mode Self-Running Mode Rules
10 renderSandbox() When sandbox is activated macOS seatbelt / container restriction information
11 renderGitRepo() When running in git repo Rules for commit/push
12 renderUserMemory() If GEMINI.md content exists <loaded_context> block

This order can be checked directly in the getCoreSystemPrompt() function in 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/prompts/snippets.ts:

// snippets.ts:121-149
export function getCoreSystemPrompt(options: SystemPromptOptions): string {
  return `
${renderPreamble(options.preamble)}
${renderCoreMandates(options.coreMandates)}
${renderSubAgents(options.subAgents)}
${renderAgentSkills(options.agentSkills)}
${renderHookContext(options.hookContext)}
${options.planningWorkflow
    ? renderPlanningWorkflow(options.planningWorkflow)
    : renderPrimaryWorkflows(options.primaryWorkflows)}
${options.taskTracker ? renderTaskTracker() : ''}
${renderOperationalGuidelines(options.operationalGuidelines)}
${renderInteractiveYoloMode(options.interactiveYoloMode)}
${renderSandbox(options.sandbox)}
${renderGitRepo(options.gitRepo)}
`.trim();
}

Preamble — Role declaration

// snippets.ts:168-173
export function renderPreamble(options?: PreambleOptions): string {
  if (!options) return '';
  return options.interactive
    ? 'You are Gemini CLI, an interactive CLI agent specializing in software engineering tasks...'
    : 'You are Gemini CLI, an autonomous CLI agent specializing in software engineering tasks...';
}

The one-line role declaration varies depending on whether you are in interactive mode or not. In contrast to Codex's base instructions, which are separate .md files, here they are a single TypeScript string literal.

Core Mandates — Core rules of conduct

renderCoreMandates() creates the longest section of a system instruction. Main subblocks:

  • Security & System Integrity: Credential protection, source control rules
  • Context Efficiency: Context usage optimization guidelines wrapped in <estimating_context_usage>, <guidelines>, <examples> XML blocks. Tuned based on SWEBench benchmark
  • Engineering Standards: GEMINI.md priority, coding rules, testing obligations, Directive vs Inquiry distinction
// snippets.ts:229 (일부)
- **Contextual Precedence:** Instructions found in ${formattedFilenames} files are foundational mandates.
  They take absolute precedence over the general workflows and tool defaults described in this system prompt.

Loading GEMINI.md — 3-Tier Hierarchy

Gemini CLI's GEMINI.md loading is managed by ContextManager and has a much more sophisticated hierarchical structure than Codex's AGENTS.md.

Tier range source path Loading Points
Tier 1 (Global) User Global ~/.gemini/GEMINI.md ContextManager.refresh() when initializing a session
Tier 1.5 (Extension) By extension extension contextFiles When initializing a session
Tier 2 (Project) Project Root ~ CWD CWD parent navigation + BFS child navigation When initializing a session
Tier 3 (JIT) subdirectory Parent navigation of the path accessed by the tool Dynamic load at tool run time

Priority: Sub-directories > Workspace Root > Extensions > Global

// contextManager.ts:36-44
async refresh(): Promise<void> {
  this.loadedPaths.clear();
  this.loadedFileIdentities.clear();
  const paths = await this.discoverMemoryPaths();
  const contentsMap = await this.loadMemoryContents(paths);
  this.categorizeMemoryContents(paths, contentsMap);
  this.emitMemoryChanged();
}

Project memory discovery is performed with getGeminiMdFilePathsInternalForEachDir() in memoryDiscovery.ts:

  1. Find the project root based on .git (findProjectRoot())
  2. Upward traversal from CWD to project root
  3. BFS sub-search under CWD (bfsFileSearch(), up to 200 directories)
  4. Read the found files with readGeminiMdFiles() and import them with processImports()

JIT Context — Dynamic subdirectory loading

JIT is a unique mechanism unique to Gemini CLI. When a "high-intent" tool such as read_file, write_file, or list_directory accesses a specific path, it finds a GEMINI.md file that has not yet been loaded from that path to the project root and automatically appends it to the tool output.

// jit-context.ts:20-41
export async function discoverJitContext(config: Config, accessedPath: string): Promise<string> {
  if (!config.isJitContextEnabled?.()) return '';
  const contextManager = config.getContextManager();
  if (!contextManager) return '';
  const trustedRoots = [...config.getWorkspaceContext().getDirectories()];
  return await contextManager.discoverContext(accessedPath, trustedRoots);
}

Format of tool output:

[도구 원본 출력]

--- Newly Discovered Project Context ---
--- Context from: /app/src/GEMINI.md ---
[GEMINI.md 내용]
--- End of Context from: /app/src/GEMINI.md ---
--- End Project Context ---

HierarchicalMemory — Hierarchical rendering

When JIT is enabled, memory is classified into HierarchicalMemory objects and wrapped in XML tags:

// snippets.ts:509-527
if (memory.global?.trim()) {
  sections.push(`<global_context>\n${memory.global.trim()}\n</global_context>`);
}
if (memory.extension?.trim()) {
  sections.push(`<extension_context>\n${memory.extension.trim()}\n</extension_context>`);
}
if (memory.project?.trim()) {
  sections.push(`<project_context>\n${memory.project.trim()}\n</project_context>`);
}

When JIT is disabled, all memory is combined into a flat string and placed in the <loaded_context> block under # Contextual Instructions (GEMINI.md) at the end of the system instruction.

Environment Context — First User Message

Apart from the system instruction, the session context is injected in the first user message:

// environmentContext.ts:72-80
const context = `
<session_context>
This is the Gemini CLI. We are setting up the context for our chat.
Today's date is ${today} (formatted according to the user's locale).
My operating system is: ${platform}
The project's temporary directory is: ${tempDir}
${directoryContext}
${environmentMemory}
</session_context>`.trim();

Information included here:

  • Today's date (locale format)
  • OS platform
  • Project temporary directory
  • Directory tree structure (getFolderStructure())
  • Environmental memory (when JIT is active: Extension + Project, when inactive: Project only)

Token Management and Context Window

Token Limit

Gemini CLI enforces the same 1M token limit for all models:

// tokenLimits.ts:18
export const DEFAULT_TOKEN_LIMIT = 1_048_576;

Token estimation

Heuristic estimation method in tokenCalculation.ts:

Content Type Estimation method
ASCII text 0.25 tokens per character
Non-ASCII text (including CJK) 1.3 tokens per character
image Fixed 3,000 tokens
PDF Fixed 25,800 tokens (~100 pages)
Text exceeding 100,000 characters Use length / 4 approximation
Media Inclusion Request Call countTokens API (fallback to local estimate on failure) 
// tokenCalculation.ts:35-49
function estimateTextTokens(text: string): number {
  if (text.length > MAX_CHARS_FOR_FULL_HEURISTIC) return text.length / 4;
  let tokens = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < text.length; i++) {
    if (text.charCodeAt(i) <= 127) tokens += ASCII_TOKENS_PER_CHAR;  // 0.25
    else tokens += NON_ASCII_TOKENS_PER_CHAR;  // 1.3
  }
  return tokens;
}

Chat Compression

Automatic compaction is triggered when the context exceeds 50% of the token limit:

// chatCompressionService.ts:40-41
const DEFAULT_COMPRESSION_TOKEN_THRESHOLD = 0.5;  // 한도의 50%에서 트리거
const COMPRESSION_PRESERVE_THRESHOLD = 0.3;       // 최근 30% 보존
const COMPRESSION_FUNCTION_RESPONSE_TOKEN_BUDGET = 50_000;  // 도구 응답 보존 예산

Compression process:

  1. Trigger judgment: lastPromptTokenCount > threshold × tokenLimit(model)
  2. Tool output truncation: Preserve the most recent tool responses first by traversing in reverse order. When the 50K token budget is exceeded, old tool responses are cut into 30 lines and stored in a temporary file.
  3. History Split: findCompressSplitPoint() determines the split point at the user message boundary.
  4. LLM Summary: Send the segmented front part to a separate LLM and compress it into <state_snapshot> XML.

Compression prompts are generated from getCompressionPrompt(), and the result follows the XML structure below:

<state_snapshot>
    <overall_goal>...</overall_goal>
    <active_constraints>...</active_constraints>
    <key_knowledge>...</key_knowledge>
    <artifact_trail>...</artifact_trail>
    <file_system_state>...</file_system_state>
    <recent_actions>...</recent_actions>
    <task_state>...</task_state>
</state_snapshot>

MCP Prompt integration

The MCP prompt enters the system in two ways:

1. PromptRegistry — Prompt Registry

// prompt-registry.ts:10-11
export class PromptRegistry {
  private prompts: Map<string, DiscoveredMCPPrompt> = new Map();

PromptRegistry manages prompt definitions found on the MCP server by name. In case of name conflict, it is automatically renamed in the format ${serverName}_${promptName}.

2. MCP Instructions — added to project memory

Instructions provided by the MCP server are added to the project memory in ContextManager.categorizeMemoryContents():

// contextManager.ts:106-117
const mcpInstructions = this.config.getMcpClientManager()?.getMcpInstructions() || '';
const projectMemoryWithMcp = [
  hierarchicalMemory.project,
  mcpInstructions.trimStart(),
].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n');

Custom system prompt override

You can replace the entire system prompt with a custom file via the GEMINI_SYSTEM_MD environment variable:

Environment variable value Action
true / 1 Using ~/.gemini/system.md file
false / 0 Disable override (use default assembly)
file path Use the file at that path as a template

In your custom file, you can use substitution variables such as ${AgentSkills}, ${SubAgents}, and ${AvailableTools}:

// utils.ts:72-103
result = result.replace(/\${AgentSkills}/g, skillsPrompt);
result = result.replace(/\${SubAgents}/g, subAgentsContent);
result = result.replace(/\${AvailableTools}/g, availableToolsList);

Control environment variables by section

Each prompt section can be individually disabled with the GEMINI_PROMPT_${SECTION} environment variable:

// utils.ts:109-113
export function isSectionEnabled(key: string): boolean {
  const envVar = process.env[`GEMINI_PROMPT_${key.toUpperCase()}`];
  const lowerEnvVar = envVar?.trim().toLowerCase();
  return lowerEnvVar !== '0' && lowerEnvVar !== 'false';
}

Example: If you set GEMINI_PROMPT_SANDBOX=false, the sandbox-related prompt section will be omitted.

Modern vs Legacy prompt

Depending on the model generation, different snippet sets are used:

// promptProvider.ts:69-71
const isModernModel = supportsModernFeatures(desiredModel);
const activeSnippets = isModernModel ? snippets : legacySnippets;

snippets.ts is for Gemini 3 or higher, and snippets.legacy.ts is for Gemini 2.5 or lower. The finalReminder section is added only in legacy models.

Structure comparison compared to Codex

perspective Codex Gemini CLI
Prompt text location default.md separate file Built-in TypeScript template literals
Separation of roles Separate developer/user channels single system instruction
local directives file AGENTS.md → user role fragment GEMINI.md → end of system instruction <loaded_context>
Directive Hierarchy Single AGENTS.md chain Global → Extension → Project → JIT 4-tier
dynamic context loading None JIT Context (when accessing tools)
Token Limit Varies by model All models 1M unified
Conversation Compression history reconstruction LLM-based <state_snapshot> summary
MCP directive No separate path Add to project memory
Control by section None GEMINI_PROMPT_* environment variables
custom override None GEMINI_SYSTEM_MD environment variable

Interpretation from fork perspective

  • The [x] prompt is inside a TypeScript function, so it is difficult to extract the text separately.
  • 3-tier GEMINI.md hierarchy is useful in large monorepos
  • JIT Context is a clever approach that provides context when needed while reducing the initial loading burden.
  • <state_snapshot>-based compression preserves richer information than Codex’s history reconstruction.
  • Controlling environment variables by section is useful for debugging and A/B testing.
  • Modern/Legacy branching can increase code complexity in the long run
  • The method of adding MCP instructions to project memory can cause priority confusion.

List of core files

  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/prompts/promptProvider.ts — Prompt assembly orchestrator.
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/prompts/snippets.ts — Prompt renderer for modern models (60KB)
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/prompts/snippets.legacy.ts — Prompt renderer for legacy models (50KB)
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/prompts/utils.ts — Path resolution, substitution, and section activation utilities
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/prompts/prompt-registry.ts — MCP prompt registry
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/prompts/mcp-prompts.ts — View prompts by MCP server
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/services/contextManager.ts — Hierarchical GEMINI.md loading management.
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/utils/memoryDiscovery.ts — File navigation, reading, and import processing
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/utils/environmentContext.ts — Create the first user message
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/utils/tokenCalculation.ts — Heuristic token estimation
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/core/tokenLimits.ts — Token limits by model
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/services/chatCompressionService.ts — Chat history compression
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/memoryTool.ts — GEMINI.md file name management, memory storage
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/jit-context.ts — JIT context discovery and tool output append
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/config/memory.ts — HierarchicalMemory type definition

Previous article: [[02_co_prompt]] Next article: [[03_ge_tool]]

snapshot_to_current delta

Area Snapshot Current
Prompt assembly Paths cited in-body Re-verify on harness upgrade
Context files Documented merge rules Host file conventions may drift

Change history

  • 2026-03-26: Initial writing. We organized the PromptProvider assembly pipeline, GEMINI.md 3-tier layer loading, JIT Context, token management, conversation compression, and MCP integration.

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 002_prompt-context/02_ge_prompt.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

프롬프트와 컨텍스트 주입 파이프라인 — Gemini CLI

분석 스냅샷: 130_gemini-cli/ — template-literal system prompts in TypeScript sources.

Gemini CLI의 프롬프트 시스템은 Codex와 근본적으로 다른 철학을 취한다. Codex가 developer/user 역할 분리에 집착하는 반면, Gemini CLI는 단일 system instruction 문자열 안에서 섹션 렌더러 패턴으로 모든 지시문을 조립한다. 이 문자열은 PromptProvider.getCoreSystemPrompt()에서 생성되며, snippets.ts에 정의된 약 12개의 독립 렌더러 함수가 순서대로 호출되어 하나의 거대한 시스템 프롬프트를 만든다.

Codex가 프롬프트 텍스트를 별도 .md 파일에 보관하는 것과 달리, Gemini CLI는 프롬프트 텍스트 자체를 TypeScript 함수의 템플릿 리터럴 안에 직접 임베딩한다. 이 방식은 빌드 타임 타입 안전성을 얻는 대신, 비개발자가 프롬프트를 수정하기 어렵게 만든다.

또 다른 핵심 차이는 GEMINI.md 파일의 계층적 로딩이다. Codex의 AGENTS.md가 contextual user fragment로 들어가는 것과 달리, Gemini CLI의 GEMINI.md는 3-tier 계층 구조(Global → Extension → Project)로 수집되어 system instruction의 <loaded_context> 섹션에 합산된다. 여기에 JIT(Just-In-Time) Context라는 독특한 Tier 3가 추가되어, 도구가 특정 디렉토리에 접근할 때 해당 디렉토리의 GEMINI.md를 동적으로 로드한다.

graph TD
    subgraph "System Instruction 조립"
        A["PromptProvider.getCoreSystemPrompt()"]
        B["snippets.ts 렌더러들"]
        C["renderPreamble()"]
        D["renderCoreMandates()"]
        E["renderSubAgents()"]
        F["renderAgentSkills()"]
        G["renderPrimaryWorkflows() / renderPlanningWorkflow()"]
        H["renderOperationalGuidelines()"]
        I["renderSandbox()"]
        J["renderGitRepo()"]
        K["renderUserMemory()"]
    end

    subgraph "GEMINI.md 계층 로딩"
        L["~/.gemini/GEMINI.md (Global)"]
        M["Extension context files"]
        N["프로젝트 GEMINI.md (Project)"]
        O["서브디렉토리 GEMINI.md (JIT)"]
    end

    A --> B
    B --> C --> D --> E --> F --> G --> H --> I --> J
    J --> K
    L --> K
    M --> K
    N --> K
    O -.->|"도구 접근 시 동적 로드"| K

    A -->|"최종 출력"| P["sanitized system instruction"]

sequenceDiagram
    participant Client as client.ts
    participant PP as PromptProvider
    participant Snip as snippets.ts
    participant CM as ContextManager
    participant MD as memoryDiscovery.ts

    Client->>PP: getCoreSystemPrompt(context, memory)
    PP->>PP: resolvePathFromEnv(GEMINI_SYSTEM_MD)
    alt 커스텀 system.md 파일 존재
        PP->>PP: fs.readFileSync(system.md)
        PP->>PP: applySubstitutions(template)
    else 표준 조립
        PP->>Snip: getCoreSystemPrompt(options)
        Snip->>Snip: renderPreamble → renderCoreMandates → ...
        Snip-->>PP: 조립된 basePrompt
    end
    PP->>Snip: renderFinalShell(basePrompt, userMemory)
    Snip->>Snip: renderUserMemory(memory, filenames)
    Snip-->>PP: finalPrompt

    Note over Client,MD: --- GEMINI.md 로딩 (별도 초기화 단계) ---
    Client->>CM: refresh()
    CM->>MD: getGlobalMemoryPaths()
    CM->>MD: getExtensionMemoryPaths()
    CM->>MD: getEnvironmentMemoryPaths()
    MD-->>CM: 계층별 파일 경로
    CM->>MD: readGeminiMdFiles(allPaths)
    CM->>CM: categorizeMemoryContents()
    CM-->>Client: HierarchicalMemory {global, extension, project}

기술 참조

프롬프트 입력 채널

Gemini CLI는 Codex처럼 developer/user 채널을 분리하지 않는다. 대신 모든 것이 하나의 system instruction 문자열과 첫 번째 user message로 나뉜다.

채널 소스 들어가는 위치 의미
system instruction PromptProvider.getCoreSystemPrompt() Gemini API systemInstruction 파라미터 전체 행동 규칙과 워크플로우
environment context environmentContext.ts 첫 번째 user message <session_context> 날짜, OS, 디렉토리 구조, 프로젝트 메모리
GEMINI.md (system) renderUserMemory() → system instruction 끝 <loaded_context> 블록 Global 메모리 (JIT 비활성 시 전체 메모리)
GEMINI.md (session) getEnvironmentContext() → user message <session_context> 안 Extension + Project 메모리 (JIT 활성 시)
JIT context jit-context.ts → 도구 출력에 append 도구 응답 뒤 --- Newly Discovered Project Context --- 서브디렉토리 GEMINI.md
MCP instructions ContextManager.categorizeMemoryContents() project memory에 합산 MCP 서버가 제공하는 지시문

system instruction 조립 순서

snippets.ts의 getCoreSystemPrompt() 함수에서 각 렌더러가 호출되는 순서:

순서 렌더러 조건 역할
1 renderPreamble() 항상 "You are Gemini CLI..." 역할 선언
2 renderCoreMandates() 항상 보안, 컨텍스트 효율성, 엔지니어링 표준
3 renderSubAgents() 서브 에이전트 존재 시 전략적 오케스트레이션 위임 규칙
4 renderAgentSkills() 스킬 존재 시 activate_skill 도구를 통한 스킬 활성화 안내
5 renderHookContext() 환경변수 활성 시 외부 hook 컨텍스트 처리 규칙
6 renderPrimaryWorkflows() 또는 renderPlanningWorkflow() approval mode에 따라 택일 Research → Strategy → Execution 라이프사이클
7 renderTaskTracker() tracker 활성 시 .tracker/tasks/ 기반 작업 관리 프로토콜
8 renderOperationalGuidelines() 항상 톤, 보안, 도구 사용, 상호작용 규칙
9 renderInteractiveYoloMode() YOLO 모드 시 자율 실행 모드 규칙
10 renderSandbox() 샌드박스 활성 시 macOS seatbelt / 컨테이너 제약 안내
11 renderGitRepo() git 레포 내 실행 시 커밋/푸시 관련 규칙
12 renderUserMemory() GEMINI.md 내용 존재 시 <loaded_context> 블록

이 순서는 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/prompts/snippets.ts의 getCoreSystemPrompt() 함수에서 직접 확인 가능하다:

// snippets.ts:121-149
export function getCoreSystemPrompt(options: SystemPromptOptions): string {
  return `
${renderPreamble(options.preamble)}
${renderCoreMandates(options.coreMandates)}
${renderSubAgents(options.subAgents)}
${renderAgentSkills(options.agentSkills)}
${renderHookContext(options.hookContext)}
${options.planningWorkflow
    ? renderPlanningWorkflow(options.planningWorkflow)
    : renderPrimaryWorkflows(options.primaryWorkflows)}
${options.taskTracker ? renderTaskTracker() : ''}
${renderOperationalGuidelines(options.operationalGuidelines)}
${renderInteractiveYoloMode(options.interactiveYoloMode)}
${renderSandbox(options.sandbox)}
${renderGitRepo(options.gitRepo)}
`.trim();
}

Preamble — 역할 선언

// snippets.ts:168-173
export function renderPreamble(options?: PreambleOptions): string {
  if (!options) return '';
  return options.interactive
    ? 'You are Gemini CLI, an interactive CLI agent specializing in software engineering tasks...'
    : 'You are Gemini CLI, an autonomous CLI agent specializing in software engineering tasks...';
}

interactive 모드 여부에 따라 한 줄짜리 역할 선언이 달라진다. Codex의 base instructions가 별도 .md 파일인 것과 대조적으로, 여기서는 TypeScript 문자열 리터럴 하나다.

Core Mandates — 핵심 행동 규칙

renderCoreMandates()는 system instruction에서 가장 긴 섹션을 생성한다. 주요 하위 블록:

  • Security & System Integrity: 자격 증명 보호, 소스 제어 규칙
  • Context Efficiency: <estimating_context_usage>, <guidelines>, <examples> XML 블록으로 감싸진 컨텍스트 사용 최적화 지침. SWEBench 벤치마크 기반으로 튜닝됨
  • Engineering Standards: GEMINI.md 우선순위, 코딩 규칙, 테스팅 의무, Directive vs Inquiry 구분
// snippets.ts:229 (일부)
- **Contextual Precedence:** Instructions found in ${formattedFilenames} files are foundational mandates.
  They take absolute precedence over the general workflows and tool defaults described in this system prompt.

GEMINI.md 로딩 — 3-Tier 계층 구조

Gemini CLI의 GEMINI.md 로딩은 ContextManager가 관리하며, Codex의 AGENTS.md보다 훨씬 정교한 계층 구조를 갖는다.

Tier 범위 소스 경로 로딩 시점
Tier 1 (Global) 사용자 전역 ~/.gemini/GEMINI.md 세션 초기화 시 ContextManager.refresh()
Tier 1.5 (Extension) 확장 기능별 확장의 contextFiles 세션 초기화 시
Tier 2 (Project) 프로젝트 루트 ~ CWD CWD 상위 탐색 + BFS 하위 탐색 세션 초기화 시
Tier 3 (JIT) 서브디렉토리 도구가 접근한 경로의 상위 탐색 도구 실행 시점 동적 로드

우선순위: Sub-directories > Workspace Root > Extensions > Global

// contextManager.ts:36-44
async refresh(): Promise<void> {
  this.loadedPaths.clear();
  this.loadedFileIdentities.clear();
  const paths = await this.discoverMemoryPaths();
  const contentsMap = await this.loadMemoryContents(paths);
  this.categorizeMemoryContents(paths, contentsMap);
  this.emitMemoryChanged();
}

프로젝트 메모리 탐색은 memoryDiscovery.ts의 getGeminiMdFilePathsInternalForEachDir()에서 수행된다:

  1. .git 기반으로 프로젝트 루트를 찾는다 (findProjectRoot())
  2. CWD에서 프로젝트 루트까지 상위 탐색 (upward traversal)
  3. CWD 아래 BFS 하위 탐색 (bfsFileSearch(), 최대 200 디렉토리)
  4. 발견된 파일들을 readGeminiMdFiles()로 읽고 processImports()로 import 처리

JIT Context — 동적 서브디렉토리 로딩

JIT는 Gemini CLI만의 독특한 메커니즘이다. read_file, write_file, list_directory 등 "high-intent" 도구가 특정 경로에 접근하면, 해당 경로에서 프로젝트 루트까지 아직 로드되지 않은 GEMINI.md 파일을 찾아 도구 출력에 자동 append한다.

// jit-context.ts:20-41
export async function discoverJitContext(config: Config, accessedPath: string): Promise<string> {
  if (!config.isJitContextEnabled?.()) return '';
  const contextManager = config.getContextManager();
  if (!contextManager) return '';
  const trustedRoots = [...config.getWorkspaceContext().getDirectories()];
  return await contextManager.discoverContext(accessedPath, trustedRoots);
}

도구 출력에 붙는 형식:

[도구 원본 출력]

--- Newly Discovered Project Context ---
--- Context from: /app/src/GEMINI.md ---
[GEMINI.md 내용]
--- End of Context from: /app/src/GEMINI.md ---
--- End Project Context ---

HierarchicalMemory — 계층별 렌더링

JIT가 활성화되면 메모리가 HierarchicalMemory 객체로 분류되어 XML 태그로 감싸진다:

// snippets.ts:509-527
if (memory.global?.trim()) {
  sections.push(`<global_context>\n${memory.global.trim()}\n</global_context>`);
}
if (memory.extension?.trim()) {
  sections.push(`<extension_context>\n${memory.extension.trim()}\n</extension_context>`);
}
if (memory.project?.trim()) {
  sections.push(`<project_context>\n${memory.project.trim()}\n</project_context>`);
}

JIT가 비활성화되면 모든 메모리가 flat 문자열로 합쳐져 system instruction 끝의 # Contextual Instructions (GEMINI.md) 아래 <loaded_context> 블록에 들어간다.

Environment Context — 첫 번째 User Message

system instruction과 별도로, 첫 번째 user message에 세션 컨텍스트가 주입된다:

// environmentContext.ts:72-80
const context = `
<session_context>
This is the Gemini CLI. We are setting up the context for our chat.
Today's date is ${today} (formatted according to the user's locale).
My operating system is: ${platform}
The project's temporary directory is: ${tempDir}
${directoryContext}
${environmentMemory}
</session_context>`.trim();

여기에 포함되는 정보:

  • 오늘 날짜 (로캘 포맷)
  • OS 플랫폼
  • 프로젝트 임시 디렉토리
  • 디렉토리 트리 구조 (getFolderStructure())
  • 환경 메모리 (JIT 활성 시: Extension + Project, 비활성 시: Project만)

토큰 관리와 컨텍스트 윈도우

토큰 한도

Gemini CLI는 모든 모델에 대해 동일한 1M 토큰 한도를 적용한다:

// tokenLimits.ts:18
export const DEFAULT_TOKEN_LIMIT = 1_048_576;

토큰 추정

tokenCalculation.ts의 휴리스틱 추정 방식:

콘텐츠 타입 추정 방식
ASCII 텍스트 문자당 0.25 토큰
비ASCII 텍스트 (CJK 포함) 문자당 1.3 토큰
이미지 고정 3,000 토큰
PDF 고정 25,800 토큰 (~100 페이지)
100,000자 초과 텍스트 length / 4 근사값 사용
미디어 포함 요청 countTokens API 호출 (실패 시 로컬 추정 폴백) 
// tokenCalculation.ts:35-49
function estimateTextTokens(text: string): number {
  if (text.length > MAX_CHARS_FOR_FULL_HEURISTIC) return text.length / 4;
  let tokens = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < text.length; i++) {
    if (text.charCodeAt(i) <= 127) tokens += ASCII_TOKENS_PER_CHAR;  // 0.25
    else tokens += NON_ASCII_TOKENS_PER_CHAR;  // 1.3
  }
  return tokens;
}

대화 압축 (Chat Compression)

컨텍스트가 토큰 한도의 50%를 초과하면 자동 압축이 트리거된다:

// chatCompressionService.ts:40-41
const DEFAULT_COMPRESSION_TOKEN_THRESHOLD = 0.5;  // 한도의 50%에서 트리거
const COMPRESSION_PRESERVE_THRESHOLD = 0.3;       // 최근 30% 보존
const COMPRESSION_FUNCTION_RESPONSE_TOKEN_BUDGET = 50_000;  // 도구 응답 보존 예산

압축 과정:

  1. 트리거 판단: lastPromptTokenCount > threshold × tokenLimit(model)
  2. 도구 출력 트렁케이션: 역순 순회하며 최근 도구 응답을 우선 보존, 50K 토큰 예산 초과 시 오래된 도구 응답을 30줄로 잘라 임시 파일에 저장
  3. 히스토리 분할: findCompressSplitPoint()가 user message 경계에서 분할 지점 결정
  4. LLM 요약: 분할된 앞부분을 별도 LLM에 보내 <state_snapshot> XML로 압축

압축 프롬프트는 getCompressionPrompt()에서 생성되며, 결과는 아래 XML 구조를 따른다:

<state_snapshot>
    <overall_goal>...</overall_goal>
    <active_constraints>...</active_constraints>
    <key_knowledge>...</key_knowledge>
    <artifact_trail>...</artifact_trail>
    <file_system_state>...</file_system_state>
    <recent_actions>...</recent_actions>
    <task_state>...</task_state>
</state_snapshot>

MCP Prompt 통합

MCP 프롬프트는 두 경로로 시스템에 들어온다:

1. PromptRegistry — 프롬프트 등록소

// prompt-registry.ts:10-11
export class PromptRegistry {
  private prompts: Map<string, DiscoveredMCPPrompt> = new Map();

PromptRegistry는 MCP 서버에서 발견된 프롬프트 정의를 이름으로 관리한다. 이름 충돌 시 ${serverName}_${promptName} 형식으로 자동 리네이밍된다.

2. MCP Instructions — 프로젝트 메모리에 합산

MCP 서버가 제공하는 instructions는 ContextManager.categorizeMemoryContents()에서 프로젝트 메모리에 합산된다:

// contextManager.ts:106-117
const mcpInstructions = this.config.getMcpClientManager()?.getMcpInstructions() || '';
const projectMemoryWithMcp = [
  hierarchicalMemory.project,
  mcpInstructions.trimStart(),
].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n');

커스텀 시스템 프롬프트 오버라이드

GEMINI_SYSTEM_MD 환경변수를 통해 전체 시스템 프롬프트를 커스텀 파일로 교체할 수 있다:

환경변수 값 동작
true / 1 ~/.gemini/system.md 파일 사용
false / 0 오버라이드 비활성화 (기본 조립 사용)
파일 경로 해당 경로의 파일을 템플릿으로 사용

커스텀 파일 안에서 ${AgentSkills}, ${SubAgents}, ${AvailableTools} 등의 치환 변수를 사용할 수 있다:

// utils.ts:72-103
result = result.replace(/\${AgentSkills}/g, skillsPrompt);
result = result.replace(/\${SubAgents}/g, subAgentsContent);
result = result.replace(/\${AvailableTools}/g, availableToolsList);

섹션별 환경변수 제어

각 프롬프트 섹션은 GEMINI_PROMPT_${SECTION} 환경변수로 개별 비활성화할 수 있다:

// utils.ts:109-113
export function isSectionEnabled(key: string): boolean {
  const envVar = process.env[`GEMINI_PROMPT_${key.toUpperCase()}`];
  const lowerEnvVar = envVar?.trim().toLowerCase();
  return lowerEnvVar !== '0' && lowerEnvVar !== 'false';
}

예: GEMINI_PROMPT_SANDBOX=false로 설정하면 sandbox 관련 프롬프트 섹션이 생략된다.

Modern vs Legacy 프롬프트

모델 세대에 따라 다른 snippet 세트를 사용한다:

// promptProvider.ts:69-71
const isModernModel = supportsModernFeatures(desiredModel);
const activeSnippets = isModernModel ? snippets : legacySnippets;

snippets.ts는 Gemini 3 이상, snippets.legacy.ts는 Gemini 2.5 이하용이다. finalReminder 섹션은 레거시 모델에서만 추가된다.

Codex 대비 구조 비교

관점 Codex Gemini CLI
프롬프트 텍스트 위치 default.md 별도 파일 TypeScript 템플릿 리터럴 내장
역할 분리 developer / user 채널 분리 단일 system instruction
로컬 지시문 파일 AGENTS.md → user role fragment GEMINI.md → system instruction 끝 <loaded_context>
지시문 계층 구조 단일 AGENTS.md 체인 Global → Extension → Project → JIT 4-tier
동적 컨텍스트 로딩 없음 JIT Context (도구 접근 시)
토큰 한도 모델별 다양 전 모델 1M 통일
대화 압축 history reconstruction LLM 기반 <state_snapshot> 요약
MCP 지시문 별도 경로 없음 프로젝트 메모리에 합산
섹션별 제어 없음 GEMINI_PROMPT_* 환경변수
커스텀 오버라이드 없음 GEMINI_SYSTEM_MD 환경변수

포크 관점의 해석

  • 프롬프트가 TypeScript 함수 안에 있어서 텍스트만 따로 추출하기 어렵다
  • 3-tier GEMINI.md 계층 구조는 대규모 모노레포에서 유용하다
  • JIT Context는 초기 로딩 부담을 줄이면서 필요한 시점에 컨텍스트를 제공하는 영리한 접근이다
  • <state_snapshot> 기반 압축은 Codex의 history reconstruction보다 정보 보존이 풍부하다
  • 섹션별 환경변수 제어는 디버깅과 A/B 테스트에 유용하다
  • Modern/Legacy 분기가 장기적으로 코드 복잡도를 높일 수 있다
  • MCP instructions를 프로젝트 메모리에 합산하는 방식은 우선순위 혼동을 일으킬 수 있다

핵심 파일 목록

  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/prompts/promptProvider.ts — 프롬프트 조립 오케스트레이터
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/prompts/snippets.ts — 모던 모델용 프롬프트 렌더러 (60KB)
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/prompts/snippets.legacy.ts — 레거시 모델용 프롬프트 렌더러 (50KB)
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/prompts/utils.ts — 경로 해석, 치환, 섹션 활성화 유틸
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/prompts/prompt-registry.ts — MCP 프롬프트 등록소
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/prompts/mcp-prompts.ts — MCP 서버별 프롬프트 조회
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/services/contextManager.ts — 계층적 GEMINI.md 로딩 관리
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/utils/memoryDiscovery.ts — 파일 탐색, 읽기, import 처리
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/utils/environmentContext.ts — 첫 번째 user message 생성
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/utils/tokenCalculation.ts — 휴리스틱 토큰 추정
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/core/tokenLimits.ts — 모델별 토큰 한도
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/services/chatCompressionService.ts — 대화 히스토리 압축
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/memoryTool.ts — GEMINI.md 파일명 관리, 메모리 저장
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/jit-context.ts — JIT 컨텍스트 발견 및 도구 출력 append
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/config/memory.ts — HierarchicalMemory 타입 정의

이전 문서: [[02_co_prompt]] 다음 문서: [[03_ge_tool]]

snapshot_to_current 델타

Area Snapshot Current
Prompt assembly Paths cited in-body Re-verify on harness upgrade
Context files Documented merge rules Host file conventions may drift

변경 기록

  • 2026-03-26: 초기 작성. PromptProvider 조립 파이프라인, GEMINI.md 3-tier 계층 로딩, JIT Context, 토큰 관리, 대화 압축, MCP 통합을 정리했다.
23

Axis 03: Tool runtime

AXIS

003_tool-runtime/03_ge_tool.md

Overview

Axis 03: Tool runtime — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • 분석 스냅샷: 130_gemini-cli/ — tool registry and execution pipeline.

  • Gemini CLI의 툴 시스템은 TypeScript로 작성된 선언형(declarative) 아키텍처다. 핵심 구조는 DeclarativeTool → build() → ToolInvocation → execute()의 4단계 파이프라인이며, 각 도구는 스키마 선언, 파라미터 검증, 승인 정책 판정, 실행을 분리된 계층으로 처리한다.
  • 이 설계가 중요한 이유는 "모델이 함수를 호출하면 handler가 바로 실행된다"는 단순 구조가 아니라, 정책 엔진(PolicyEngine)과 승인 버스(MessageBus)가 실행 전에 개입하기 때문이다. 모든 도구는 Kind enum으로 분류되어 읽기 전용 여부가 자동 판별되고, MCP 도구와 내장 도구가 동일한 ToolRegistry에 공존하며, Scheduler가 병렬·순차 실행을 `wait_for_previou
  • Codex의 Rust 기반 ToolRouter → ToolRegistry → ToolCallRuntime 3계층과 비교하면, Gemini CLI는 ToolRegistry → Scheduler → ToolInvocation 구조로 더 단순하다. 라우터가 별도로 존재하지 않고, Scheduler가 registry에서 도구를 꺼내 build-validate-confirm-execute를 일괄 처리한다.
  • graph TD
  • A["모델 응답: FunctionCall[]"] --> B["Scheduler.schedule()"]
  • B --> C["ToolRegistry.getTool(name)"]
  • C --> D["DeclarativeTool.build(params)"]
  • D --> E["파라미터 검증 + ToolInvocation 생성"]
  • E --> F["shouldConfirmExecute() → PolicyEngine"]
  • F --> G{승인 판정}
  • G -->|allow| H["ToolInvocation.execute()"]

Topics covered

  • 전체 Tool 카탈로그
  • Kind enum에 의한 분류
  • 내장 Tool 목록
  • Tool 등록/디스패치 파이프라인 (4단계)
  • Stage 1: Tool 선언 — ToolDefinition + CoreToolSet
  • Stage 2: Tool 등록 — ToolRegistry
  • Stage 3: 빌드와 검증 — DeclarativeTool.build()
  • Stage 4: Approval과 실행 — ToolInvocation.execute()
  • 셸 실행과 Sandbox Integration
  • 명령어 래핑과 프로세스 관리
  • Sandbox Integration
  • 백그라운드 실행
  • 비활성 타임아웃
  • 파일 편집 Tool

Source code snippets

README / docs

graph TD
    A["모델 응답: FunctionCall[]"] --> B["Scheduler.schedule()"]
    B --> C["ToolRegistry.getTool(name)"]
    C --> D["DeclarativeTool.build(params)"]
    D --> E["파라미터 검증 + ToolInvocation 생성"]
    E --> F["shouldConfirmExecute() → PolicyEngine"]
    F --> G{승인 판정}
    G -->|allow| H["ToolInvocation.execute()"]
    G -->|ask_user| I["사용자 확인 UI"]
    G -->|deny| J["실행 거부 → 에러 반환"]
    I -->|승인| H
    H --> K["ToolResult → 모델 히스토리"]

README / docs

sequenceDiagram
    participant Model as 모델
    participant Sched as Scheduler
    participant Reg as ToolRegistry
    participant Tool as DeclarativeTool
    participant Inv as ToolInvocation
    participant Policy as PolicyEngine

    Model->>Sched: FunctionCall(name, args)
    Sched->>Reg: getTool(name)
    Reg-->>Sched: DeclarativeTool 인스턴스
    Sched->>Tool: build(args)
    Tool->>Tool: validateToolParams(args)
    Tool-->>Sched: ToolInvocation
    Sched->>Policy: shouldConfirmExecute()
    Policy-->>Sched: allow / ask_user / deny
    Sched->>Inv: execute(signal)
    Inv-->>Sched: ToolResult
    Sched-->>Model: FunctionResponse

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/tools.ts
export enum Kind {
  Read = 'read',
  Edit = 'edit',
  Delete = 'delete',
  Move = 'move',
  Search = 'search',
  Execute = 'execute',
  Think = 'think',
  Agent = 'agent',
  Fetch = 'fetch',
  Communicate = 'communicate',
  Plan = 'plan',
  SwitchMode = 'switch_mode',
  Other = 'other',
}

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/definitions/types.ts
export interface ToolDefinition {
  base: FunctionDeclaration;
  overrides?: (modelId: string) => Partial<FunctionDeclaration> | undefined;
}

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/definitions/resolver.ts
export function resolveToolDeclaration(
  definition: ToolDefinition,
  modelId?: string,
): FunctionDeclaration {
  if (!modelId || !definition.overrides) return definition.base;
  const override = definition.overrides(modelId);
  return override ? { ...definition.base, ...override } : definition.base;
}

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/tool-registry.ts
sortTools(): void {
  const getPriority = (tool: AnyDeclarativeTool): number => {
    if (tool instanceof DiscoveredMCPTool) return 2;  // MCP 도구
    if (tool instanceof DiscoveredTool) return 1;      // 발견된 도구
    return 0;                                          // 내장 도구
  };
  // ...
}

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/tools.ts
export abstract class BaseDeclarativeTool<TParams, TResult> {
  build(params: TParams): ToolInvocation<TParams, TResult> {
    const validationError = this.validateToolParams(params);
    if (validationError) throw new Error(validationError);
    return this.createInvocation(params, this.messageBus, this.name, this.displayName);
  }
}

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/tools.ts
async shouldConfirmExecute(abortSignal, forcedDecision?) {
  // 1. auto-edit 모드면 즉시 허용 (읽기 도구 한정)
  // 2. MessageBus로 PolicyEngine에 질의
  // 3. 결과: 'allow' → 바로 실행, 'deny' → 예외, 'ask_user' → 확인 UI
  const decision = await this.getMessageBusDecision(abortSignal);
  if (decision === 'allow') return false;
  if (decision === 'deny') throw new Error('denied by policy');
  return this.getConfirmationDetails(abortSignal); // ask_user
}

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/shell.ts
const commandToExecute = isWindows
  ? strippedCommand
  : (() => {
      let command = strippedCommand.trim();
      if (!command.endsWith('&')) command += ';';
      // pgrep로 서브프로세스 PID를 추적하는 래퍼
      return `{ ${command} }; __code=$?; pgrep -g 0 >${tempFilePath} 2>&1; exit $__code;`;
    })();

README / docs

// 파일 접근 거부 패턴
const isFileDenial = [
  'operation not permitted', 'vim:e303', 'sandbox_apply', 'sandbox: '
].some(keyword => lowerOutput.includes(keyword));

// 네트워크 접근 거부 패턴
const isNetworkDenial = [
  'error connecting to', 'could not resolve host', 'connection refused'
].some(keyword => lowerOutput.includes(keyword));

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/edit.ts
export async function calculateReplacement(config, context): Promise<ReplacementResult> {
  // 1단계: 정확한 문자열 매칭 (exact)
  const exactResult = await calculateExactReplacement(context);
  if (exactResult) return exactResult;

  // 2단계: 공백 무시 유연 매칭 (flexible)
  const flexibleResult = await calculateFlexibleReplacement(context);
  if (flexibleResult) return flexibleResult;

  // 3단계: 정규식 기반 토큰 매칭 (regex)
  const regexResult = await calculateRegexReplacement(context);
  if (regexResult) return regexResult;

  // 4단계: 퍼지 매칭 (fuzzy, Levenshtein 거리 기반)
  if (ENABLE_FUZZY_MATCH_RECOVERY) {
    const fuzzyResult = await calculateFuzzyReplacement(config, context);
    if (fuzzyResult) return fuzzyResult;
  }

  return { newContent: currentContent, occurrences: 0, ... };
}

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/modifiable-tool.ts
export interface ModifyContext<ToolParams> {
  getFilePath: (params: ToolParams) => string;
  getCurrentContent: (params: ToolParams) => Promise<string>;
  getProposedContent: (params: ToolParams) => Promise<string>;
  createUpdatedParams: (oldContent, modifiedContent, originalParams) => ToolParams;
}

McpClientManager (다중 서버 관리)
  └── McpClient (단일 서버 연결)
       └── DiscoveredMCPTool (registry 등록용 선언)
            └── DiscoveredMCPToolInvocation (실행 인스턴스)

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/mcp-tool.ts
export function generateValidName(name: string) {
  let validToolname = name.startsWith('mcp_') ? name : `mcp_${name}`;
  validToolname = validToolname.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.:]/g, '_');
  // Gemini API 제한: 64자
  if (validToolname.length > 63) {
    validToolname = validToolname.slice(0, 30) + '...' + validToolname.slice(-30);
  }
  return validToolname;
}

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/mcp-client.ts
async discoverInto(cliConfig, registries): Promise<void> {
  const prompts = await this.fetchPrompts();
  const tools = await this.discoverTools(cliConfig, messageBus);
  const resources = await this.discoverResources();
  // ... registry에 등록 후 정렬
  registries.toolRegistry.sortTools();
}

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/mcp-tool.ts
async execute(signal: AbortSignal): Promise<ToolResult> {
  const rawResponseParts = await this.mcpTool.callTool(functionCalls);

  if (this.isMCPToolError(rawResponseParts)) {
    return { error: { type: ToolErrorType.MCP_TOOL_ERROR, ... } };
  }

  const transformedParts = transformMcpContentToParts(rawResponseParts);
  return { llmContent: transformedParts, ... };
}

README / docs

// 승인 선택지
ProceedAlwaysServer → 해당 서버의 모든 도구 허용
ProceedAlwaysTool   → 해당 도구만 허용
ProceedAlwaysAndSave → 허용 + 영구 정책 저장

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/tools.ts
private addWaitForPreviousParameter(schema: unknown): unknown {
  return {
    ...schema,
    properties: {
      ...propertiesObj,
      wait_for_previous: {
        type: 'boolean',
        description: 'Set to true to wait for all previously requested tools...',
      },
    },
  };
}

README / docs

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Validating: enqueue()
    Validating --> Error: hook 실패 / 파라미터 오류
    Validating --> AwaitingApproval: PolicyDecision.ASK_USER
    Validating --> Scheduled: PolicyDecision.ALLOW
    AwaitingApproval --> Scheduled: 사용자 승인
    AwaitingApproval --> Cancelled: 사용자 거부
    Scheduled --> Executing: 배치 내 모든 호출 ready
    Executing --> Success: 실행 완료
    Executing --> Error: 실행 오류
    Executing --> AwaitingApproval: sandbox_expansion_required
    Executing --> Cancelled: AbortSignal
    Success --> [*]: finalizeCall()
    Error --> [*]: finalizeCall()
    Cancelled --> [*]: finalizeCall()

README / docs

// scheduler.ts:405-527 — _processQueue + _processNextItem 루프
private async _processQueue(signal: AbortSignal): Promise<void> {
  while (this.state.queueLength > 0 || this.state.isActive) {
    const shouldContinue = await this._processNextItem(signal);
    if (!shouldContinue) break;
  }
}

private async _processNextItem(signal: AbortSignal): Promise<boolean> {
  // 1. AbortSignal 확인
  if (signal.aborted || this.isCancelling) {
    this.state.cancelAllQueued('Operation cancelled');
    return false;
  }
  
  // 2. 비활성 상태면 큐에서 다음 항목 가져오기
  if (!this.state.isActive) {
    const next = this.state.dequeue();
    if (!next) return false;
    
    // 병렬화 가능하면 연속된 parallelizable 도구를 모두 꺼냄
    if (this._isParallelizable(next.request)) {
      while (this.state.queueLength > 0) {
        const peeked = this.state.peekQueue();
        if (peeked && this._isParallelizable(peeked.request)) {
          this.state.dequeue();  // 배치에 추가
        } else break;
      }
    }
  }
  
  // 3. Validating 상태 → 정책/확인 처리 (병렬)
  const validatingCalls = activeCalls.filter(c => c.status === 'validating');
  await Promise.all(validatingCalls.map(c => this._processValidatingCall(c, signal)));
  
  // 4. Scheduled 상태 → 실행 (모든 활성 호출이 ready일 때만)
  const allReady = activeCalls.every(c => c.status === 'scheduled' || isTerminal(c));
  if (allReady && scheduledCalls.length > 0) {
    await Promise.all(scheduledCalls.map(c => this._execute(c, signal)));
  }
  
  // 5. Terminal 상태 호출 최종화
  for (const call of activeCalls) {
    if (isTerminal(call.status)) {
      this.state.finalizeCall(call.request.callId);
    }
  }
  
  // 6. 외부 이벤트 대기 (AwaitingApproval, Executing)
  if (isWaitingForExternal && this.state.isActive) {
    await new Promise(resolve => queueMicrotask(() => resolve(true)));
    return true;  // 이벤트 루프 양보 후 재시도
  }
  
  return madeProgress || anyStatusChanged;
}

README / docs

// scheduler.ts:529-539
private _isParallelizable(request: ToolCallRequestInfo): boolean {
  if (request.args) {
    const wait = request.args['wait_for_previous'];
    if (typeof wait === 'boolean') return !wait;
  }
  return true;  // 기본값: 병렬 실행
}

README / docs

sequenceDiagram
    participant S as Scheduler._execute()
    participant E as ToolExecutor
    participant SM as SandboxManager
    participant U as 사용자

    S->>E: execute(call)
    E->>SM: runInSandbox(command)
    SM-->>E: sandbox_expansion_required
    E-->>S: Error { errorType: 'sandbox_expansion_required', additionalPermissions }
    S->>S: JSON.parse(sandboxDetailsStr)
    S->>U: resolveConfirmation(sandbox_expansion 상세)
    U-->>S: ProceedOnce
    S->>S: 인자에 additional_permissions 추가
    S->>S: _execute(재시도) ← 재귀 호출
    S->>E: execute(수정된 call)
    E-->>S: Success

README / docs

// scheduler.ts:800-920 — 샌드박스 확장 재시도
if (result.status === CoreToolCallStatus.Error 
    && result.response.errorType === 'sandbox_expansion_required') {
  
  const parsedError = JSON.parse(sandboxDetailsStr);
  // { rootCommand: string, additionalPermissions: SandboxPermissions }
  
  const confirmationDetails = {
    type: 'sandbox_expansion',
    title: 'Sandbox Expansion Request',
    command: activeCall.request.args['command'] ?? parsedError.rootCommand,
    rootCommand: parsedError.rootCommand,
    additionalPermissions: parsedError.additionalPermissions,
  };
  
  // 사용자에게 확장 확인 요청
  activeCall.request.args['additional_permissions'] = parsedError.additionalPermissions;
  activeCall.invocation = activeCall.tool.build(activeCall.request.args);  // 재빌드
  
  this.state.updateStatus(callId, CoreToolCallStatus.AwaitingApproval, {
    confirmationDetails, correlationId
  });
  
  const confResult = await resolveConfirmation(validatingCall, signal, { ... });
  
  if (confResult.outcome === ToolConfirmationOutcome.Cancel) {
    // 사용자 거부 → 에러로 처리
    errorResponse.llmContent = 
      'User cancelled sandbox expansion. The command failed with a sandbox denial.';
    this.state.updateStatus(callId, CoreToolCallStatus.Error, errorResponse);
    return false;
  }
  
  // 출력 스트림 초기화 후 재실행
  this.state.updateStatus(callId, CoreToolCallStatus.Executing, { liveOutput: undefined });
  return await this._execute({ ...activeCall, status: 'scheduled' }, signal);  // ← 재귀!
}

README / docs

// scheduler.ts:737-794 — tailToolCallRequest 처리
if ((result.status === 'success' || result.status === 'error')
    && result.tailToolCallRequest) {
  
  // 중간 도구 호출을 먼저 로깅
  const intermediateCall = { ...activeCall, status: result.status, response: result.response };
  logToolCall(this.config, new ToolCallEvent(intermediateCall));
  
  // 테일 콜 요청 생성 — 같은 callId 재사용!
  const newRequest: ToolCallRequestInfo = {
    callId: originalCallId,           // ← 원래 callId 유지
    name: tailRequest.name,
    args: tailRequest.args,
    originalRequestName,              // ← 원래 요청 이름 보존
    originalRequestArgs: result.request.originalRequestArgs ?? result.request.args,
  };
  
  const newTool = this.context.toolRegistry.getTool(tailRequest.name);
  const validatingCall = this._validateAndCreateToolCall(newRequest, newTool, approvalMode);
  
  // 활성 호출을 테일 콜로 교체
  this.state.replaceActiveCallWithTailCall(callId, validatingCall);
  return true;  // 루프 계속 → 테일 콜이 큐 앞에 배치됨
}

README / docs

// policy.ts:113-164 — updatePolicy
export async function updatePolicy(tool, outcome, confirmationDetails, context, messageBus, toolInvocation) {
  // 1. AUTO_EDIT 모드 전환 — 편집 도구에 "항상 허용" 시 세션 전체 자동 승인
  if (isAutoEditTransition(tool, outcome)) {
    context.config.setApprovalMode(ApprovalMode.AUTO_EDIT);
    return;
  }
  
  // 2. 지속성 범위 결정
  let persistScope: 'workspace' | 'user' | undefined;
  if (outcome === ToolConfirmationOutcome.ProceedAlwaysAndSave) {
    if (config.isTrustedFolder() && config.getWorkspacePoliciesDir()) {
      persistScope = 'workspace';  // 신뢰 폴더 → workspace 범위
    } else {
      persistScope = 'user';       // 그 외 → user 범위
    }
  }
  
  // 3. MCP 도구 vs 표준 도구 분기
  if (confirmationDetails?.type === 'mcp') {
    handleMcpPolicyUpdate(tool, outcome, confirmationDetails, messageBus, persistScope);
    return;
  }
  handleStandardPolicyUpdate(tool, outcome, confirmationDetails, messageBus, persistScope, ...);
}

README / docs

// policy.ts:250-251 — MCP 서버 전체 허용
if (outcome === ToolConfirmationOutcome.ProceedAlwaysServer) {
  toolName = formatMcpToolName(confirmationDetails.serverName, '*');
  // → "mcp__serverName__*" 패턴으로 서버의 모든 도구 허용
}

// policy.ts:78-87 — 클라이언트 발행 호출 바이패스
if (decision === PolicyDecision.ASK_USER
    && toolCall.request.isClientInitiated
    && !toolCall.request.args?.['additional_permissions']) {
  return { decision: PolicyDecision.ALLOW, rule: result.rule };
}

README / docs

// scheduler.ts:573-607 — _processToolCall 내부
// 1. BeforeTool 훅 평가
const hookResult = await evaluateBeforeToolHook(
  this.config, toolCall.tool, toolCall.request, toolCall.invocation
);

if (hookResult.status === 'error') {
  // 훅이 에러를 반환하면 도구 실행 차단
  this.state.updateStatus(callId, CoreToolCallStatus.Error, ...);
  return;
}

// 훅이 인자를 수정할 수 있음
if (modifiedArgs && newInvocation) {
  toolCall.request.args = modifiedArgs;
  toolCall.request.inputModifiedByHook = true;  // 수정 사실 기록
  toolCall.invocation = newInvocation;
}

// 훅이 'ask' 결정을 내리면 정책과 무관하게 사용자 확인 강제
if (hookDecision === 'ask') {
  decision = PolicyDecision.ASK_USER;
}

Main analysis

Tool registry and execution pipeline

Analysis snapshot: 130_gemini-cli/ — tool registry and execution pipeline.

Gemini CLI's tool system is a declarative architecture written in TypeScript. The core structure is a four-stage pipeline of DeclarativeTool → build() → ToolInvocation → execute(), and each tool processes schema declaration, parameter verification, approval policy decision, and execution as separate layers.

The reason why this design is important is because it is not a simple structure of “when the model calls a function, the handler is executed immediately,” but the policy engine (PolicyEngine) and approval bus (MessageBus) intervene before execution. All tools are classified into the Kind enum and read-only status is automatically determined, MCP tools and built-in tools coexist in the same ToolRegistry, and the scheduler controls parallel and sequential execution with the wait_for_previous parameter.

Compared to Codex's Rust-based three-layer structure of ToolRouter → ToolRegistry → ToolCallRuntime, Gemini CLI has a simpler structure of ToolRegistry → Scheduler → ToolInvocation. There is no separate router, and the scheduler pulls a tool from the registry and processes build-validate-confirm-execute in batches.

graph TD
    A["모델 응답: FunctionCall[]"] --> B["Scheduler.schedule()"]
    B --> C["ToolRegistry.getTool(name)"]
    C --> D["DeclarativeTool.build(params)"]
    D --> E["파라미터 검증 + ToolInvocation 생성"]
    E --> F["shouldConfirmExecute() → PolicyEngine"]
    F --> G{승인 판정}
    G -->|allow| H["ToolInvocation.execute()"]
    G -->|ask_user| I["사용자 확인 UI"]
    G -->|deny| J["실행 거부 → 에러 반환"]
    I -->|승인| H
    H --> K["ToolResult → 모델 히스토리"]

sequenceDiagram
    participant Model as 모델
    participant Sched as Scheduler
    participant Reg as ToolRegistry
    participant Tool as DeclarativeTool
    participant Inv as ToolInvocation
    participant Policy as PolicyEngine

    Model->>Sched: FunctionCall(name, args)
    Sched->>Reg: getTool(name)
    Reg-->>Sched: DeclarativeTool 인스턴스
    Sched->>Tool: build(args)
    Tool->>Tool: validateToolParams(args)
    Tool-->>Sched: ToolInvocation
    Sched->>Policy: shouldConfirmExecute()
    Policy-->>Sched: allow / ask_user / deny
    Sched->>Inv: execute(signal)
    Inv-->>Sched: ToolResult
    Sched-->>Model: FunctionResponse

Full tool catalog

Classification by Kind enum

The Kind enum determines the nature of the tool, and the Read | Search | Fetch automatically determines isReadOnly = true.

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/tools.ts
export enum Kind {
  Read = 'read',
  Edit = 'edit',
  Delete = 'delete',
  Move = 'move',
  Search = 'search',
  Execute = 'execute',
  Think = 'think',
  Agent = 'agent',
  Fetch = 'fetch',
  Communicate = 'communicate',
  Plan = 'plan',
  SwitchMode = 'switch_mode',
  Other = 'other',
}

List of built-in tools

Series Tool name Kind file Description
Read file read_file Read read-file.ts Single file reading, line number range support
read_many_files Read read-many-files.ts Batch read multiple files with glob pattern
list_directory Read ls.ts Directory listing, recursive traversal
Edit File replace (edit) Edit edit.ts old_string→new_string replacement, 4-step matching
write_file Edit write-file.ts Write or create entire file
Search grep_search Search grep.ts ripgrep based regular expression search
glob Search glob.ts File name pattern matching
Run run_shell_command Execute shell.ts Shell command execution, background support
Web google_web_search Fetch web-search.ts Gemini API-based web search
web_fetch Fetch web-fetch.ts Get URL content, convert HTML to text
Memory save_memory Edit memoryTool.ts Save facts in GEMINI.md
write_todos Other write-todos.ts To-do list management
Task Tracking tracker_create_task Other trackerTools.ts Create hierarchical tasks
tracker_update_task Other trackerTools.ts Update job status
tracker_get_task Read trackerTools.ts Job Inquiry
tracker_list_tasks Read trackerTools.ts Full task list
tracker_add_dependency Other trackerTools.ts Add task dependency
tracker_visualize Read trackerTools.ts Task Graph Visualization
Dialogue ask_user Communicate ask-user.ts Question to user (optional/free input)
Plan enter_plan_mode Plan enter-plan-mode.ts Enter planning mode
exit_plan_mode SwitchMode exit-plan-mode.ts Turn off planning mode
Skill activate_skill Other activate-skill.ts Project skill activation
Internal Document get_internal_docs Read get-internal-docs.ts CLI built-in document lookup
External MCP tools (mcp_*) Other mcp-tool.ts Dynamically discovered tools on MCP server
Discovery Discovered tools (discovered_tool_*) Other tool-registry.ts Tools discovered with custom discovery commands

Tool Registration/Dispatch Pipeline (Step 4)

Stage 1: Tool declaration — ToolDefinition + CoreToolSet

All tools wrap the FunctionDeclaration schema in a ToolDefinition structure. The schema can be overridden depending on the model family.

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/definitions/types.ts
export interface ToolDefinition {
  base: FunctionDeclaration;
  overrides?: (modelId: string) => Partial<FunctionDeclaration> | undefined;
}

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/definitions/resolver.ts
export function resolveToolDeclaration(
  definition: ToolDefinition,
  modelId?: string,
): FunctionDeclaration {
  if (!modelId || !definition.overrides) return definition.base;
  const override = definition.overrides(modelId);
  return override ? { ...definition.base, ...override } : definition.base;
}

CoreToolSet provides two model family sets, default-legacy and gemini-3, and select the appropriate set with getToolSet(modelId).

Stage 2: Tool Registration — ToolRegistry

ToolRegistry manages all tools with Map<string, AnyDeclarativeTool>. There are three tiers of tools:

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/tool-registry.ts
sortTools(): void {
  const getPriority = (tool: AnyDeclarativeTool): number => {
    if (tool instanceof DiscoveredMCPTool) return 2;  // MCP 도구
    if (tool instanceof DiscoveredTool) return 1;      // 발견된 도구
    return 0;                                          // 내장 도구
  };
  // ...
}
  • Built-in tools (priority 0): Core tools defined directly in the code
  • Discovered tools (priority 1): Tools discovered externally by setting toolDiscoveryCommand
  • MCP Tools (priority 2): Tools dynamically discovered by the MCP server.

Legacy aliases are also supported. Mappings such as search_file_content → grep_search are defined in TOOL_LEGACY_ALIASES, so the tool can be found by its previous name.

The tool exclusion system filters out getActiveTools() based on the set of names returned by config.getExcludeTools().

Stage 3: Build and Verify — DeclarativeTool.build()

When the Scheduler finds a tool with toolRegistry.getTool(name), it calls tool.build(params). This method:

  1. Validate JSON schema with SchemaValidator.validate()
  2. Additional validation for each tool with validateToolParamValues()
  3. Create an executable ToolInvocation instance with createInvocation()
// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/tools.ts
export abstract class BaseDeclarativeTool<TParams, TResult> {
  build(params: TParams): ToolInvocation<TParams, TResult> {
    const validationError = this.validateToolParams(params);
    if (validationError) throw new Error(validationError);
    return this.createInvocation(params, this.messageBus, this.name, this.displayName);
  }
}

If verification fails, a ToolErrorType.INVALID_TOOL_PARAMS error is returned to the model.

Stage 4: Acknowledgment and execution — ToolInvocation.execute()

Before execution, shouldConfirmExecute() performs a policy decision:

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/tools.ts
async shouldConfirmExecute(abortSignal, forcedDecision?) {
  // 1. auto-edit 모드면 즉시 허용 (읽기 도구 한정)
  // 2. MessageBus로 PolicyEngine에 질의
  // 3. 결과: 'allow' → 바로 실행, 'deny' → 예외, 'ask_user' → 확인 UI
  const decision = await this.getMessageBusDecision(abortSignal);
  if (decision === 'allow') return false;
  if (decision === 'deny') throw new Error('denied by policy');
  return this.getConfirmationDetails(abortSignal); // ask_user
}

After approval, execute(signal, updateOutput?, options?) is called. Cancellation is controlled with AbortSignal, and streaming output is delivered to the UI with updateOutput callback.

Shell execution and sandbox integration

ShellToolInvocation is the most complex tool implementation. Key features:

Command wrapping and process management

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/shell.ts
const commandToExecute = isWindows
  ? strippedCommand
  : (() => {
      let command = strippedCommand.trim();
      if (!command.endsWith('&')) command += ';';
      // pgrep로 서브프로세스 PID를 추적하는 래퍼
      return `{ ${command} }; __code=$?; pgrep -g 0 >${tempFilePath} 2>&1; exit $__code;`;
    })();

On Unix, collect background process PIDs with pgrep by wrapping the command. Through this, subprocesses that remain even after the command ends are tracked.

Sandbox integration

Pass sandboxManager to ShellExecutionService.execute(). Detect sandbox rejections heuristically:

// 파일 접근 거부 패턴
const isFileDenial = [
  'operation not permitted', 'vim:e303', 'sandbox_apply', 'sandbox: '
].some(keyword => lowerOutput.includes(keyword));

// 네트워크 접근 거부 패턴
const isNetworkDenial = [
  'error connecting to', 'could not resolve host', 'connection refused'
].some(keyword => lowerOutput.includes(keyword));

If a denial is detected, sandbox extension can be requested via the additional_permissions parameter. Once the user approves, the session/persistent approval is added to sandboxPolicyManager.

Background execution

If the is_background parameter is true, the process moves to the background with ShellExecutionService.background(pid) after a short delay. The output is hidden and can be checked with Ctrl+B.

Inactivity timeout

If there is no output for the time set in getShellToolInactivityTimeout(), the command is automatically canceled. The timer is reset each time an output occurs.

File editing tools

Edit tool (replace) — four-step matching strategy

calculateReplacement() in edit.ts uses a four-step fallback strategy to find old_string:

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/edit.ts
export async function calculateReplacement(config, context): Promise<ReplacementResult> {
  // 1단계: 정확한 문자열 매칭 (exact)
  const exactResult = await calculateExactReplacement(context);
  if (exactResult) return exactResult;

  // 2단계: 공백 무시 유연 매칭 (flexible)
  const flexibleResult = await calculateFlexibleReplacement(context);
  if (flexibleResult) return flexibleResult;

  // 3단계: 정규식 기반 토큰 매칭 (regex)
  const regexResult = await calculateRegexReplacement(context);
  if (regexResult) return regexResult;

  // 4단계: 퍼지 매칭 (fuzzy, Levenshtein 거리 기반)
  if (ENABLE_FUZZY_MATCH_RECOVERY) {
    const fuzzyResult = await calculateFuzzyReplacement(config, context);
    if (fuzzyResult) return fuzzyResult;
  }

  return { newContent: currentContent, occurrences: 0, ... };
}
strategy method Tolerance
exact String.replace() exact matching None
flexible Comparison after line-by-line trim() Indentation differences
regex After separating tokens, connect with \s* Difference between space and line break
fuzzy Levenshtein distance, 10% threshold character level differences

Write tool — Write entire file

write-file.ts overwrites the entire file. omissionPlaceholderDetector detects omission patterns such as "// rest of code..." and protects against cases where the model has abbreviated the content.

ModifiableTool — IDE integration

EditTool and WriteFileTool implement the ModifiableDeclarativeTool interface. This allows the IDE client to visualize the diff, allow the user to edit the proposed changes, and then reconstruct the final parameters:

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/modifiable-tool.ts
export interface ModifyContext<ToolParams> {
  getFilePath: (params: ToolParams) => string;
  getCurrentContent: (params: ToolParams) => Promise<string>;
  getProposedContent: (params: ToolParams) => Promise<string>;
  createUpdatedParams: (oldContent, modifiedContent, originalParams) => ToolParams;
}

JIT context

When running the read/write tool, discoverJitContext() automatically discovers the GEMINI.md file in the accessed directory and attaches it to the tool output. Through this, the model dynamically learns the project rules of subdirectories.

MCP Tool Integration

Architecture Layer

McpClientManager (다중 서버 관리)
  └── McpClient (단일 서버 연결)
       └── DiscoveredMCPTool (registry 등록용 선언)
            └── DiscoveredMCPToolInvocation (실행 인스턴스)

Name convention

MCP tool names are normalized to the format mcp_{serverName}_{toolName}:

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/mcp-tool.ts
export function generateValidName(name: string) {
  let validToolname = name.startsWith('mcp_') ? name : `mcp_${name}`;
  validToolname = validToolname.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.:]/g, '_');
  // Gemini API 제한: 64자
  if (validToolname.length > 63) {
    validToolname = validToolname.slice(0, 30) + '...' + validToolname.slice(-30);
  }
  return validToolname;
}

Server connection and discovery

McpClient uses @modelcontextprotocol/sdk to support three transmission methods: stdio, SSE, and StreamableHTTP. After connecting, discover tools, prompts, and resources simultaneously with discoverInto():

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/mcp-client.ts
async discoverInto(cliConfig, registries): Promise<void> {
  const prompts = await this.fetchPrompts();
  const tools = await this.discoverTools(cliConfig, messageBus);
  const resources = await this.discoverResources();
  // ... registry에 등록 후 정렬
  registries.toolRegistry.sortTools();
}

Subscribe to ToolListChangedNotification to reflect server-side tool changes in real time.

Run MCP tool

DiscoveredMCPToolInvocation.execute() calls CallableTool.callTool() and converts the response to GenAI Part[]:

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/mcp-tool.ts
async execute(signal: AbortSignal): Promise<ToolResult> {
  const rawResponseParts = await this.mcpTool.callTool(functionCalls);

  if (this.isMCPToolError(rawResponseParts)) {
    return { error: { type: ToolErrorType.MCP_TOOL_ERROR, ... } };
  }

  const transformedParts = transformMcpContentToParts(rawResponseParts);
  return { llmContent: transformedParts, ... };
}

Converts the five content types of MCP response: text, image, audio, resource, and resource_link into GenAI Part.

MCP Trust and Approval

The approval policy works in three steps:

  1. Trusted Folder: Unconditionally allowed if both isTrustedFolder() && trust flags are true.
  2. Whitelist: Allow per-server (serverName) or per-tool (serverName.toolName)
  3. User Confirmation: Request UI confirmation if the above conditions are not met.
// 승인 선택지
ProceedAlwaysServer → 해당 서버의 모든 도구 허용
ProceedAlwaysTool   → 해당 도구만 허용
ProceedAlwaysAndSave → 허용 + 영구 정책 저장

Parallel execution control

The wait_for_previous parameter is automatically added to all tool schemas:

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/tools.ts
private addWaitForPreviousParameter(schema: unknown): unknown {
  return {
    ...schema,
    properties: {
      ...propertiesObj,
      wait_for_previous: {
        type: 'boolean',
        description: 'Set to true to wait for all previously requested tools...',
      },
    },
  };
}

If the model sets wait_for_previous: true, the Scheduler waits for the previous tool to complete before executing it. If omitted or false, they are executed in parallel. Unlike Codex's read/write lock-based parallel control, Gemini CLI gives order control directly to the model.

Inside Scheduler — Reverse engineering the _processNextItem loop

Source Source: 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/scheduler/scheduler.ts (line 932)

The Scheduler is not just a dispatcher, but an event-based state machine orchestrator. Reverse engineer the internals of the queue-based processing loop _processQueue → _processNextItem.

State transition diagram

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Validating: enqueue()
    Validating --> Error: hook 실패 / 파라미터 오류
    Validating --> AwaitingApproval: PolicyDecision.ASK_USER
    Validating --> Scheduled: PolicyDecision.ALLOW
    AwaitingApproval --> Scheduled: 사용자 승인
    AwaitingApproval --> Cancelled: 사용자 거부
    Scheduled --> Executing: 배치 내 모든 호출 ready
    Executing --> Success: 실행 완료
    Executing --> Error: 실행 오류
    Executing --> AwaitingApproval: sandbox_expansion_required
    Executing --> Cancelled: AbortSignal
    Success --> [*]: finalizeCall()
    Error --> [*]: finalizeCall()
    Cancelled --> [*]: finalizeCall()

Processing loop core logic

// scheduler.ts:405-527 — _processQueue + _processNextItem 루프
private async _processQueue(signal: AbortSignal): Promise<void> {
  while (this.state.queueLength > 0 || this.state.isActive) {
    const shouldContinue = await this._processNextItem(signal);
    if (!shouldContinue) break;
  }
}

private async _processNextItem(signal: AbortSignal): Promise<boolean> {
  // 1. AbortSignal 확인
  if (signal.aborted || this.isCancelling) {
    this.state.cancelAllQueued('Operation cancelled');
    return false;
  }
  
  // 2. 비활성 상태면 큐에서 다음 항목 가져오기
  if (!this.state.isActive) {
    const next = this.state.dequeue();
    if (!next) return false;
    
    // 병렬화 가능하면 연속된 parallelizable 도구를 모두 꺼냄
    if (this._isParallelizable(next.request)) {
      while (this.state.queueLength > 0) {
        const peeked = this.state.peekQueue();
        if (peeked && this._isParallelizable(peeked.request)) {
          this.state.dequeue();  // 배치에 추가
        } else break;
      }
    }
  }
  
  // 3. Validating 상태 → 정책/확인 처리 (병렬)
  const validatingCalls = activeCalls.filter(c => c.status === 'validating');
  await Promise.all(validatingCalls.map(c => this._processValidatingCall(c, signal)));
  
  // 4. Scheduled 상태 → 실행 (모든 활성 호출이 ready일 때만)
  const allReady = activeCalls.every(c => c.status === 'scheduled' || isTerminal(c));
  if (allReady && scheduledCalls.length > 0) {
    await Promise.all(scheduledCalls.map(c => this._execute(c, signal)));
  }
  
  // 5. Terminal 상태 호출 최종화
  for (const call of activeCalls) {
    if (isTerminal(call.status)) {
      this.state.finalizeCall(call.request.callId);
    }
  }
  
  // 6. 외부 이벤트 대기 (AwaitingApproval, Executing)
  if (isWaitingForExternal && this.state.isActive) {
    await new Promise(resolve => queueMicrotask(() => resolve(true)));
    return true;  // 이벤트 루프 양보 후 재시도
  }
  
  return madeProgress || anyStatusChanged;
}

Key observations:

  • Conditions for batch parallel execution: Executes only when all active calls are scheduled or terminal. If any one is validating or awaiting_approval, the entire batch is queued.
  • QueueMicrotask: Yields only to microtasks when waiting for external events (user approval, tool completion). It is faster than setTimeout(0), but because it goes through a callback queue, external events can intervene.
  • Request Queue (requestQueue): When a new request comes in while the Scheduler is already processing, it is queued with _enqueueRequest and processed with _processNextInRequestQueue after the current batch is completed.

Parallelization judgment

// scheduler.ts:529-539
private _isParallelizable(request: ToolCallRequestInfo): boolean {
  if (request.args) {
    const wait = request.args['wait_for_previous'];
    if (typeof wait === 'boolean') return !wait;
  }
  return true;  // 기본값: 병렬 실행
}

Executes sequentially only when wait_for_previous is explicitly true, if omitted, parallel is the default. This is a design that only requests a sequence when the model determines, "This tool needs the results of a previous tool."

Sandbox extension automatic retry reverse engineering

sequenceDiagram
    participant S as Scheduler._execute()
    participant E as ToolExecutor
    participant SM as SandboxManager
    participant U as 사용자

    S->>E: execute(call)
    E->>SM: runInSandbox(command)
    SM-->>E: sandbox_expansion_required
    E-->>S: Error { errorType: 'sandbox_expansion_required', additionalPermissions }
    S->>S: JSON.parse(sandboxDetailsStr)
    S->>U: resolveConfirmation(sandbox_expansion 상세)
    U-->>S: ProceedOnce
    S->>S: 인자에 additional_permissions 추가
    S->>S: _execute(재시도) ← 재귀 호출
    S->>E: execute(수정된 call)
    E-->>S: Success

// scheduler.ts:800-920 — 샌드박스 확장 재시도
if (result.status === CoreToolCallStatus.Error 
    && result.response.errorType === 'sandbox_expansion_required') {
  
  const parsedError = JSON.parse(sandboxDetailsStr);
  // { rootCommand: string, additionalPermissions: SandboxPermissions }
  
  const confirmationDetails = {
    type: 'sandbox_expansion',
    title: 'Sandbox Expansion Request',
    command: activeCall.request.args['command'] ?? parsedError.rootCommand,
    rootCommand: parsedError.rootCommand,
    additionalPermissions: parsedError.additionalPermissions,
  };
  
  // 사용자에게 확장 확인 요청
  activeCall.request.args['additional_permissions'] = parsedError.additionalPermissions;
  activeCall.invocation = activeCall.tool.build(activeCall.request.args);  // 재빌드
  
  this.state.updateStatus(callId, CoreToolCallStatus.AwaitingApproval, {
    confirmationDetails, correlationId
  });
  
  const confResult = await resolveConfirmation(validatingCall, signal, { ... });
  
  if (confResult.outcome === ToolConfirmationOutcome.Cancel) {
    // 사용자 거부 → 에러로 처리
    errorResponse.llmContent = 
      'User cancelled sandbox expansion. The command failed with a sandbox denial.';
    this.state.updateStatus(callId, CoreToolCallStatus.Error, errorResponse);
    return false;
  }
  
  // 출력 스트림 초기화 후 재실행
  this.state.updateStatus(callId, CoreToolCallStatus.Executing, { liveOutput: undefined });
  return await this._execute({ ...activeCall, status: 'scheduled' }, signal);  // ← 재귀!
}

The core of this pattern: execution failure → permission expansion request → user approval → re-execution with modified parameters occurs automatically inside the Scheduler. The tool itself only needs to throw a sandbox error, and the permission extension negotiation is handled by the Scheduler.

Tail Call Chaining — Tool Pipeline

// scheduler.ts:737-794 — tailToolCallRequest 처리
if ((result.status === 'success' || result.status === 'error')
    && result.tailToolCallRequest) {
  
  // 중간 도구 호출을 먼저 로깅
  const intermediateCall = { ...activeCall, status: result.status, response: result.response };
  logToolCall(this.config, new ToolCallEvent(intermediateCall));
  
  // 테일 콜 요청 생성 — 같은 callId 재사용!
  const newRequest: ToolCallRequestInfo = {
    callId: originalCallId,           // ← 원래 callId 유지
    name: tailRequest.name,
    args: tailRequest.args,
    originalRequestName,              // ← 원래 요청 이름 보존
    originalRequestArgs: result.request.originalRequestArgs ?? result.request.args,
  };
  
  const newTool = this.context.toolRegistry.getTool(tailRequest.name);
  const validatingCall = this._validateAndCreateToolCall(newRequest, newTool, approvalMode);
  
  // 활성 호출을 테일 콜로 교체
  this.state.replaceActiveCallWithTailCall(callId, validatingCall);
  return true;  // 루프 계속 → 테일 콜이 큐 앞에 배치됨
}

A tail call is a pattern where tool A makes serial calls to tool B after execution is complete:

  • Since they share the same callId, they appear to be one tool call to LLM.
  • originalRequestName and originalRequestArgs are preserved to enable tracking of origin in telemetry.
  • Intermediate results are logged but not returned to LLM

This pattern can be used by an edit tool to call write_file internally, or by a shell tool to delegate actual execution to another tool after preliminary verification.

Policy update persistence — reverse engineering

// policy.ts:113-164 — updatePolicy
export async function updatePolicy(tool, outcome, confirmationDetails, context, messageBus, toolInvocation) {
  // 1. AUTO_EDIT 모드 전환 — 편집 도구에 "항상 허용" 시 세션 전체 자동 승인
  if (isAutoEditTransition(tool, outcome)) {
    context.config.setApprovalMode(ApprovalMode.AUTO_EDIT);
    return;
  }
  
  // 2. 지속성 범위 결정
  let persistScope: 'workspace' | 'user' | undefined;
  if (outcome === ToolConfirmationOutcome.ProceedAlwaysAndSave) {
    if (config.isTrustedFolder() && config.getWorkspacePoliciesDir()) {
      persistScope = 'workspace';  // 신뢰 폴더 → workspace 범위
    } else {
      persistScope = 'user';       // 그 외 → user 범위
    }
  }
  
  // 3. MCP 도구 vs 표준 도구 분기
  if (confirmationDetails?.type === 'mcp') {
    handleMcpPolicyUpdate(tool, outcome, confirmationDetails, messageBus, persistScope);
    return;
  }
  handleStandardPolicyUpdate(tool, outcome, confirmationDetails, messageBus, persistScope, ...);
}

ToolConfirmationOutcome full case

Outcome Description Policy Effect
ProceedOnce Allow only this time No policy change
ProceedAlways Always allow during session Add to session policy
ProceedAlwaysTool MCP: Always allow this tool Add tool name to session policy
ProceedAlwaysServer MCP: Allow all tools on this server Add wildcard server_name/*
ProceedAlwaysAndSave Always Allow + Save File Permanent storage in workspace or user policy
Cancel reject Cancel current call + Cancel entire queue

MCP wildcard policy

// policy.ts:250-251 — MCP 서버 전체 허용
if (outcome === ToolConfirmationOutcome.ProceedAlwaysServer) {
  toolName = formatMcpToolName(confirmationDetails.serverName, '*');
  // → "mcp__serverName__*" 패턴으로 서버의 모든 도구 허용
}

Automatic approval of client issuing tool calls

// policy.ts:78-87 — 클라이언트 발행 호출 바이패스
if (decision === PolicyDecision.ASK_USER
    && toolCall.request.isClientInitiated
    && !toolCall.request.args?.['additional_permissions']) {
  return { decision: PolicyDecision.ALLOW, rule: result.rule };
}

If the user calls the tool directly with the / slash command, even if the policy engine returns ASK_USER, it automatically switches to ALLOW. However, if additional_permissions is requested (sandbox expansion), confirmation is exceptionally required.

Hook integration — evaluateBeforeToolHook

// scheduler.ts:573-607 — _processToolCall 내부
// 1. BeforeTool 훅 평가
const hookResult = await evaluateBeforeToolHook(
  this.config, toolCall.tool, toolCall.request, toolCall.invocation
);

if (hookResult.status === 'error') {
  // 훅이 에러를 반환하면 도구 실행 차단
  this.state.updateStatus(callId, CoreToolCallStatus.Error, ...);
  return;
}

// 훅이 인자를 수정할 수 있음
if (modifiedArgs && newInvocation) {
  toolCall.request.args = modifiedArgs;
  toolCall.request.inputModifiedByHook = true;  // 수정 사실 기록
  toolCall.invocation = newInvocation;
}

// 훅이 'ask' 결정을 내리면 정책과 무관하게 사용자 확인 강제
if (hookDecision === 'ask') {
  decision = PolicyDecision.ASK_USER;
}

Hook's three decisions:

  1. allow — Proceed as is with policy engine results
  2. ask — Force user confirmation even if policy engine is ALLOW
  3. error — Block tool execution + return error

It is important that the hook can modify its argument — the modification is recorded with the inputModifiedByHook flag so it can be tracked in telemetry.

Structural differences from Codex

Item Codex (Rust) Gemini CLI (TypeScript)
pipeline Router → Registry → Runtime → Handler Registry → Scheduler → build() → execute()
router ToolRouter branches by model output type No router, Scheduler handles directly
parallel control Automatic classification based on read/write lock Model decides to wait_for_previous
patch tool apply_patch (own DSL) replace (old_string/new_string 4-step matching)
Dynamic Tools DynamicToolHandler + app-server bridge DiscoveredTool (execute external command)
Run MCP core internal mcp_tool_call event CallableTool in the @google/genai SDK
tool schema static Rust type Dynamic override by model family
Cancel cancellation token AbortSignal + AbortController
Approved pre-tool-use hook MessageBus based policy engine

fork seam / checklist

  • DeclarativeTool + BaseDeclarativeTool is the core of tool abstraction
  • ToolRegistry integrates the three layers of built-in, discovery, and MCP into one.
  • Scheduler manages the entire build-validate-confirm-execute flow.
  • The four-step matching strategy in edit.ts can be independently reused.
  • The sandbox heuristic detection and permission expansion patterns of shell.ts are worth reference.
  • MCP client has a three-layer structure of McpClientManager → McpClient → DiscoveredMCPTool.
  • The ModifiableDeclarativeTool interface is key to IDE integration.
  • Implement model-driven parallel control with wait_for_previous
  • Model-specific branching of ToolDefinition.overrides can be a burden on maintenance.
  • Shell command wrapping (pgrep) is limited to macOS/Linux
  • MCP tool name truncation due to 64 character limit may cause crash

List of core files

  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/tools.ts — Kind, DeclarativeTool, BaseToolInvocation, ToolResult
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/tool-registry.ts — ToolRegistry, DiscoveredTool
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/tool-names.ts — Tool name constants, legacy aliases, validation.
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/definitions/types.ts — ToolDefinition, CoreToolSet
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/definitions/resolver.ts — resolveToolDeclaration
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/shell.ts — ShellToolInvocation, sandbox integration.
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/edit.ts — EditTool, four-step replacement strategy
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/write-file.ts — WriteFileTool, omission detection.
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/mcp-tool.ts — DiscoveredMCPTool, MCP content conversion
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/mcp-client.ts — McpClient, server connection/discovery
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/mcp-client-manager.ts — McpClientManager, multi-server management.
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/modifiable-tool.ts — ModifiableDeclarativeTool, IDE diff
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/jit-context.ts — JIT context discovery
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/tools/omissionPlaceholderDetector.ts — Omission pattern detection
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/scheduler/scheduler.ts — Scheduler, tool dispatch loop.
