// a2a-server/src/http/app.ts
const coderAgentCard: AgentCard = {
  name: 'Gemini SDLC Agent',
  description: 'An agent that generates code based on natural language instructions...',
  protocolVersion: '0.3.0',
  capabilities: {
    streaming: true,
    pushNotifications: false,
    stateTransitionHistory: true,
  },
  skills: [{
    id: 'code_generation',
    name: 'Code Generation',
    tags: ['code', 'development', 'programming'],
  }],
};

Main analysis

Gemini CLI subagent and A2A server analysis

Analysis snapshot: 130_gemini-cli/ — subagent/collaboration dispatch.

Gemini CLI's subagent system has a completely different design philosophy from Codex. While Codex is a monolithic approach that "spawns children by inheriting the settings of the parent thread," Gemini is divided into two independent layers: Local/Remote SubagentTool, which runs an LLM loop internally, and A2A (Agent-to-Agent) Server, which accesses externally via HTTP.

The reason this dual structure is important is because Gemini views subagents as service units that can be exposed as independent processes, rather than simply replicating internal threads. The A2A protocol, based on @a2a-js/sdk, treats remote agents and local agents with the same interface, and declaratively exposes the agent's skills, authentication, and protocol version through AgentCard.

In other words, in Gemini CLI, a subagent is “a tool-wrapped self-executing loop (local) or an A2A protocol client (remote),” and the A2A server is “an HTTP wrapper that wraps Gemini CLI itself in the A2A protocol so that other agents can call it.”

graph TD
    subgraph "core: 서브에이전트 호출측"
        A["부모 LLM turn"] --> B["SubagentTool"]
        B --> C{"kind?"}
        C -->|local| D["LocalSubagentInvocation"]
        C -->|remote| E["RemoteAgentInvocation"]
        C -->|browser| F["BrowserAgentInvocation"]
        D --> G["LocalAgentExecutor<br/>독립 ToolRegistry로<br/>자체 LLM 루프"]
        E --> H["A2AClientManager<br/>A2A 프로토콜 스트리밍"]
    end

    subgraph "a2a-server: 피호출측"
        I["Express HTTP"] --> J["DefaultRequestHandler<br/>@a2a-js/sdk"]
        J --> K["CoderAgentExecutor"]
        K --> L["Task"]
        L --> M["Scheduler + GeminiClient"]
        L --> N["EventBus<br/>SSE 스트리밍"]
    end

    H -.->|HTTP/SSE| I

1. Subagent type system

Gemini manages agent definitions with the AgentDefinition union. kind: 'local' is a built-in agent that goes through its own LLM loop, and kind: 'remote' calls an external agent using the A2A protocol.

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/types.ts
export type AgentDefinition<TOutput extends z.ZodTypeAny = z.ZodUnknown> =
  | LocalAgentDefinition<TOutput>
  | RemoteAgentDefinition<TOutput>;

export interface LocalAgentDefinition<TOutput> extends BaseAgentDefinition<TOutput> {
  kind: 'local';
  promptConfig: PromptConfig;   // 시스템 프롬프트, 초기 메시지
  modelConfig: ModelConfig;     // 모델 이름, 온도
  runConfig: RunConfig;         // maxTurns, maxTimeMinutes
  toolConfig?: ToolConfig;      // 사용 가능 도구 목록
  mcpServers?: Record<string, MCPServerConfig>;
}

export interface RemoteAgentDefinition<TOutput> extends BaseRemoteAgentDefinition<TOutput> {
  agentCardUrl?: string;
  agentCardJson?: string;
}

Key difference: Codex is based on inheritance of parent settings, so the independence of the child is limited, but Gemini's LocalAgentDefinition has promptConfig, modelConfig, runConfig, and toolConfig as its own settings. All it receives from its parent is AgentLoopContext (see config, toolRegistry, messageBus).

Agent discovery and registration

steps Description file
Agent Directory Scan ~/.gemini/agents/, load YAML file from .gemini/agents/ core/src/agents/agentLoader.ts
AgentRegistry registration built-in + user + project agent integration core/src/agents/registry.ts
SubagentTool wrapping Convert AgentDefinition to DeclarativeTool core/src/agents/subagent-tool.ts
ToolRegistry exposed Parent LLM can be called with function call core/src/tools/tool-registry.ts 
// core/src/agents/registry.ts — built-in 에이전트 등록
private loadBuiltInAgents(): void {
  // CodebaseInvestigator, CliHelp, Generalist, Browser, MemoryManager 등
}

2. Local subagent: Independent LLM loop

When LocalSubagentInvocation is executed, LocalAgentExecutor.create() is called to configure an isolated execution environment. This is the main difference from Codex — Codex copies the parent's Session, but Gemini creates new ToolRegistry, PromptRegistry, and ResourceRegistry.

// core/src/agents/local-executor.ts
static async create(definition, context, onActivity) {
  const subagentMessageBus = parentMessageBus.derive(definition.name);
  const agentToolRegistry = new ToolRegistry(context.config, subagentMessageBus);
  // ...
  // 재귀 방지: 다른 에이전트를 호출하는 tool은 등록하지 않음
  if (allAgentNames.has(tool.name)) {
    debugLogger.warn(`Skipping subagent tool '${tool.name}' to prevent recursion.`);
    return;
  }
  // 부모의 tool을 clone해서 독립 messageBus로 연결
  const clonedTool = tool.clone(subagentMessageBus);
  agentToolRegistry.registerTool(clonedTool);
}

Execution loop structure

sequenceDiagram
    participant Parent as 부모 LLM
    participant Tool as SubagentTool
    participant Exec as LocalAgentExecutor
    participant Chat as GeminiChat
    participant Sched as Scheduler

    Parent->>Tool: function_call(agent_name, inputs)
    Tool->>Exec: create() → 격리된 ToolRegistry
    loop maxTurns 또는 maxTime
        Exec->>Chat: sendMessage(currentMessage)
        Chat-->>Exec: functionCalls[]
        Exec->>Sched: scheduleAgentTools(requests)
        Sched-->>Exec: completedToolCalls[]
        alt complete_task 호출됨
            Exec-->>Tool: OutputObject{result, terminate_reason}
        end
    end
    Tool-->>Parent: ToolResult{llmContent, returnDisplay}

End condition

shutdown mode Meaning
GOAL complete_task tool is called
MAX_TURNS exceeds runConfig.maxTurns (default 30)
TIMEOUT exceeds runConfig.maxTimeMinutes (default 10)
ABORTED Cancellation by AbortSignal
ERROR_NO_COMPLETE_TASK_CALL LLM hangs without tool call

SubagentProgress Streaming

While the local agent is running, it streams SubagentProgress objects as live output to its parent:

// core/src/agents/types.ts
export interface SubagentProgress {
  isSubagentProgress: true;
  agentName: string;
  recentActivity: SubagentActivityItem[];  // 최근 3개 활동
  state?: 'running' | 'completed' | 'error' | 'cancelled';
  result?: string;
  terminateReason?: AgentTerminateMode;
}

이를 통해 부모 LLM은 child의 thinking, tool call, error를 실시간으로 관찰할 수 있다. This is similar to Codex's delegate-based event forwarding, but in Gemini, it is delivered directly through the tool's updateOutput callback.

3. Remote subagent: A2A protocol client

RemoteAgentInvocation communicates with an external A2A server through A2AClientManager. The key is SSE streaming and Session persistence (contextId/taskId persistence).

// core/src/agents/remote-invocation.ts
export class RemoteAgentInvocation extends BaseToolInvocation<RemoteAgentInputs, ToolResult> {
  // 세션 상태를 static Map으로 유지 — 호출 간 contextId/taskId 보존
  private static readonly sessionState = new Map<string, { contextId?: string; taskId?: string }>();

  async execute(signal, updateOutput) {
    const stream = this.clientManager.sendMessageStream(
      this.definition.name, message,
      { contextId: this.contextId, taskId: this.taskId, signal }
    );
    for await (const chunk of stream) {
      reassembler.update(chunk);
      updateOutput({ isSubagentProgress: true, agentName, state: 'running', ... });
    }
  }
}
Role implementation file
Client Management A2AClientManager — load agent card, select transport protocol core/src/agents/a2a-client-manager.ts
Certification A2AAuthProviderFactory — Bearer/Basic/OAuth core/src/agents/auth-provider/
Assembling results A2AResultReassembler — Assembles SSE chunks into final text core/src/agents/a2aUtils.ts
error handling A2AAgentError layer — user-friendly error messages core/src/agents/a2a-errors.ts

There is no corresponding remote agent concept in Codex. While Codex's subagents are always child threads within the same process, Gemini can call agents in independent processes across the network.

4. A2A Server: Exposing Gemini CLI as a service

The @google/gemini-cli-a2a-server package wraps Gemini CLI itself as an A2A protocol server. This is not a "calling a subagent" function, but a "being called by a subagent" function.

Architecture

graph LR
    subgraph "a2a-server 패키지"
        A["server.ts<br/>Express 서버 진입점"] --> B["app.ts<br/>라우트 설정"]
        B --> C["A2AExpressApp<br/>@a2a-js/sdk"]
        B --> D["커스텀 엔드포인트"]
        C --> E["DefaultRequestHandler"]
        E --> F["CoderAgentExecutor"]
        F --> G["Task"]
        G --> H["GeminiClient<br/>LLM 호출"]
        G --> I["Scheduler<br/>도구 실행"]
        G --> J["EventBus<br/>SSE 이벤트 발행"]
    end

    subgraph "영속성"
        F --> K["InMemoryTaskStore"]
        F --> L["GCSTaskStore<br/>GCS 버킷 저장"]
    end

    subgraph "설정"
        M["config.ts"] --> N["settings.json"]
        M --> O["extension.ts"]
        M --> P[".env 로딩"]
    end

Core components

CoderAgentExecutor

A top-level executor that implements the AgentExecutor interface. This is the entry point for all A2A requests.

// a2a-server/src/agent/executor.ts
export class CoderAgentExecutor implements AgentExecutor {
  private tasks: Map<string, TaskWrapper> = new Map();
  private executingTasks = new Set<string>();  // 동시 실행 방지

  async execute(requestContext, eventBus) {
    // 1. 기존 task 찾기 (메모리 → TaskStore → 새로 생성)
    // 2. abortController로 소켓 종료 감지
    // 3. acceptUserMessage → LLM 스트리밍
    // 4. toolCallRequests 수집 → scheduleToolCalls
    // 5. waitForPendingTools → 완료된 tool을 LLM에 전달
    // 6. 루프 종료 시 상태 저장
  }
}

Concurrency control is unique. If there is already a loop running for the same taskId, subsequent requests will only call acceptUserMessage and exit. The original primary execution loop is also responsible for returning the tool results to the LLM.

Task

Internal runtime object separate from Task in the A2A SDK. Manages Scheduler, GeminiClient, tool confirmation, and SSE event issuance.

// a2a-server/src/agent/task.ts
export class Task {
  id: string;
  contextId: string;
  scheduler: Scheduler;
  geminiClient: GeminiClient;
  taskState: TaskState;               // submitted | working | input-required | completed | failed | canceled
  pendingToolCalls: Map<string, string>;  // callId → status
  completedToolCalls: CompletedToolCall[];
  eventBus?: ExecutionEventBus;       // SSE 이벤트 발행

  // 이벤트 기반 Scheduler: MessageBus 구독으로 tool 상태 변화 감지
  private setupEventDrivenScheduler(): Scheduler { ... }
  private handleEventDrivenToolCallsUpdate(event: ToolCallsUpdateMessage) { ... }
}

CoderAgentEvent Protocol

The A2A server streams its event protocol to SSE:

Event Meaning Use
tool-call-confirmation Request permission to run tool Show confirmation UI to user in IDE
tool-call-update Change tool execution state Show progress
text-content LLM Text Response Show agent response
state-change task state transition UI state synchronization
thought LLM Thinking Process Debugging/Transparency
citation Citation Information Attribution
agent-settings Reset workspace/settings Start Session

Tool confirmation flow

If the A2A server is not in YOLO mode, user confirmation is required before running the tool. This flow corresponds to Codex’s delegate approval routing:

sequenceDiagram
    participant Client as IDE/외부 에이전트
    participant Server as A2A Server
    participant Task as Task
    participant Sched as Scheduler

    Client->>Server: POST /a2a (user message)
    Server->>Task: acceptUserMessage
    Task->>Sched: schedule(toolCallRequests)
    Sched-->>Task: status: awaiting_approval
    Task-->>Server: SSE: tool-call-confirmation (final: true)
    Note over Server: HTTP 스트림 종료
    Client->>Server: POST /a2a (confirmation response)
    Server->>Task: data part에서 callId + outcome 추출
    Task->>Sched: messageBus.publish(TOOL_CONFIRMATION_RESPONSE)
    Sched-->>Task: status: executing → success
    Task-->>Server: SSE: tool-call-update, text-content

The pattern of disconnecting an HTTP stream with final: true and receiving a new request is designed to bypass the limitations of the SSE-based A2A protocol. Codex is based on websocket, so there is no such interruption.

5. Task persistence and state management

TaskStore layer

implementation Description Use
InMemoryTaskStore SDK default memory storage Development/Single Process
GCSTaskStore Store metadata + workspace archives in GCS bucket Production/Distributed Environment
NoOpTaskStore Ignore save and delegate load only Prevent duplicate saves of SDK handler when using GCS 
// a2a-server/src/persistence/gcs.ts
export class GCSTaskStore implements TaskStore {
  async save(task: SDKTask): Promise<void> {
    // 1. metadata를 gzip 압축 후 GCS에 저장
    // 2. 워크스페이스 디렉터리를 tar.gz로 아카이브 후 GCS에 저장
  }

  async load(taskId: string): Promise<SDKTask | undefined> {
    // 1. GCS에서 metadata 다운로드 → gunzip → parse
    // 2. 워크스페이스 아카이브 다운로드 → 로컬에 복원
    // 3. SDKTask 객체 재구성
  }
}

PersistedStateMetadata

The key to restoring task state is PersistedStateMetadata. It is embedded as a __persistedState key in the SDK's Task.metadata to preserve AgentSettings and TaskState.

// a2a-server/src/types.ts
export interface PersistedStateMetadata {
  _agentSettings: AgentSettings;  // workspacePath, autoExecute
  _taskState: TaskState;          // 마지막 상태
}

CoderAgentExecutor.reconstruct() can resume an interrupted task by reconfiguring Config, GeminiClient, and Scheduler from this metadata.

6. Command system

In addition to the A2A protocol, the A2A server provides custom HTTP endpoints (/executeCommand, /listCommands). This allows the IDE to directly execute commands.

command Description Special Notes
init Generate GEMINI.md after analyzing project streaming=true, call own agentExecutor
restore Restore files from checkpoint Git-based checkpointing
restore list List available checkpoints Subcommand pattern
memory Memory management (show/refresh/list/add) gemini-cli-core delegation
extensions Extension management (list) gemini-cli-core delegation

7. Comparison with Codex

Item Codex Gemini CLI
Subagent model child spawn based on inheritance of settings from parent thread Independent AgentDefinition (local/remote)
settings inheritance automatic inheritance of model, provider, approval, sandbox, developer_instructions promptConfig, modelConfig, runConfig are independent by definition
ToolRegistry Share with parents After creating a new one, clone the parent tool and register it
Avoid recursion No explicit restrictions Block registration of tools with different agent names
remote agent None A2A Protocol (HTTP/SSE, gRPC)
approval routing delegate layer relays to parent session MessageBus based confirmation event
state persistence app-server thread history GCS or InMemory TaskStore
A2A Server None Express-based HTTP server (callable)
Shutdown Control close/wait/resume tool maxTurns, maxTimeMinutes, complete_task tool
live output CollabAgentToolCall event SubagentProgress Streaming

8. AgentCard and A2A Protocol

The A2A server exposes AgentCard in /.well-known/agent-card.json:

// a2a-server/src/http/app.ts
const coderAgentCard: AgentCard = {
  name: 'Gemini SDLC Agent',
  description: 'An agent that generates code based on natural language instructions...',
  protocolVersion: '0.3.0',
  capabilities: {
    streaming: true,
    pushNotifications: false,
    stateTransitionHistory: true,
  },
  skills: [{
    id: 'code_generation',
    name: 'Code Generation',
    tags: ['code', 'development', 'programming'],
  }],
};

This declarative model allows other A2A clients to automatically discover and invoke this server's capabilities. Codex does not have such an agent self-description mechanism.

Fork Checklist

  • Confirm that Gemini's subagent has a local/remote dual structure.
  • Analysis of LocalAgentExecutor's isolated ToolRegistry creation pattern
  • Analysis of task persistence and GCS storage structure of A2A server
  • tool confirmation flow confirms SSE stream disconnection/reconnection pattern
  • Analysis of concurrent execution prevention mechanism of CoderAgentExecutor
  • Need to determine the stability of A2A protocol version (0.3.0)
  • Need to verify whether GCSTaskStore's workspace archiving strategy is practical for large-scale projects
  • Need to evaluate the sufficiency of agent recursion prevention policy (name-based blocking)

List of core files

a2a-server package

  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/agent/executor.ts — CoderAgentExecutor, task life cycle management
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/agent/task.ts — Task runtime, Scheduler/EventBus integration
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/http/app.ts — Express routes, AgentCard definitions
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/http/server.ts — Server entry point
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/persistence/gcs.ts — GCS-based task storage/restore
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/types.ts — CoderAgentEvent, PersistedStateMetadata
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/config/config.ts — Loading server settings
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/commands/command-registry.ts — Command registration

core package (subagent related)

  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/types.ts — AgentDefinition, SubagentProgress
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/subagent-tool.ts — SubagentTool, SubAgentInvocation
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/subagent-tool-wrapper.ts — local/remote/browser branch
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/local-invocation.ts — LocalSubagentInvocation
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/local-executor.ts — LocalAgentExecutor, LLM loop
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/remote-invocation.ts — RemoteAgentInvocation
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/a2a-client-manager.ts — A2A client management
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/registry.ts — AgentRegistry
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/agentLoader.ts — YAML agent definition loader.
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/agent-scheduler.ts — Subagent tool scheduling

Previous article: [[05_co_subagent]]
Next article: [[06_ge_surface]]

snapshot_to_current delta

Area Snapshot Current
Axis surface Paths cited in-body APIs/flags evolve per release — re-verify on upgrade
Host delegation Documented in this checkout Binary-only drift for closed-source CLIs

Change history

  • 2026-03-26: Gemini CLI's subagent system and A2A server architecture were analyzed, and structural differences with Codex were summarized.
  • 2026-05-30: Updated delta based on recent 232 commits — AgentProtocol abstraction, registry first-wins transition, ACP PolicyEngine integration, added historyHardening.

Latest update (2026-05-30)

AgentProtocol abstraction layer

In the existing structure where LocalSubagentInvocation/RemoteAgentInvocation directly drove an executor or A2A client, a large-scale refactoring was done to insert AgentProtocol interface. AgentProtocol is a unified protocol consisting of four contracts: send(), subscribe(), abort(), and events (core/src/agent/types.ts), and two protocol classes have been added to implement it:

  • LocalSubagentProtocol (core/src/agents/local-subagent-protocol.ts): Wraps LocalAgentExecutor and converts SubagentActivityEvent callback to AgentEvent stream. mapTerminateMode() maps AgentTerminateMode to StreamEndReason(completed, max_time, max_turns, aborted, failed).
  • RemoteSubagentProtocol (core/src/agents/remote-subagent-protocol.ts): Converts A2AClientManager streaming to AgentEvent. For each SSE chunk, text is assembled with A2AResultReassembler, and only delta is issued as a message event. contextId/taskId session state is managed inside the protocol.

Each protocol is wrapped in a session class that inherits AgentSession: LocalSubagentSession, RemoteSubagentSession. These sessions expose execution results as Promises using the getResult() method.

Session-based Invocation (LocalSessionInvocation / RemoteSessionInvocation)

A new invocation class rises on top of the protocol:

  • LocalSessionInvocation (core/src/agents/local-session-invocation.ts): Creates LocalSubagentSession and maintains the existing SubagentProgress real-time display logic with rawActivityCallback. Parameters other than queries are buffered with send({update: {config: ...}}) and then use a two-step transmission pattern to send the message.
  • RemoteSessionInvocation (core/src/agents/remote-session-invocation.ts): Creates a RemoteSubagentSession and maintains A2A sessions between calls with a static sessionState Map. The session key is a name::targetUrl composite key, and has an independent state even if the endpoint is different even if the name is the same.

Session branch of AgentTool

Branches between existing invocation and new session-based invocation according to the config.isAgentSessionSubagentEnabled() flag (adk.agentSessionSubagentEnabled) in DelegateInvocation.buildChildInvocation() (core/src/agents/agent-tool.ts) of AgentTool. When the flag is on, it uses LocalSessionInvocation/RemoteSessionInvocation, and when it is off, it uses the legacy LocalSubagentInvocation/RemoteAgentInvocation. The onAgentEvent callback is also delivered only in session-based paths.

Agent Registry: first-wins + project priority

AgentRegistry.registerAgent() (core/src/agents/registry.ts) has been converted to first-wins policy. If an agent with the same name is already registered, subsequent definitions are ignored and a warning is issued. Since the loading order is built-in -> project -> user -> extension, project agent takes precedence over user agent. Previously, last registration was the last-wins, so it was virtually impossible to override agents at the project level.

addAgentPolicy() has also been added, which dynamically inserts the ASK_USER rule into PolicyEngine when registering a remote agent. If the user has already defined a policy for the tool, dynamic rules are skipped (ignoreDynamic=true).

ACP Session + PolicyEngine integration

A MessageBus-based TOOL_CONFIRMATION_REQUEST subscription has been added to ACP Session (cli/src/acp/acpSession.ts). When a subagent requests permission to run a tool, the ACP session calls PolicyEngine.check() to make an ALLOW/ASK_USER decision and responds with TOOL_CONFIRMATION_RESPONSE. Previously, PolicyEngine was bypassed in ACP mode, resulting in a deadlock where tool approval requests waited without response (#23507). Manage the subscription life cycle with disposeController.

Recognition of subagents' approval modes has also been strengthened (fix(core): make subagents aware of active approval modes). Mode mismatch between agents (agent mode disconnect) when switching ACP modes has been resolved.

History Hardening

hardenHistory() (core/src/utils/historyHardening.ts) is a 5-pass pipeline that post-corrects the strict conversation history invariants of the Gemini API:

  1. Coalesce: Merge adjacent turns of the same role, remove empty turns
  2. Tool Pairing + Signatures: Verifies whether there is a functionResponse corresponding to every functionCall. Inject sentinel response ("lost due to context management truncation") on miss. If the first functionCall does not contain thoughtSignature, insert a composite signature.
  3. Refine Tool Responses: Rearrange (hoisting) the functionResponse within the user turn to match the functionCall order of the preceding model turn.
  4. Role Constraints: Insert sentinel turn starting with user and ending with user. Force role shift
  5. Scrub: Remove non-standard properties for Vertex AI compatibility.

This module is used to recover history broken by context management truncation during session resumption (resumption). In conjunction with the filter internal session context from history during resumption commit, it prevents the internal session context from being exposed to the outside.

Other major changes

area change commit/file
routing Bypass routing classifier to prevent orphaned function response #27389
routing Dynamic fallback to quota exhaustion model #27315, #26999
routing Caching model routing decisions in LocalAgentExecutor #26548
Context Context simplification complete (feat(context): Complete simplification work) #27345
ACP Add tool name prefix to tool call ID (IDE rendering compatible) #26676
ACP ACP mode prevent infinite thought loop (disable nextSpeakerCheck) #26874
A2A Server Implementation of basic policy loading (CLI equivalent) #27073
A2A Server usage metadata exposure #27288
PTY resize native crash defense, EBADF suppression #27496, #27461
session reset session-scoped state on resume #26342

New file list

  • core/src/agents/local-subagent-protocol.ts — LocalSubagentProtocol, LocalSubagentSession
  • core/src/agents/remote-subagent-protocol.ts — RemoteSubagentProtocol, RemoteSubagentSession
  • core/src/agents/local-session-invocation.ts — LocalSessionInvocation (session-based local invocation)
  • core/src/agents/remote-session-invocation.ts — RemoteSessionInvocation (session-based remote invocation)
  • core/src/utils/historyHardening.ts — hardenHistory 5-pass history correction
  • core/src/agent/types.ts — AgentProtocol, AgentEvent, AgentSend interfaces

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 005_subagents-collab/05_ge_subagent.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

Gemini CLI 서브에이전트와 A2A 서버 분석

분석 스냅샷: 130_gemini-cli/ — subagent/collaboration dispatch.

Gemini CLI의 서브에이전트 시스템은 Codex와 완전히 다른 설계 철학을 가진다. Codex가 "부모 thread의 설정을 상속해서 child를 spawn"하는 모노리식 접근이라면, Gemini는 두 개의 독립된 계층으로 나뉜다: 내부적으로 LLM 루프를 돌리는 Local/Remote SubagentTool과, 외부에서 HTTP로 접근하는 A2A(Agent-to-Agent) Server다.

이 이중 구조가 중요한 이유는 Gemini가 서브에이전트를 단순히 내부 thread 복제가 아니라, 독립 프로세스로 노출 가능한 서비스 단위로 보기 때문이다. @a2a-js/sdk를 기반으로 한 A2A 프로토콜은 원격 에이전트와 로컬 에이전트를 동일한 인터페이스로 다루고, AgentCard를 통해 에이전트의 능력(skill), 인증, 프로토콜 버전을 선언적으로 노출한다.

즉 Gemini CLI에서 서브에이전트란 "tool로 감싼 자율 실행 루프(local) 또는 A2A 프로토콜 클라이언트(remote)"이며, A2A 서버는 "Gemini CLI 자체를 A2A 프로토콜로 감싸서 다른 에이전트가 호출할 수 있게 만든 HTTP 래퍼"다.

graph TD
    subgraph "core: 서브에이전트 호출측"
        A["부모 LLM turn"] --> B["SubagentTool"]
        B --> C{"kind?"}
        C -->|local| D["LocalSubagentInvocation"]
        C -->|remote| E["RemoteAgentInvocation"]
        C -->|browser| F["BrowserAgentInvocation"]
        D --> G["LocalAgentExecutor<br/>독립 ToolRegistry로<br/>자체 LLM 루프"]
        E --> H["A2AClientManager<br/>A2A 프로토콜 스트리밍"]
    end

    subgraph "a2a-server: 피호출측"
        I["Express HTTP"] --> J["DefaultRequestHandler<br/>@a2a-js/sdk"]
        J --> K["CoderAgentExecutor"]
        K --> L["Task"]
        L --> M["Scheduler + GeminiClient"]
        L --> N["EventBus<br/>SSE 스트리밍"]
    end

    H -.->|HTTP/SSE| I

1. 서브에이전트 타입 시스템

Gemini는 에이전트 정의를 AgentDefinition 유니온으로 관리한다. kind: 'local'은 자체 LLM 루프를 도는 내장 에이전트이고, kind: 'remote'는 A2A 프로토콜로 외부 에이전트를 호출한다.

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/types.ts
export type AgentDefinition<TOutput extends z.ZodTypeAny = z.ZodUnknown> =
  | LocalAgentDefinition<TOutput>
  | RemoteAgentDefinition<TOutput>;

export interface LocalAgentDefinition<TOutput> extends BaseAgentDefinition<TOutput> {
  kind: 'local';
  promptConfig: PromptConfig;   // 시스템 프롬프트, 초기 메시지
  modelConfig: ModelConfig;     // 모델 이름, 온도
  runConfig: RunConfig;         // maxTurns, maxTimeMinutes
  toolConfig?: ToolConfig;      // 사용 가능 도구 목록
  mcpServers?: Record<string, MCPServerConfig>;
}

export interface RemoteAgentDefinition<TOutput> extends BaseRemoteAgentDefinition<TOutput> {
  agentCardUrl?: string;
  agentCardJson?: string;
}

핵심 차이: Codex는 부모 설정 상속 기반이라 child의 독립성이 제한되지만, Gemini의 LocalAgentDefinition은 promptConfig, modelConfig, runConfig, toolConfig를 자신만의 설정으로 가진다. 부모로부터 받는 것은 AgentLoopContext(config, toolRegistry, messageBus 참조)뿐이다.

에이전트 발견과 등록

단계 설명 파일
에이전트 디렉터리 스캔 ~/.gemini/agents/, .gemini/agents/에서 YAML 파일 로드 core/src/agents/agentLoader.ts
AgentRegistry 등록 built-in + user + project 에이전트 통합 core/src/agents/registry.ts
SubagentTool 래핑 AgentDefinition을 DeclarativeTool로 변환 core/src/agents/subagent-tool.ts
ToolRegistry 노출 부모 LLM이 function call로 호출 가능 core/src/tools/tool-registry.ts 
// core/src/agents/registry.ts — built-in 에이전트 등록
private loadBuiltInAgents(): void {
  // CodebaseInvestigator, CliHelp, Generalist, Browser, MemoryManager 등
}

2. Local 서브에이전트: 독립 LLM 루프

LocalSubagentInvocation이 실행되면 LocalAgentExecutor.create()가 호출되어 격리된 실행 환경을 구성한다. 이것이 Codex와 가장 다른 점이다 — Codex는 부모의 Session을 복사하지만, Gemini는 새로운 ToolRegistry, PromptRegistry, ResourceRegistry를 만든다.

// core/src/agents/local-executor.ts
static async create(definition, context, onActivity) {
  const subagentMessageBus = parentMessageBus.derive(definition.name);
  const agentToolRegistry = new ToolRegistry(context.config, subagentMessageBus);
  // ...
  // 재귀 방지: 다른 에이전트를 호출하는 tool은 등록하지 않음
  if (allAgentNames.has(tool.name)) {
    debugLogger.warn(`Skipping subagent tool '${tool.name}' to prevent recursion.`);
    return;
  }
  // 부모의 tool을 clone해서 독립 messageBus로 연결
  const clonedTool = tool.clone(subagentMessageBus);
  agentToolRegistry.registerTool(clonedTool);
}

실행 루프 구조

sequenceDiagram
    participant Parent as 부모 LLM
    participant Tool as SubagentTool
    participant Exec as LocalAgentExecutor
    participant Chat as GeminiChat
    participant Sched as Scheduler

    Parent->>Tool: function_call(agent_name, inputs)
    Tool->>Exec: create() → 격리된 ToolRegistry
    loop maxTurns 또는 maxTime
        Exec->>Chat: sendMessage(currentMessage)
        Chat-->>Exec: functionCalls[]
        Exec->>Sched: scheduleAgentTools(requests)
        Sched-->>Exec: completedToolCalls[]
        alt complete_task 호출됨
            Exec-->>Tool: OutputObject{result, terminate_reason}
        end
    end
    Tool-->>Parent: ToolResult{llmContent, returnDisplay}

종료 조건

종료 모드 의미
GOAL complete_task tool이 호출됨
MAX_TURNS runConfig.maxTurns (기본 30) 초과
TIMEOUT runConfig.maxTimeMinutes (기본 10) 초과
ABORTED AbortSignal에 의한 취소
ERROR_NO_COMPLETE_TASK_CALL tool 호출 없이 LLM이 멈춤

SubagentProgress 스트리밍

로컬 에이전트는 실행 중 SubagentProgress 객체를 부모에게 live output으로 스트리밍한다:

// core/src/agents/types.ts
export interface SubagentProgress {
  isSubagentProgress: true;
  agentName: string;
  recentActivity: SubagentActivityItem[];  // 최근 3개 활동
  state?: 'running' | 'completed' | 'error' | 'cancelled';
  result?: string;
  terminateReason?: AgentTerminateMode;
}

이를 통해 부모 LLM은 child의 thinking, tool call, error를 실시간으로 관찰할 수 있다. 이는 Codex의 delegate 기반 event forwarding과 유사하지만, Gemini에서는 tool의 updateOutput 콜백을 통해 직접 전달된다.

3. Remote 서브에이전트: A2A 프로토콜 클라이언트

RemoteAgentInvocation은 A2AClientManager를 통해 외부 A2A 서버와 통신한다. 핵심은 SSE 스트리밍과 세션 유지(contextId/taskId 퍼시스턴스)다.

// core/src/agents/remote-invocation.ts
export class RemoteAgentInvocation extends BaseToolInvocation<RemoteAgentInputs, ToolResult> {
  // 세션 상태를 static Map으로 유지 — 호출 간 contextId/taskId 보존
  private static readonly sessionState = new Map<string, { contextId?: string; taskId?: string }>();

  async execute(signal, updateOutput) {
    const stream = this.clientManager.sendMessageStream(
      this.definition.name, message,
      { contextId: this.contextId, taskId: this.taskId, signal }
    );
    for await (const chunk of stream) {
      reassembler.update(chunk);
      updateOutput({ isSubagentProgress: true, agentName, state: 'running', ... });
    }
  }
}
역할 구현 파일
클라이언트 관리 A2AClientManager — agent card 로드, 전송 프로토콜 선택 core/src/agents/a2a-client-manager.ts
인증 A2AAuthProviderFactory — Bearer/Basic/OAuth core/src/agents/auth-provider/
결과 조립 A2AResultReassembler — SSE 청크를 최종 텍스트로 조합 core/src/agents/a2aUtils.ts
에러 처리 A2AAgentError 계층 — 사용자 친화적 에러 메시지 core/src/agents/a2a-errors.ts

Codex에는 이에 해당하는 원격 에이전트 개념이 없다. Codex의 서브에이전트는 항상 같은 프로세스 안의 child thread인 반면, Gemini는 네트워크를 넘어 독립 프로세스의 에이전트를 호출할 수 있다.

4. A2A Server: Gemini CLI를 서비스로 노출

@google/gemini-cli-a2a-server 패키지는 Gemini CLI 자체를 A2A 프로토콜 서버로 감싼다. 이것은 "서브에이전트를 호출하는" 기능이 아니라 "서브에이전트로 호출당하는" 기능이다.

아키텍처

graph LR
    subgraph "a2a-server 패키지"
        A["server.ts<br/>Express 서버 진입점"] --> B["app.ts<br/>라우트 설정"]
        B --> C["A2AExpressApp<br/>@a2a-js/sdk"]
        B --> D["커스텀 엔드포인트"]
        C --> E["DefaultRequestHandler"]
        E --> F["CoderAgentExecutor"]
        F --> G["Task"]
        G --> H["GeminiClient<br/>LLM 호출"]
        G --> I["Scheduler<br/>도구 실행"]
        G --> J["EventBus<br/>SSE 이벤트 발행"]
    end

    subgraph "영속성"
        F --> K["InMemoryTaskStore"]
        F --> L["GCSTaskStore<br/>GCS 버킷 저장"]
    end

    subgraph "설정"
        M["config.ts"] --> N["settings.json"]
        M --> O["extension.ts"]
        M --> P[".env 로딩"]
    end

핵심 컴포넌트

CoderAgentExecutor

AgentExecutor 인터페이스를 구현한 최상위 실행기. 모든 A2A 요청의 진입점이다.

// a2a-server/src/agent/executor.ts
export class CoderAgentExecutor implements AgentExecutor {
  private tasks: Map<string, TaskWrapper> = new Map();
  private executingTasks = new Set<string>();  // 동시 실행 방지

  async execute(requestContext, eventBus) {
    // 1. 기존 task 찾기 (메모리 → TaskStore → 새로 생성)
    // 2. abortController로 소켓 종료 감지
    // 3. acceptUserMessage → LLM 스트리밍
    // 4. toolCallRequests 수집 → scheduleToolCalls
    // 5. waitForPendingTools → 완료된 tool을 LLM에 전달
    // 6. 루프 종료 시 상태 저장
  }
}

동시 실행 제어가 독특하다. 같은 taskId에 대해 이미 실행 중인 루프가 있으면, 후속 요청은 acceptUserMessage만 호출하고 빠져나온다. 원래의 primary execution loop가 tool 결과를 LLM에 되돌리는 것까지 담당한다.

Task

A2A SDK의 Task와 별개인 내부 런타임 객체. Scheduler, GeminiClient, tool confirmation, SSE 이벤트 발행을 모두 관리한다.

// a2a-server/src/agent/task.ts
export class Task {
  id: string;
  contextId: string;
  scheduler: Scheduler;
  geminiClient: GeminiClient;
  taskState: TaskState;               // submitted | working | input-required | completed | failed | canceled
  pendingToolCalls: Map<string, string>;  // callId → status
  completedToolCalls: CompletedToolCall[];
  eventBus?: ExecutionEventBus;       // SSE 이벤트 발행

  // 이벤트 기반 Scheduler: MessageBus 구독으로 tool 상태 변화 감지
  private setupEventDrivenScheduler(): Scheduler { ... }
  private handleEventDrivenToolCallsUpdate(event: ToolCallsUpdateMessage) { ... }
}

CoderAgentEvent 프로토콜

A2A 서버는 자체 이벤트 프로토콜을 SSE로 스트리밍한다:

이벤트 의미 용도
tool-call-confirmation 도구 실행 승인 요청 IDE에서 사용자에게 확인 UI 표시
tool-call-update 도구 실행 상태 변경 진행 상황 표시
text-content LLM 텍스트 응답 에이전트 응답 표시
state-change task 상태 전이 UI 상태 동기화
thought LLM 사고 과정 디버깅/투명성
citation 인용 정보 출처 표시
agent-settings 워크스페이스/설정 초기화 세션 시작

도구 확인(Confirmation) 흐름

A2A 서버에서 YOLO 모드가 아닌 경우, 도구 실행 전 사용자 확인이 필요하다. 이 흐름이 Codex의 delegate approval routing에 해당한다:

sequenceDiagram
    participant Client as IDE/외부 에이전트
    participant Server as A2A Server
    participant Task as Task
    participant Sched as Scheduler

    Client->>Server: POST /a2a (user message)
    Server->>Task: acceptUserMessage
    Task->>Sched: schedule(toolCallRequests)
    Sched-->>Task: status: awaiting_approval
    Task-->>Server: SSE: tool-call-confirmation (final: true)
    Note over Server: HTTP 스트림 종료
    Client->>Server: POST /a2a (confirmation response)
    Server->>Task: data part에서 callId + outcome 추출
    Task->>Sched: messageBus.publish(TOOL_CONFIRMATION_RESPONSE)
    Sched-->>Task: status: executing → success
    Task-->>Server: SSE: tool-call-update, text-content

final: true로 HTTP 스트림을 끊고 새 요청을 받는 패턴은 SSE 기반 A2A 프로토콜의 한계를 우회하기 위한 설계다. Codex는 websocket 기반이라 이런 끊김이 없다.

5. Task 영속성과 상태 관리

TaskStore 계층

구현 설명 용도
InMemoryTaskStore SDK 기본 메모리 저장소 개발/단일 프로세스
GCSTaskStore GCS 버킷에 메타데이터 + 워크스페이스 아카이브 저장 프로덕션/분산 환경
NoOpTaskStore save를 무시하고 load만 위임 GCS 사용 시 SDK handler의 중복 save 방지 
// a2a-server/src/persistence/gcs.ts
export class GCSTaskStore implements TaskStore {
  async save(task: SDKTask): Promise<void> {
    // 1. metadata를 gzip 압축 후 GCS에 저장
    // 2. 워크스페이스 디렉터리를 tar.gz로 아카이브 후 GCS에 저장
  }

  async load(taskId: string): Promise<SDKTask | undefined> {
    // 1. GCS에서 metadata 다운로드 → gunzip → parse
    // 2. 워크스페이스 아카이브 다운로드 → 로컬에 복원
    // 3. SDKTask 객체 재구성
  }
}

PersistedStateMetadata

Task 상태 복원의 핵심은 PersistedStateMetadata다. SDK의 Task.metadata에 __persistedState 키로 내장되어 AgentSettings와 TaskState를 보존한다.

// a2a-server/src/types.ts
export interface PersistedStateMetadata {
  _agentSettings: AgentSettings;  // workspacePath, autoExecute
  _taskState: TaskState;          // 마지막 상태
}

CoderAgentExecutor.reconstruct()는 이 메타데이터로부터 Config, GeminiClient, Scheduler를 다시 구성해서 중단된 task를 이어갈 수 있다.

6. 커맨드 시스템

A2A 서버는 A2A 프로토콜 외에도 커스텀 HTTP 엔드포인트(/executeCommand, /listCommands)를 제공한다. 이를 통해 IDE가 직접 명령을 실행할 수 있다.

커맨드 설명 특이사항
init 프로젝트 분석 후 GEMINI.md 생성 streaming=true, 자체 agentExecutor 호출
restore 체크포인트에서 파일 복원 Git 기반 checkpointing
restore list 사용 가능한 체크포인트 나열 하위 커맨드 패턴
memory 메모리 관리 (show/refresh/list/add) gemini-cli-core 위임
extensions 확장 관리 (list) gemini-cli-core 위임

7. Codex와의 비교

항목 Codex Gemini CLI
서브에이전트 모델 부모 thread의 설정 상속 기반 child spawn 독립적 AgentDefinition (local/remote)
설정 상속 model, provider, approval, sandbox, developer_instructions 자동 상속 promptConfig, modelConfig, runConfig이 정의별로 독립
ToolRegistry 부모와 공유 새로 생성 후 부모 tool을 clone하여 등록
재귀 방지 명시적 제한 없음 다른 에이전트 이름을 가진 tool 등록 차단
원격 에이전트 없음 A2A 프로토콜 (HTTP/SSE, gRPC)
승인 라우팅 delegate 계층이 부모 세션으로 중계 MessageBus 기반 confirmation 이벤트
상태 영속성 app-server thread history GCS 또는 InMemory TaskStore
A2A 서버 없음 Express 기반 HTTP 서버 (피호출 가능)
종료 제어 close/wait/resume tool maxTurns, maxTimeMinutes, complete_task tool
라이브 출력 CollabAgentToolCall 이벤트 SubagentProgress 스트리밍

8. AgentCard와 A2A 프로토콜

A2A 서버는 /.well-known/agent-card.json에 AgentCard를 노출한다:

// a2a-server/src/http/app.ts
const coderAgentCard: AgentCard = {
  name: 'Gemini SDLC Agent',
  description: 'An agent that generates code based on natural language instructions...',
  protocolVersion: '0.3.0',
  capabilities: {
    streaming: true,
    pushNotifications: false,
    stateTransitionHistory: true,
  },
  skills: [{
    id: 'code_generation',
    name: 'Code Generation',
    tags: ['code', 'development', 'programming'],
  }],
};

이 선언적 모델 덕분에 다른 A2A 클라이언트가 이 서버의 능력을 자동으로 발견하고 호출할 수 있다. Codex에는 이런 에이전트 자기 기술(self-description) 메커니즘이 없다.

포크 체크리스트

  • Gemini의 서브에이전트가 local/remote 이중 구조임을 확인
  • LocalAgentExecutor의 격리된 ToolRegistry 생성 패턴 분석
  • A2A 서버의 Task 영속성과 GCS 저장소 구조 분석
  • tool confirmation 흐름이 SSE 스트림 단절/재연결 패턴임을 확인
  • CoderAgentExecutor의 동시 실행 방지 메커니즘 분석
  • A2A 프로토콜 버전(0.3.0)의 안정성 판단 필요
  • GCSTaskStore의 워크스페이스 아카이브 전략이 대규모 프로젝트에서 실용적인지 검증 필요
  • 에이전트 재귀 방지 정책(이름 기반 차단)의 충분성 평가 필요

핵심 파일 목록

a2a-server 패키지

  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/agent/executor.ts — CoderAgentExecutor, task 생명주기 관리
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/agent/task.ts — Task 런타임, Scheduler/EventBus 통합
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/http/app.ts — Express 라우트, AgentCard 정의
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/http/server.ts — 서버 진입점
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/persistence/gcs.ts — GCS 기반 task 저장/복원
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/types.ts — CoderAgentEvent, PersistedStateMetadata
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/config/config.ts — 서버 설정 로딩
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/commands/command-registry.ts — 커맨드 등록

core 패키지 (서브에이전트 관련)

  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/types.ts — AgentDefinition, SubagentProgress
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/subagent-tool.ts — SubagentTool, SubAgentInvocation
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/subagent-tool-wrapper.ts — local/remote/browser 분기
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/local-invocation.ts — LocalSubagentInvocation
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/local-executor.ts — LocalAgentExecutor, LLM 루프
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/remote-invocation.ts — RemoteAgentInvocation
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/a2a-client-manager.ts — A2A 클라이언트 관리
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/registry.ts — AgentRegistry
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/agentLoader.ts — YAML 에이전트 정의 로더
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/core/src/agents/agent-scheduler.ts — 서브에이전트 tool 스케줄링

이전 문서: [[05_co_subagent]]
다음 문서: [[06_ge_surface]]

snapshot_to_current 델타

Area Snapshot Current
Axis surface Paths cited in-body APIs/flags evolve per release — re-verify on upgrade
Host delegation Documented in this checkout Binary-only drift for closed-source CLIs

변경 기록

  • 2026-03-26: Gemini CLI의 서브에이전트 시스템과 A2A 서버 아키텍처를 분석하고, Codex와의 구조적 차이를 정리했다.
  • 2026-05-30: 최근 232 커밋 기반 delta 갱신 — AgentProtocol 추상화, 레지스트리 first-wins 전환, ACP PolicyEngine 통합, historyHardening 추가.

최신 갱신 (2026-05-30)

AgentProtocol 추상화 계층

기존 LocalSubagentInvocation/RemoteAgentInvocation이 직접 executor나 A2A 클라이언트를 구동하던 구조에서, AgentProtocol 인터페이스를 중간에 삽입하는 대규모 리팩터링이 이루어졌다. AgentProtocol은 send(), subscribe(), abort(), events 네 가지 계약으로 구성된 통합 프로토콜이며(core/src/agent/types.ts), 이를 구현하는 두 개의 프로토콜 클래스가 추가되었다:

  • LocalSubagentProtocol (core/src/agents/local-subagent-protocol.ts): LocalAgentExecutor를 감싸고, SubagentActivityEvent 콜백을 AgentEvent 스트림으로 변환한다. mapTerminateMode()가 AgentTerminateMode를 StreamEndReason(completed, max_time, max_turns, aborted, failed)으로 매핑한다.
  • RemoteSubagentProtocol (core/src/agents/remote-subagent-protocol.ts): A2AClientManager 스트리밍을 AgentEvent로 변환한다. SSE 청크마다 A2AResultReassembler로 텍스트를 조립하고, delta만 message 이벤트로 발행한다. contextId/taskId 세션 상태를 프로토콜 내부에서 관리한다.

각 프로토콜은 AgentSession을 상속한 세션 클래스로 래핑된다: LocalSubagentSession, RemoteSubagentSession. 이 세션들은 getResult() 메서드로 실행 결과를 Promise로 노출한다.

Session 기반 Invocation (LocalSessionInvocation / RemoteSessionInvocation)

프로토콜 위에 새로운 invocation 클래스가 올라간다:

  • LocalSessionInvocation (core/src/agents/local-session-invocation.ts): LocalSubagentSession을 생성하고, rawActivityCallback으로 기존 SubagentProgress 실시간 표시 로직을 유지한다. 쿼리 외 파라미터는 send({update: {config: ...}})로 버퍼링한 뒤 메시지를 보내는 2단계 전송 패턴을 사용한다.
  • RemoteSessionInvocation (core/src/agents/remote-session-invocation.ts): RemoteSubagentSession을 생성하며, static sessionState Map으로 호출 간 A2A 세션을 유지한다. 세션 키는 name::targetUrl 복합 키로, 동일 이름이라도 엔드포인트가 다르면 독립 상태를 가진다.

AgentTool의 세션 분기

AgentTool의 DelegateInvocation.buildChildInvocation() (core/src/agents/agent-tool.ts)에서 config.isAgentSessionSubagentEnabled() 플래그(adk.agentSessionSubagentEnabled)에 따라 기존 invocation과 새 session-based invocation을 분기한다. 플래그가 켜지면 LocalSessionInvocation/RemoteSessionInvocation을, 꺼지면 레거시 LocalSubagentInvocation/RemoteAgentInvocation을 사용한다. onAgentEvent 콜백도 session-based 경로에서만 전달된다.

Agent Registry: first-wins + project 우선

AgentRegistry.registerAgent() (core/src/agents/registry.ts)가 first-wins 정책으로 전환되었다. 동일 이름의 에이전트가 이미 등록되어 있으면 후속 정의를 무시하고 경고를 발행한다. 로딩 순서가 built-in -> project -> user -> extension이므로, 프로젝트 에이전트가 사용자 에이전트보다 우선한다. 이전에는 마지막 등록이 이기는 last-wins였으므로, 프로젝트 레벨에서 에이전트를 오버라이드하는 것이 사실상 불가능했다.

addAgentPolicy()도 추가되어, 원격 에이전트 등록 시 PolicyEngine에 ASK_USER 규칙을 동적으로 삽입한다. 사용자가 이미 해당 tool에 대한 정책을 정의했으면 동적 규칙을 건너뛴다(ignoreDynamic=true).

ACP 세션 + PolicyEngine 통합

ACP 세션(cli/src/acp/acpSession.ts)에 MessageBus 기반 TOOL_CONFIRMATION_REQUEST 구독이 추가되었다. 서브에이전트가 tool 실행 승인을 요청하면, ACP 세션이 PolicyEngine.check()를 호출하여 ALLOW/ASK_USER 결정을 내리고 TOOL_CONFIRMATION_RESPONSE로 응답한다. 이전에는 ACP 모드에서 PolicyEngine이 우회되어 tool 승인 요청이 응답 없이 대기하는 데드락이 발생했다(#23507). disposeController로 구독 생명주기를 관리한다.

서브에이전트의 승인 모드 인식도 강화되었다(fix(core): make subagents aware of active approval modes). ACP 모드 전환 시 에이전트 간 모드 불일치(agent mode disconnect)가 해결되었다.

History Hardening

hardenHistory() (core/src/utils/historyHardening.ts)는 Gemini API의 엄격한 대화 히스토리 불변식을 사후 보정하는 5-패스 파이프라인이다:

  1. Coalesce: 같은 role의 인접 턴 병합, 빈 턴 제거
  2. Tool Pairing + Signatures: 모든 functionCall에 대응하는 functionResponse가 있는지 검증. 누락 시 sentinel 응답("lost due to context management truncation") 주입. 첫 functionCall에 thoughtSignature가 없으면 합성 시그니처 삽입
  3. Refine Tool Responses: user 턴 내 functionResponse를 선행 model 턴의 functionCall 순서에 맞게 재정렬(hoisting)
  4. Role Constraints: user로 시작, user로 끝나도록 sentinel 턴 삽입. role 교대 강제
  5. Scrub: Vertex AI 호환성을 위해 비표준 프로퍼티 제거

이 모듈은 세션 재개(resumption) 시 컨텍스트 관리 절삭으로 깨진 히스토리를 복구하는 데 사용된다. filter internal session context from history during resumption 커밋과 연동하여, 내부 세션 컨텍스트가 외부로 노출되는 것을 방지한다.

기타 주요 변경

영역 변경 커밋/파일
라우팅 orphaned function response 방지를 위해 routing classifier 우회 #27389
라우팅 quota 소진 모델에 대한 동적 fallback #27315, #26999
라우팅 LocalAgentExecutor에서 모델 라우팅 결정 캐싱 #26548
컨텍스트 컨텍스트 단순화 완료 (feat(context): Complete simplification work) #27345
ACP tool call ID에 tool 이름 접두사 추가 (IDE 렌더링 호환) #26676
ACP ACP 모드 무한 thought 루프 방지 (nextSpeakerCheck 비활성화) #26874
A2A 서버 기본 정책 로딩 구현 (CLI와 동등) #27073
A2A 서버 usage metadata 노출 #27288
PTY resize 네이티브 크래시 방어, EBADF 억제 #27496, #27461
세션 재개 시 session-scoped 상태 리셋 #26342

신규 파일 목록

  • core/src/agents/local-subagent-protocol.ts — LocalSubagentProtocol, LocalSubagentSession
  • core/src/agents/remote-subagent-protocol.ts — RemoteSubagentProtocol, RemoteSubagentSession
  • core/src/agents/local-session-invocation.ts — LocalSessionInvocation (세션 기반 로컬 호출)
  • core/src/agents/remote-session-invocation.ts — RemoteSessionInvocation (세션 기반 원격 호출)
  • core/src/utils/historyHardening.ts — hardenHistory 5-패스 히스토리 보정
  • core/src/agent/types.ts — AgentProtocol, AgentEvent, AgentSend 인터페이스
26

Axis 06: App surfaces

AXIS

006_app-server-client-surfaces/06_ge_surface.md

Overview

Axis 06: App surfaces — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • 분석 스냅샷: 130_gemini-cli/ — app/server/client surfaces.

  • | 패키지 | npm 이름 | 역할 |
  • | a2a-server | @google/gemini-cli-a2a-server | A2A 프로토콜 기반 HTTP 서버. 에이전트 간 통신 전용 |
  • | sdk | @google/gemini-cli-sdk | 프로그래매틱 임베딩 SDK. GeminiCliAgent → GeminiCliSession → sendStream |
  • | cli (non-interactive) | @google/gemini-cli | gemini -p "..." 형태의 단발 실행. JSON/StreamJSON 출력 지원 |
  • Codex의 app-server + app-server-protocol + app-server-client 삼각형과 달리, Gemini CLI는 A2A 서버와 SDK가 완전히 분리된 두 축이다. A2A 서버는 @a2a-js/sdk 위에 Express를 올린 HTTP 서버이고, SDK는 gemini-cli-core를 직접 임베딩하는 in-process 래퍼다. wire protocol 중간층이 없
  • graph TD
  • Core["gemini-cli-core"] --> A2A["a2a-serverExpress + @a2a-js/sdk"]
  • Core --> SDK["sdkGeminiCliAgent"]
  • Core --> CLI["clinonInteractiveCli"]
  • A2A --> HTTP["HTTP JSON-RPCA2A protocol v0.3"]
  • SDK --> Embed["in-process embeddingAsyncGenerator stream"]

Topics covered

    1. 세 가지 서비스 표면

  • 2.6 영속화

    1. SDK (@google/gemini-cli-sdk)

    Core --> CLI["cli<br/>nonInteractiveCli"]
    A2A --> HTTP["HTTP JSON-RPC<br/>A2A protocol v0.3"]
    SDK --> Embed["in-process embedding<br/>AsyncGenerator stream"]
    CLI --> Pipe["stdout pipe<br/>text / json / stream-json"]
    CLI --> ACP["ACP client<br/>stdio protocol"]

    RH --> AE["CoderAgentExecutor"]
    AE --> TW["TaskWrapper"]
    TW --> T["Task"]

    T --> Sched["Scheduler"]

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/http/app.ts
const coderAgentCard: AgentCard = {
  name: 'Gemini SDLC Agent',
  protocolVersion: '0.3.0',
  capabilities: {
    streaming: true,
    pushNotifications: false,
    stateTransitionHistory: true,
  },
  skills: [{
    id: 'code_generation',
    name: 'Code Generation',
    inputModes: ['text'],
    outputModes: ['text'],
  }],
};

README / docs

submitted → working → input-required ↔ working → completed
                                               → failed
                                               → canceled

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/agent/executor.ts
while (agentTurnActive) {
  for await (const event of agentEvents) {
    if (event.type === GeminiEventType.ToolCallRequest) {
      toolCallRequests.push(event.value);
      continue;
    }
    await currentTask.acceptAgentMessage(event);
  }
  if (toolCallRequests.length > 0) {
    await currentTask.scheduleToolCalls(toolCallRequests, abortSignal);
  }
  await currentTask.waitForPendingTools();
  const completedTools = currentTask.getAndClearCompletedTools();
  if (completedTools.length > 0) {
    agentEvents = currentTask.sendCompletedToolsToLlm(completedTools, abortSignal);
  } else {
    agentTurnActive = false;
  }
}

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/persistence/gcs.ts
export class GCSTaskStore implements TaskStore {
  async save(task: SDKTask): Promise<void> { /* gzip + GCS upload */ }
  async load(taskId: string): Promise<SDKTask | undefined> { /* GCS download + gunzip + tar extract */ }
}

README / docs

graph TD
    User["사용자 코드"] --> Agent["GeminiCliAgent"]
    Agent --> Session["GeminiCliSession"]
    Session --> Config["Config<br/>(gemini-cli-core)"]
    Config --> GC["GeminiClient"]
    Config --> TR["ToolRegistry"]
    Config --> SM["SkillManager"]
    Session --> Stream["sendStream()<br/>AsyncGenerator"]

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/sdk/src/agent.ts
export class GeminiCliAgent {
  session(options?: { sessionId?: string }): GeminiCliSession { ... }
  async resumeSession(sessionId: string): Promise<GeminiCliSession> { ... }
}

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/sdk/src/session.ts
async *sendStream(prompt: string, signal?: AbortSignal): AsyncGenerator<ServerGeminiStreamEvent> {
  while (true) {
    const stream = client.sendMessageStream(request, abortSignal, sessionId);
    for await (const event of stream) {
      yield event;
      if (event.type === GeminiEventType.ToolCallRequest) {
        toolCallsToSchedule.push({ ...toolCall, args });
      }
    }
    if (toolCallsToSchedule.length === 0) break;
    const completedCalls = await scheduleAgentTools(this.config, toolCallsToSchedule, { ... });
    request = completedCalls.flatMap(call => call.response.responseParts);
  }
}

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/sdk/src/tool.ts
export function tool<T extends z.ZodTypeAny>(
  definition: ToolDefinition<T>,
  action: (params: z.infer<T>, context?: SessionContext) => Promise<unknown>,
): Tool<T> { ... }

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/sdk/src/types.ts
export interface SessionContext {
  sessionId: string;
  transcript: readonly Content[];
  cwd: string;
  timestamp: string;
  fs: AgentFilesystem;    // readFile, writeFile
  shell: AgentShell;      // exec()
  agent: GeminiCliAgent;
  session: GeminiCliSession;
}

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/sdk/src/skills.ts
export function skillDir(path: string): SkillReference {
  return { type: 'dir', path };
}

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/cli/src/nonInteractiveCli.ts
const streamFormatter = config.getOutputFormat() === OutputFormat.STREAM_JSON
  ? new StreamJsonFormatter()
  : null;

README / docs

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/cli/src/acp/acpClient.ts
import * as acp from '@agentclientprotocol/sdk';

Main analysis

App Server · Client Surface · Gemini CLI

Analysis Snapshot: 130_gemini-cli/ — app/server/client surfaces.

1. Three service surfaces

Gemini CLI's programmatic surface is divided into three packages.

package npm name Role
a2a-server @google/gemini-cli-a2a-server HTTP server based on A2A protocol. Agent-to-agent communication only
sdk @google/gemini-cli-sdk Programmatic Embedding SDK. GeminiCliAgent → GeminiCliSession → sendStream
cli (non-interactive) @google/gemini-cli Single execution of the form gemini -p "...". JSON/StreamJSON output support

Unlike Codex's app-server + app-server-protocol + app-server-client triangle, Gemini CLI has two completely separate axes: A2A Server and SDK. A2A Server is an HTTP server that builds Express on top of @a2a-js/sdk, and the SDK is an in-process wrapper that directly embeds gemini-cli-core. There is no middle layer of wire protocol.

graph TD
    Core["gemini-cli-core"] --> A2A["a2a-server<br/>Express + @a2a-js/sdk"]
    Core --> SDK["sdk<br/>GeminiCliAgent"]
    Core --> CLI["cli<br/>nonInteractiveCli"]
    A2A --> HTTP["HTTP JSON-RPC<br/>A2A protocol v0.3"]
    SDK --> Embed["in-process embedding<br/>AsyncGenerator stream"]
    CLI --> Pipe["stdout pipe<br/>text / json / stream-json"]
    CLI --> ACP["ACP client<br/>stdio protocol"]

2. A2A server (a2a-server)

2.1 Architecture

A2A Server is an implementation of Google's Agent-to-Agent protocol. CoderAgentExecutor implements the AgentExecutor interface of @a2a-js/sdk, and A2AExpressApp performs routing on the Express app.

graph LR
    Client["A2A Client"] -->|POST /| RH["DefaultRequestHandler"]
    RH --> AE["CoderAgentExecutor"]
    AE --> TW["TaskWrapper"]
    TW --> T["Task"]
    T --> GC["GeminiClient<br/>(gemini-cli-core)"]
    T --> Sched["Scheduler"]
    AE --> TS["TaskStore<br/>InMemory / GCS"]

2.2 AgentCard

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/http/app.ts
const coderAgentCard: AgentCard = {
  name: 'Gemini SDLC Agent',
  protocolVersion: '0.3.0',
  capabilities: {
    streaming: true,
    pushNotifications: false,
    stateTransitionHistory: true,
  },
  skills: [{
    id: 'code_generation',
    name: 'Code Generation',
    inputModes: ['text'],
    outputModes: ['text'],
  }],
};

It is based on A2A protocol v0.3. Supports streaming, but no push notification yet.

2.3 Task life cycle

CoderAgentExecutor.execute() is the core loop. State transitions follow the A2A standard TaskState.

submitted → working → input-required ↔ working → completed
                                               → failed
                                               → canceled

Execution flow:

  1. Extract userMessage from RequestContext
  2. Create or restore TaskStore (memory cache → TaskStore → create new)
  3. task.acceptUserMessage() → Receive LLM stream
  4. Collection of GeminiEventType.ToolCallRequest → task.scheduleToolCalls() batch scheduling
  5. Wait for tool completion → task.sendCompletedToolsToLlm() → Re-loop
  6. If there is no tool, switch to input-required state and issue final: true
// 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/agent/executor.ts
while (agentTurnActive) {
  for await (const event of agentEvents) {
    if (event.type === GeminiEventType.ToolCallRequest) {
      toolCallRequests.push(event.value);
      continue;
    }
    await currentTask.acceptAgentMessage(event);
  }
  if (toolCallRequests.length > 0) {
    await currentTask.scheduleToolCalls(toolCallRequests, abortSignal);
  }
  await currentTask.waitForPendingTools();
  const completedTools = currentTask.getAndClearCompletedTools();
  if (completedTools.length > 0) {
    agentEvents = currentTask.sendCompletedToolsToLlm(completedTools, abortSignal);
  } else {
    agentTurnActive = false;
  }
}

2.4 Event Protocol

The CoderAgentEvent enum defines A2A event metadata.

Event Description
tool-call-confirmation Request permission to run tool
tool-call-update update tool execution status
text-content Text Response Streaming
state-change task state transition
thought agent thought process
citation Citation Information
agent-settings Workspace path, autorun settings

2.5 Custom endpoints

In addition to the A2A standard routes, there is a server-specific REST endpoint.

Endpoint method Description
/tasks POST Create a new task (can include AgentSettings)
/tasks/metadata GET View entire task metadata (InMemory only)
/tasks/:taskId/metadata GET specific task metadata
/executeCommand POST Execute server commands (memory, extensions, init, restore)
/listCommands GET List of registered commands

2.6 Permanence

It is abstracted into the TaskStore interface. Two implementations:

  • InMemoryTaskStore: Provided by @a2a-js/sdk/server. For development
  • GCSTaskStore: Based on Google Cloud Storage. Save/restore metadata as gzip JSON and workspace as tar.gz archive.
// 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/persistence/gcs.ts
export class GCSTaskStore implements TaskStore {
  async save(task: SDKTask): Promise<void> { /* gzip + GCS upload */ }
  async load(taskId: string): Promise<SDKTask | undefined> { /* GCS download + gunzip + tar extract */ }
}

2.7 Command system

Four server commands registered in CommandRegistry:

command Description streaming
init Generate GEMINI.md automatically ✅
memory Memory query/add/update/list ❌
extensions Extended list query ❌
restore Checkpoint Restore/List ❌

3. SDK (@google/gemini-cli-sdk)

3.1 Design philosophy

The SDK embeds gemini-cli-core directly. Unlike Codex's Python SDK, which is an app-server wrapper, Gemini SDK is a native wrapper that wraps the core in-process. There is no network layer.

graph TD
    User["사용자 코드"] --> Agent["GeminiCliAgent"]
    Agent --> Session["GeminiCliSession"]
    Session --> Config["Config<br/>(gemini-cli-core)"]
    Config --> GC["GeminiClient"]
    Config --> TR["ToolRegistry"]
    Config --> SM["SkillManager"]
    Session --> Stream["sendStream()<br/>AsyncGenerator"]

3.2 GeminiCliAgent

This is Agent Factory. Create a new session with session() and restore an existing session with resumeSession().

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/sdk/src/agent.ts
export class GeminiCliAgent {
  session(options?: { sessionId?: string }): GeminiCliSession { ... }
  async resumeSession(sessionId: string): Promise<GeminiCliSession> { ... }
}

3.3 GeminiCliSession

A session is the actual unit of execution. sendStream() runs the agent loop.

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/sdk/src/session.ts
async *sendStream(prompt: string, signal?: AbortSignal): AsyncGenerator<ServerGeminiStreamEvent> {
  while (true) {
    const stream = client.sendMessageStream(request, abortSignal, sessionId);
    for await (const event of stream) {
      yield event;
      if (event.type === GeminiEventType.ToolCallRequest) {
        toolCallsToSchedule.push({ ...toolCall, args });
      }
    }
    if (toolCallsToSchedule.length === 0) break;
    const completedCalls = await scheduleAgentTools(this.config, toolCallsToSchedule, { ... });
    request = completedCalls.flatMap(call => call.response.responseParts);
  }
}

The core pattern is the same as the A2A server's executor loop: LLM stream → collect tool call → execute tool → retransmit response to LLM → repeat.

3.4 Custom Tool

The tool() helper defines a tool based on the Zod schema. SdkTool inherits core's BaseDeclarativeTool.

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/sdk/src/tool.ts
export function tool<T extends z.ZodTypeAny>(
  definition: ToolDefinition<T>,
  action: (params: z.infer<T>, context?: SessionContext) => Promise<unknown>,
): Tool<T> { ... }

When running the tool, a SessionContext is injected:

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/sdk/src/types.ts
export interface SessionContext {
  sessionId: string;
  transcript: readonly Content[];
  cwd: string;
  timestamp: string;
  fs: AgentFilesystem;    // readFile, writeFile
  shell: AgentShell;      // exec()
  agent: GeminiCliAgent;
  session: GeminiCliSession;
}

3.5 Custom Skill

Load filesystem-based skills with the skillDir() helper. Calls loadSkillsFromDir() and SkillManager.addSkills() of core.

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/sdk/src/skills.ts
export function skillDir(path: string): SkillReference {
  return { type: 'dir', path };
}

3.6 Implementation Status

Features status
Agent + Session ✅ Implemented
Custom Tools ✅ Implemented
Custom Skills ✅ Implemented
System Instructions ✅ Both static/dynamic
Session Resume ✅ Implemented
Custom Hooks ❌ Not implemented
Subagents ❌ Not implemented
Extensions ❌ Not implemented
ACP Mode ❌ Not implemented
Approvals / Policies ❌ Not implemented

4. CLI Non-Interactive Mode

4.1 Execution Mode

Execute once with gemini -p "prompt". 3 output formats:

Format flag Description
text Basic Streaming text output, stripAnsi applied
json --output-format json After completion, batch output JsonFormatter.format()
stream-json --output-format stream-json NDJSON event streaming (INIT, MESSAGE, TOOL_USE, TOOL_RESULT, RESULT) 
// 130_gemini-cli/packages/cli/src/nonInteractiveCli.ts
const streamFormatter = config.getOutputFormat() === OutputFormat.STREAM_JSON
  ? new StreamJsonFormatter()
  : null;

4.2 agent loop

The agent loop in non-interactive mode follows the same pattern:

  1. geminiClient.sendMessageStream() stream
  2. Collect ToolCallRequest event
  3. Run scheduler.schedule(toolCallRequests)
  4. Put tool response into currentMessages and reloop
  5. Terminate when maxSessionTurns is exceeded

4.3 ACP Client

CLI can also operate as an ACP (Agent Client Protocol) client. Use @agentclientprotocol/sdk to communicate with external agents using a stdio-based protocol.

// 130_gemini-cli/packages/cli/src/acp/acpClient.ts
import * as acp from '@agentclientprotocol/sdk';

5. Comparison of three surfaces

Item A2A Server SDK CLI non-interactive
protocol A2A v0.3 over HTTP None (in-process) stdout pipe / ACP stdio
transport Express (localhost) function call process stdout
State Management TaskStore (InMemory/GCS) local file session Short Hair (No Condition)
tool approval ToolCallConfirmationEvent PolicyDecision.ALLOW default YOLO or inactive
Streaming ExecutionEventBus → SSE AsyncGenerator<ServerGeminiStreamEvent> stdout write /NDJSON
Multi-session ✅ Task unit management ✅ session unit ❌ Single execution
perpetuation GCS or InMemory local file system None

6. Structural comparison with Codex app-server

perspective Codex Gemini CLI
server runtime app-server (Rust, single) a2a-server (TypeScript, Express)
wire protocol Own JSON-RPC (app-server-protocol) A2A v0.3 standard protocol
client facade app-server-client (in-process/remote integration) doesn't exist. SDK and server separated
SDK philosophy TS is a CLI wrapper, Python is an app-server wrapper Native wrapper that directly embeds core
Event Model thread/turn/item hierarchy Task → CoderAgentEvent flat event
perpetuation None (client responsibility) TaskStore abstraction (including GCS)
state machine thread → turn management A2A TaskState (submitted→working→input-required→...)

Key differences

  1. protocol boundary: Codex defined its own wire protocol and then placed a client on top of it. Gemini CLI has adopted an external standard called A2A.
  2. SDK Location: Codex's TS SDK is a wrapper that surrounds CLI outside of CLI. Gemini SDK embeds core directly. Therefore, the Gemini SDK allows for deeper customization.
  3. Server independence: Gemini's A2A server has its own command system (init, memory, restore), so it can be operated without CLI.

7. Reuse seam

seam Reason
CoderAgentExecutor The agent loop can be reused regardless of the A2A protocol
Task class Tool scheduling, verification, and status management all bundled into one
GeminiCliAgent + GeminiCliSession API that can be used directly for 3rd party embedding
SessionContext interface fs, shell, and transcript access are abstracted
CommandRegistry Server command extension is neat with registry pattern
non-interactive StreamJsonFormatter NDJSON output suitable for linking with external tools

8. Combined Risk

risk Description
core-dependent tight coupling Both the SDK and A2A server are bound to gemini-cli-core with file:../core. core changes are propagated to both
A2A Protocol Maturity v0.3 is experimental. Push notification not supported, security scheme is placeholder level
SDK incomplete Hooks, subagents, extensions, ACP, and approvals are all not implemented. Significant additional work is required to put it into production
Absence of tool approval The SDK default value is PolicyDecision.ALLOW. Dangerous in production
Authentication Complexity A2A server's authentication is tied to USE_CCPA / GEMINI_API_KEY / COMPUTE_ADC branches
Permanent for GCS only The only external persistence of the A2A server is GCS. There is no other storage backend

9. Core file list

A2A Server

  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/agent/executor.ts — CoderAgentExecutor, core execution loop.
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/agent/task.ts — Task class, tool scheduling and state management
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/http/app.ts — Express app, AgentCard, routing
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/types.ts — Type definitions such as CoderAgentEvent, TaskMetadata, etc.
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/persistence/gcs.ts — GCSTaskStore, NoOpTaskStore
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/config/config.ts — Server Config loading, authentication processing
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/a2a-server/src/commands/command-registry.ts — Command registry

SDK

  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/sdk/src/agent.ts — GeminiCliAgent
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/sdk/src/session.ts — GeminiCliSession, sendStream() agent loop
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/sdk/src/tool.ts — tool() helper, SdkTool, SdkToolInvocation
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/sdk/src/types.ts — SessionContext, AgentFilesystem, AgentShell
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/sdk/src/skills.ts — skillDir() helper
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/sdk/src/fs.ts — SdkAgentFilesystem
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/sdk/src/shell.ts — SdkAgentShell
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/sdk/SDK_DESIGN.md — SDK design documentation and implementation status.

CLI Non-Interactive

  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/cli/src/nonInteractiveCli.ts — runNonInteractive(), agent loop, output format
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/cli/src/nonInteractiveCliCommands.ts — Slash command processing
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/cli/src/acp/acpClient.ts — ACP Client
  • 130_gemini-cli/packages/cli/src/acp/commandHandler.ts — ACP command handler
